One is not allowed to go out to smoke.
Staff is very inpolite.
Under any circumstances avoid this awful place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alec Gonzalez Whitsell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-e3kHnXy7cv94WMBMPfW51bt7FT0XxkjE3eBebULY9cy6mAM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The actual club is okay. A little empty at 2/3 am. The drinks are average and the music is fine to dance. HOWEVER, they charge you several Euro extra to step out and grab a smoke. I don't even smoke. I just wanted to keep my friend company.

Then, when I tell them I am not gonna pay that and I rather go home they have the nerve to take it personally and tell me not to disrespect them. If you want customers, make them feel comfortable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allison Escobedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHF7euMSZ_ZcNl8xZ_mSbygcp6M1ozCOZ2wz5E31ftf4VWUZpmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 fully recommended","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRyewgrRJmWcTja7NAgvKo&fid=0x0:0x2390068ea5434496"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Tshepiso Tlhabyane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuZjWFoZnNCW38e46k0I6HLCrGFjnFMST3lbzPWYtbbur2B2bD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"AMAZING CLUB!!!. It's super fun and the staff are really nice as well. The only problem was that when it got crowded the club was really hot. Other than that I would 100% recommend to both Spanish or foreign people.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLM05RN8TeEyiioU9uVL-fVa9JT5FleIjQjlRQ1_tiat0uXzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicholas Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4tzmlBM_tP10ZWSxrndPl4C-xvcoJNdAZDBU-eVlGz-V6kVQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice spot","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia López Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXybhGAtAjxYMH_Wt-pubod8G2odC7M2O-5GAblyejNL-ZsyU0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebramos en la discoteca EPOKA el evento que organizábamos, COMPIMUN, un evento masivo universitario, y no podríamos estar más satisfechos. Los dueños fueron encantadores desde el primer momento y nos facilitaron muchísimo el trabajo. Lo mismo ocurre con el equipo de seguridad, que se portó fenomenal con nosotros: siempre atentos, comunicativos y manteniéndonos informados de todo lo que ocurría.

La música fue excelente y creó un ambiente increíble durante toda la noche. Además, todos los trabajadores fueron un encanto: desde la mujer de la entrada, pasando por los camareros, hasta la responsable del ropero.

De verdad, es un lugar al que recomiendo muchísimo tanto para salir un fin de semana como para organizar un evento. Nosotros, sin duda, repetiremos.

Todos los participantes de nuestro evento nos estuvieron diciendo lo contentos que estaban con la fiesta.

¡Gracias, EPOKA, por hacerlo todo tan fácil y por hacer que fuera un evento inolvidable!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Ramirez Aznar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5g0It0xa8CsDMNlDCurX-DUhpHbjvFSP0wih6MB9sPRzPMJ14=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Muy mala experiencia en la discoteca Epoka. Estuvimos más de 40 minutos esperando fuera, habiendo pagado 22 euros por la entrada, para al final entar casi en los últimos momentos sin consumición. Además, no incluía ninguna copa después de las dos,habiendo esperando más de una hora para quitarnos esa copa , cosa que tampoco se avisó claramente.
Da la sensación de que vendieron más entradas de las que realmente cabían, porque no es normal que la gente tenga que esperar tanto tiempo después de pagar.
Sinceramente, una muy mala organización y una falta de respeto hacia quienes habíamos pagado. No recomiendo para nada esta discoteca.
Gracias.","Images":null,"When":""}]

-Visuals in this club are great, with a lot of lasers and screens and lights on the ceiling. Very professionally designed 👌

user_reviews: [{"Name":"jorge cariel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPoRGkCJOLfdOOTbEnmIiMYEK9Qd68YX4jTnlJkiuX4gwlHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es un buen sitio y esta ubicado en una zona centrica, sin embargo, deben mejorar el servicio de los camareros ya que el dia que fuimos en grupo pasaron varias cosas; los vasos aparentemente estaban sucios, los hielos de varios tragos sabian a agua sucia y a muchas personas les negaron vasos de agua pese a haber comprado anteriormente. Si mejoran eso sera un lugar 5 estrellas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOQqZ7EbpE15mC0w2gSVKF\u0026fid=0x0:0xe3d7e7560de29d68"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Sara Cabrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkh6jbo14A2qvKMJmf57Hv5uJGR--H6UzAbHxwY6LsiMxitFk3ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fui por primera y última vez a esta discoteca, La experiencia fue bastante decepcionante. El lugar estaba excesivamente lleno, hasta el punto de que moverse era incómodo y agobiante, con la gente constantemente apretada y sin apenas espacio para disfrutar. Además, la organización dejó mucho que desear: no había roperos suficientes para guardar los abrigos, lo que generaba largas esperas y molestias innecesarias. Solo guardaba abrigos a quien le da su gana, por qué me fui 3 veces a preguntar y me decía la chica con cara de amargad “No”  y venían otras chicas  y a ellas si le gustaba los abrigos, En general, el ambiente resultó más estresante que divertido. No creo que vuelva ni que la recomiende.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesús Montalbán García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQQBrZ6FlwELXBC-ZDijTZJbQ8TlDMNvDaq3g3Z2QLYUE78eg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Está reseña va dirigida al dueño del local gerente  yo hablo en este caso del whisky que seguramente todo el alcohol sea de la misma condición es alcohol de quemar aguarrás un alcohol puede ser malo pero no quemarte al beberlo ni que pique como lo hace el problema más grave es que el etiquetado de la botella no está en español cosa que es ilegal ya que aunque venga de otro país de la unión europea como es este caso debe tener la etiqueta en el idioma del país según una de las personas que trabaja allí dice que eso viene en caja sellado .. está claro que hasta hay llegamos pero deben revisar el origen de la compra ya que la próxima reseña será en sanidad directamente y en agencia tributaria para que la empresa que les suministra explique el origen de la compra","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alejandra Ruiz Marín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEFS2TPje8Vv2UvgA2YBb-EKSUztgY2obPfbzUBxa3h9J5DA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El peor sitio en el que he estado nunca. La camarera rubia es patetica, de vergüenza ajena. Te tratan fatal y es todo surrealista. Es patetico que paguen a gente así para trabajar. Súper incopenhentes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadia Brasich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKhsTLsgtqRvHX5ZpB1HQfuwFvwtYiQB9a9xG9f_xWjmFJyg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me gustó mucho. Me gustaron los baños","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICVnMz4eA\u0026fid=0x0:0xe3d7e7560de29d68"],"When":"2023-12-6"},{"Name":"Ana López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-Xs-ut5bX0SbMtpef_WwomY8WL2aWoL2QLuLbqaqjcS-67o8G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fuimos a la sesión 'cientocero' y no nos gustó. Se supone que era de indie y era todo canciones indie pero con base de electrónica mala. No se oía la canción de lo alta que estaba la base, que por cierto era la misma todo el rato. Una decepción la verdad. Estuvimos 1 hora y encima me cobraron 7 euros por un tercio. Una pena...","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Bibi Bibi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyVE1sEOVK8s-CibevFVx3pjxT6GgaAkqY4qZRZkaQgw7b_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"DON’T GO!!!!!
I really wish I had checked the reviews before going to this place. Please DON’T GO — especially if you’re a woman.
I felt completely disrespected and unsafe. While I was waiting in line for the bathroom, staff treated me with shocking aggression just because I voiced a complaint about the conditions. They kicked me out because I was complaining. I am a woman who is 1.56m tall! They treated me like a criminal.  Their attitude was completely unacceptable, and I’ve now seen many comments from other customers describing similar experiences with the security team. I regret going, and I hope others can avoid the same experience. Until the last day of my existence, if this place is still open, I’ll speak to EVERYONE I know to spread the word about this criminal and awful place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPwIhPesuf-w4_om9bIm_FZ9U2x2jSp1-8Pkmb-AStBBiF5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Shockingly overcrowded. As soon as I went inside, I felt extremely unsafe. It feels like it is only a matter of time until this place gets shut down or they get someone seriously hurt or killed.

Management: If you are going to reply to this, tell me what concrete steps you are taking to keep your guests safe and keep occupancy to the legal limits. Simply saying "sorry" as you did to the other reviews just demonstrates that you do not care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1FtZ8ADkVxZlwCuSNJyGwz4TeIPPod-uulRcldH1UZrFhfy4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place has no air inside / no proper air circulation. Definitely very bad for health to stay here longer than 30 min. After travelling to more than 40 countries I have to admit that I never saw this kind of circumstances in a club. The owner seems to be a capitalistic egoist not caring at all about his personell or guests. I am so shocked and hope that you will never land here. They let to many people in and don’t care about the well-being of their guests.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBQDqlT1U359jb9aiAXXVa5j37Lp1X7FE2wE9m1Cr5D1AZZ2Lk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"A coctel is 15€ and it's not really worthy. [{"Name":"Louise Mulhern","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZFPgrT3TS77nxXQiN4NlSbi8e2Xm-K8jMBmP9wNYBZwIeu392LQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything we tried food wise was delicious, definitely need to go here, drinks options were great music and dj after were also amazing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4pvcqfshK9EI_DeRdLtFE&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Deborah Laks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3grBV_SHuXFTJao3Rutge7Qtph1-vhD5tPBYjbJL4SV7esFjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went as a group of 6 friends. The place is a restaurant that turns into a bar with DJ at 11:00pm. The food was pretty surprising for a place like this, specially the meat. The avocado was ok but it not like it’s advertised. The best part were the deserts. Both the hot cookie and the cheese cake were delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQ99j2HQ&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Emmanuel Keates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ5qWjYuJoWWWX6-002ewKGutedTXR90RVylYxjUf0gplddqTy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I go here whenever I am in Madrid. Love the relaxed cosy-chic atmosphere and the kind staff. However today I had some hommous that tasted like the one you get in supermarkets, with a retro-acidic flavour which appeared to be just dressed after coming out of a packet. The croquetas were amazing as usual, among the best in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elvira P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyCAW-M2vIRa3A-vVJXm3NJL-6j4A49R3QIt-Sy8QHHWgGxoQY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We enjoyed our dinner in this well decorated restaurant which becomes a club at the weekends during late hrs.
They have a great selection of dishes which suits everyone’s taste.
My favourite dishes were the roasted avocados, the tortilla and the steak.
Definitely good value for money, great for bringing people who are visiting, you will never go wrong!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT1cSQhgE&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2024-5-26"},{"Name":"Tullia Pimpinella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhPqIQgNzkRo0uAk0n1nGSAJ14RMPGz0OS9mWdChf8_obD0Uuq8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best experiences in Madrid. Dog friendly, great food and amazing service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsKKCy-Dllk2p_fTN9pVM3&fid=0x0:0x13eb3e18147250c1"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Elissa Nachef","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKv_ZCMxG76PEeVcx1YvJFObQjXM4fEI5A9XMFSZFm7rgLQdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you for everything! Andres truly made our experience 100 times better. He was incredibly professional, kind, and so helpful throughout our visit. The service and atmosphere were exceptional, and we left with big smiles. Highly recommend this restaurant","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elias Pimentel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYjRqZzKc1TkTyVrpRWkcTT9TY7Vml5pu6t1PuWTCbXwFbeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The customer service was terrible. We went for a dinner and the food was okay not spectacular. The server did not put the complete contents of a meal for takeaway even when we specifically asked. Finally, we were charged a fee three times on our check for bread and olives, even though we only received one order. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Frida Chico Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQcGIGQCwEreLUSPnPhjfG7-Fc6CYHf3mehL8GV6u1A9BakA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall pretty mid, there's a dress code but they let us in with jeans and the bouncer was pretty nice.

We got there at 3am and they charged 20 euros with a drink included, the bartender was extremely rude but my local friends told me overall service in Madrid is not super good/friendly.

As for the people inside no one was really dancing just kind of awkwardly standing with drinks in their hands. My friend and I still had a good time but I will probably go to another club when I go back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikaely Vaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXIzfmmj92sW8eK8ihRUjF1PbMv-xAhHnQYvwJg1KUSAkKxMjZDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am Brazilian and visited Madrid for New Year's Eve. Unfortunately, my husband and I had a terrible experience with POSH on this important trip for us.

The deciding factor for choosing POSH for New Year's Eve was the promise of an open bar party. When we arrived, they delayed opening for almost an hour, which already dampened the good vibe we had from the New Year's countdown at Puerta del Sol. But okay... we entered at 2:00 AM, quickly grabbed a drink because we were among the first to enter. Then, we spent another hour in line at the coat check. After checking our coats, we were excited to finally start the night, so we went to get drinks. That's when the biggest frustration hit us; we spent an hour in line, completely squeezed in the midst of so many people, and couldn't move an inch because the line simply didn't move. There were three people serving drinks for about 700 people. So we went to talk to the organizers, and all we heard was 'that's just how it is.'

In the end, we left at 4:00 AM after paying 100 euros for an open bar party where we stayed for two hours, had 1 drink, and didn't dance to any music amidst the chaos and disorganization. At every open bar party we've been to in Brazil, we didn't have an empty glass for a minute, so we never expected to go through this. Complete waste of money. We only got a ruined New Year's night, full of stress and losses.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ilan Ergas Morgheinstern","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmZ9Qie-RwLFXQD9OOThh6L279jkD69xQrj-C_Xe3mA_VAyqZ0Vw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pretty bad experience overall. 20EU for a pre online ticket with 2 drinks. However, the place has a max capacity of 700, when we arrived security said 200 where already inside, nevertheless... we had to wait for 50 mins in freezing conditions to get passed security. Then another 20 mins to get inside. I won't cone back here soon, not at least till summer. Proportion men/women 70/30. Women free till 1a.m. not very nice from a moral point of view","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christer Noren Florez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqopTF3_-atx6hcI4TJtm4aBRDv6dZxUlWf3DwZn9dBRMybw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We got a invitation card stating that it was 5€ the entry and did the line. After waiting we were badly treated and asked our documents.  One of us had an official document that they didn't recognize and even though he had 18 years, he was asked impolitely and roughly to step out. Then meanwhile we were asked to pay 30€ even though the invitation said it was 5€ and said it didn't matter. It ended up asking the whole group to leave. I do not reccomend, bad treatment, discrimination to foreigners and the worst experience I've had in Madrid. Instead I reccomend to got to the Sol metro station and search for a disco over there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"anna Carvajal Beitelhoff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDzOmTj_Ul_eD3WWmGweu7d8yPJcYrQrZx4lN4XhJQmSilXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"diana lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMPdcn4OrwKJm1fS5ZxFm432iPOXmZ3O2N7sQaiYulsae4ZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"andrea genial !!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucía Soriano Míguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcwF_lm5yFGa1EOafewZDhMXAF1xlPUaWVkkOVPYt5jWFYX7M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"cool","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYbAkwGENNq3Azuc40Sh3-lV6qs9IQspuf8XoDR7q7hCO1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"andrea top","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sayaka Kyoko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4gWfJihIXDRTOhPaBsf_aQnsKF1hjzYe2R7W6HT-MYzPERA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They promise themes and they didn't  deliver. I went to musical night, and although we got there late (3 am) they didn't play a single musical song that wasn't Mamma Mia or The Greatest Showman. We didn't  hear a single Wicked song, even though we went on the day of the Wicked: For Good release. They didn't accept any requests on musicals/Broadway songs. I GENUINELY FELT ASHAMED OF LIKING MUSICALS AT A CLUB NIGHT THAT WAS MEANT FOR MUSICAL LOVETS.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Frauen Arzt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJ1O4EAq6EVCDTaaz9OjOzFsiFFpmgAauS01ccgFwbLVybag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very poor security. I was spat at out of nowhere by a young girl outside, but the security didn't care. In the club, a visitor was beaten up so badly that the whole floor was covered in blood. The visitors are either under 18 or over 30, very strange. ID cards are not checked either. In the picture you can see the blood on the floor, nobody has wiped it up!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3-bXAjgE&fid=0x0:0x8e43db7d3f4c48b5"],"When":"2024-11-16"},{"Name":"Alex Mayr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYqxg5Urr6SJKHjshn475YP1KqnOykrA6pe3yZXAQu50pCcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I went on a Thursday, where there weren’t too many people. The audience was also generally quite young around 18-20.
But the music was good and we got two alcoholic free drinks with the ticket we bought. However, I think the drinks were maybe diluted with water, but I‘m not 100% sure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nathan Franquelin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFadXceOXkT1A26j_tFTGcZCKhU-l5oGZlvko4HjcBHoFwAWk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The club is quite nice but the staff is horrible especially the one at the entrance. They have a guest list until 00h30 that allows you to pay less, but even if you arrive on time, they make you wait in front of the club (even though the club is fully empty) until 00h30 is passed so that you can pay the full price. Very dishonest, happened to me quite a few time and to a lot of my friends coming there. And when you tell them about that they become quite aggressive.
Just know if you go here, don't expect to be paying 14€","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Adrián Pérez Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8JkhhjxFYyq85c1xF5O1TT1C6xqeYRas5F36HfLvF3gL0HZET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place is really nice but it has lost a lot of popularity this past year, it tends to be less full and a bit less fun. The music is still very nice and the ambient as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andres Zubizarreta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8hI0l7igSLLNDi0Prh_Q31eqLMYcBjcTUaJG3Ax05hvG70SynAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is a spacious club with different levels for people to dance in. The music variety is very bad. The DJs are not real DJs, they just play the regular songs and they do not remix anything you may hear them replay the same song at least 10 times in one night. The air conditioning is terrible, it is very hot inside. The bottom floor was like entering a sauna and filled with bad odors. People would vomit and there was no staff seen to sanitize the vomit so it reeked of vomit the whole night. The bathrooms were disgusting and they did not even have soap for the people to be able to wash their hands. They also did not have any toilet paper. The cloakroom charges you 2€ per coat and 4€ for bags. The entrance is 20€ for 2 drinks at 1:30 am. The water costs 4€ . The floor was also filled with broken glass which is very dangerous if someone is to fall down, the glass remained on the floor all night without been cleaned up by any member of the staff","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arya Netflix","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGt_pMH0p1X-ItvJnBaaKJ6TLLET77uev8nsijSWIZ_ZWiEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It‘s the biggest children club I‘ve ever been. They charged us 25€ because apparently the club was full. The funniest part is - the club was EMPTY. I feel ripped off. There are so many good clubs in Madrid - don‘t waste your money here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dymytriye Juri Ratluke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEWHDgvt2btJ4mbzKD52wMvg-hZk3z28jfODlyuRU2y4Mau6tH-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had I been younger/drunker, it would have been a great night.
A place for teenagers - not angsty, smells funny, service ok, everything's ok.
Everyone is welcome, which is great, but just be aware that it's what you would expect from a teenage hangout. Do you really want to relive that??","Images":null,"When":""}]

Arrived about 1AM Saturday night and it was just starting to get busy. Coat check, most folks in streetwear, some harnes and bare chest later in the evening after dancing. Mostly gay on Saturday night and was pretty full. A few women also attend with gay friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Breno Costa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqf668FP3jTTPE3zlDCAyNimHbM8OiYSVImsVcSnXqWJeMgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The place is big and the music is a mix of techno and tribal, nothing to complain about the facilities, but I hope never come back to Kluster again!! It was my first time there and the security guy grabbed me really hard by my arm inside the bathroom and took me out the bathroom.. I think they were close the bathroom but I didn't realize it as there were many people and loud music, plus I dont speak Spanish very well. And worst!! After grab me hard he started threaten me in Spanish and I didn't understand a thing he was saying... I wanted to leave the club and call the police because he was very aggressive, but my friends convinced me to stay and forget it. I don't really recommend you guys to go to this place if you dont speak Spanish,  the securities are very aggressive and sure they could hit you if you dont understand what they are saying. Hopefully I wont have to come back to such unrespecful place. Reservamos el sitio con barra libre, pagando casi 50 € por persona, y aun así el servicio fue pésimo. Éramos menos de 80 personas —ni siquiera llegábamos a 70— y, aun así, el alcohol empezó a acabarse a la media hora. El ron se agotó rapidísimo, el refresco de limón igual, y al final nos quedamos prácticamente sin opciones de bebida, algo totalmente inaceptable después del precio que habíamos pagado.

Además, la música dejó de funcionar y estuvimos cerca de 40 minutos sin música, lo cual rompió completamente el ambiente y la experiencia. Nadie dio explicaciones ni se preocupó por solucionar la situación con rapidez.

A esto se suma que el local abrió con muchísimo retraso: estaba previsto para las 12, pero no abrieron hasta 40 minutos más tarde, sin dar ninguna explicación ni disculpa.

Lo peor, sin embargo, fue el trato recibido. Tanto el personal como los porteros mostraron una actitud muy desagradable. Hablaron mal, con muy malos modos, incluso cuando no había ningún motivo. En mi caso personal, llegaron a insultarme directamente y a meterse conmigo, algo intolerable en cualquier establecimiento que pretenda ofrecer un mínimo de profesionalidad y respeto hacia sus clientes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Blanca Moreno Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXF2voz1ZzBYrwzb25JHSkh_Qz_1uOJDPWNkbinaQIl9My5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lamentable experiencia. Reservamos la parte de arriba del local para un evento de más de 80 personas, a medida que se iba acercando el día del evento nos iban poniendo más y más pegas, primero que si la música iba a depender del evento que había en la sala de abajo porque eran más y ellos decidían, luego que si cuando terminara la barra libre no consumíamos nos echaban, además, a pesar de que consumiéramos pagando copas nos terminaron echando 3h antes de lo pactado inventándose una excusa, y más de este estilo. En fin, muy poco profesional y unos maleducados la verdad. No volveré ni lo recomendaré.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Max Sánchez Terradas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfzzZgNiF4ZfaBGcKoCTMkxMvIrOxzyq-pnAYaNj5nJiYc6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No reserveis nunca este local para organizar ningun evento, fiesta porque el trato fue pesimo los porteros unos verduleros insultandonos sin razon alguna ademas de haber problemas con el alcohol habiendo cogido barra libre en fin pesima experiencia si teneis suerte nunca piseis este local.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Vvalentas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-op2moHiOWmIjhD2GUlcC0ixgNgUWz-E6D3vbtOsszOOaWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been a bit dubious because of some negative reviews there, however the place exceeded all expecations! The dj's and the place itself - superb!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zack Whye Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzjA3dSdV26TZ6myoNg5iMQw5i-SyzGN5L13dYI5-SBXBHhhE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The one biggest gripe about this place I had, early adults smoking on the floor, which is illegal in Spain. They have a smoking room in the back of the club. But no one cares, no staff stops people from smoking.
If you like some techno with your lung cancer, go ahead. My clothes stank for days.

Here's something for perspective: I told some locals about my experience and they were also surprised that people were still doing it in 2024.

More examples of people just not caring about the rules: one guy asked me if he could take a video with me. We were under the red lights on the dance floor. Their policy is no camera, especially on the dance floor. I asked if that was allowed, just to see what he would respond. He said, yeah it's fine, everyone is doing it. (yes, they all were lol 🙄🙄)

Vibe is subpar. Seems like the locals don't know how to dance to techno. It's always in a circle of friends, mushrooming. Or take off your shirt and swing your biceps side to side. Ego chamber.

There is a girl at coat check, she clearly hated her job. Gave everyone a dissatisfied face, shouts at people. When I came up to the counter, she made this "ugh" face like I'm bothering her (because no one was in the queue). Clearly, she preferred chatting with her male colleague instead. She also yelled at another girl after me because she showed a picture of the ticket. "Pictures of ticket invalid!" (in spanish)

A bartender with tattoos and obviously gyms, makes faces if you order water. Don't bother him unless you want a drink! 3 euros for water is not high enough for profit margin to bother him!

There are reddit threads about this place. I cannot agree more with some of the points and comments made.

I was there for Grace Dahl. But I think I lost 5 years of my lifespan to second-hand smoking.

I will not be back. I don't have photos or videos because I actually followed the rules.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabella Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjdSdBElDzi3AYJaMaFZFxSS5lkUxW9It3eqgZo_NK-fjH5pM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best sessions in Madrid so far. The venue and its atmosphere, the concept and the artists are always on point.
Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roman Alonso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGznRxG-kDFEQLQp7LnYz4z_sZ1g_JwywPvMv07q0XjD-yj1YE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Take a flight to berlin it will likely be cheaper than laster","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mohamed Hisham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7tMXt6zIknEAldP-LDNbhYe-h2F7657mbUx19hXz90wQxeyUMDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best party in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victor Troncoso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOomCGgPULZLVsaESxV-Cnn30_EpWQjKD6ndR9TdgPCYwzCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice techno sessions, big club for +1k people","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Abascal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwT_O7XStV4UhGPCiF9QEb5-9tDi4cp08vsYy45WsfgSZsjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dark, Techno, Open Minded, simply amazing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manu De Hoyo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw2aws1OgTJbuOVb6YglaqZDOJmoDgXKsxo3Zbu1ZZJmqR0qIn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best night ever","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Emre Ç.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKsz5u6GLiyPG4h4yKQwy1ZgaAMDVZu6m_xr1hR-4nQMktM6hG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"WARNING TO ANYONE THINKING OF GOING TO FITZ OR BUYING TICKETS

I had a terrible experience at Fitz in Madrid. Even though I was entitled to a free drink, I was charged €15. First they took my ticket, then they pretended I never gave it to them. The staff were completely inexperienced and unprofessional. To make things worse, there was even a fight in the club that night. If this is how the owner wants the staff to behave, it says a lot about the place.

The only good thing about here is the second DJ was good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvpxogwy4BP5quX5f8EqJc&fid=0x0:0x601c7e8dc4eed195"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Jaqueline Gonçalves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKav2Ms_aW_dfWeCe6iDY6FVcL2Daqnm2glnHz0YlFcXRJe9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just amazing. Fitz it's a very good vibe. Went with some friends and we had so much fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3bQdrDt1T0HT2M2JZk6WJ&fid=0x0:0x601c7e8dc4eed195"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Ana Cwb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ_dVcU7rVWeSDeWt94gQzcy7HeV01eC1D1UY2iBbJmJVOPzYW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I recently visited the club and, upon arrival, there was an extremely long line. In order to get in, we had to purchase a table in the VIP area, as it was clear that priority is given to guests who buy tables. Otherwise, we likely wouldn’t have been able to enter.
Once we were at the table, I ordered a shisha, which arrived without any issues since it was included in the minimum spend. After finishing it, I asked for a second shisha. I made the request to three different waiters, and one of them even told me that the shisha was out of stock. However, after waiting two and a half almost three hours, a group at the table next to ours ordered a shisha and received it within seconds.
At that point, I questioned the waiter again. The situation was extremely unpleasant and felt like negligence and prejudice. We are women, we had paid around one thousand euros for a table, and it seemed as though he assumed I wouldn’t be able to pay 30 euros for a shisha. I never asked for anything for free only for something I was fully willing to pay for.
I eventually had to ask a man at the neighboring table to place the order for me. Only then did the shisha arrive, and I paid for it without any issue. This was an embarrassing and completely unacceptable experience.
On a positive note, the club’s structure is impressive, the sound system is excellent, and the music is very good.
However, a very serious negative point was the discriminatory service, particularly because I am a woman, and the refusal to sell me a product that was clearly available.
Unfortunately, this significantly compromised the overall experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oscar Hinojosa Landero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp2Ik-lDn475wX573zsxAb6AJ2ttjwUY0Hb7gAuOGAGNhR0kA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My first impression for someone well traveled is that the club has great sound system and visuals. The staff at the door are really cordial and diligent. The male bartenders are super nice but females have a  less positive attitude. In general the audience is 18 -25 max. Music selection is only Latin reggaeton which makes it super local and less international. This to improve 1) International music selection with good bangers 2) Female staff at the bar better attitude. I’m not planning to visit it again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Fernandes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmwfz8Mf1j41IVQTRQMQaA5qmfA4rWTpBr_WkaYd6fThED0VX4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We went to Fitz Club yesterday and had an awful experience. My friends’ phones were stolen directly from their bags while we were inside the club. When we spoke to a security guard, he told us that at least 20 other people had their phones stolen the same night.
One of our friends paid 35 euros just to get in, only for this to happen. It’s truly unacceptable that so many thefts can occur in one night with apparently no proper prevention or responsibility taken.
This completely ruined our night and I would not recommend anyone to come to this club, especially if you value your belongings and your safety.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beatriz Correia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocID84il50KgY8Dv8uYw8Twwn2QDm_wB9fcaFDQ_y4xKLNoMQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very unpleasant experience at Fitz Club in Madrid. Our phones were stolen from inside our bags while we were inside the club, and we later found out that at least 20 other people had the exact same thing happen that night. When we reported it to security, they did absolutely nothing about it.

It honestly feels like a scam that so many thefts can happen in one night without any action taken. There was zero support, zero responsibility, and no sense of safety. A club where dozens of people get robbed in one night and staff ignore it is not a place I would  recommend. Be very careful if you decide to go.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ehsan Heidari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVja9keG5jCsFHsT7pdHV7ldUm4WUaofgGMyoPhdPVeFiAufI6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great disco, huge side . Great DG , lot of monitors and shows , Lot of WC . Great location in the heart of Madrid .  We really enjoyed a lot of. Thanks","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0ChVpMX6EUDoM7Ay0v3TK&fid=0x0:0x601c7e8dc4eed195"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Hanneke van der Linden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIahrrBX-qIjGwOwxlwhEKflApI09FQhjhyNUEhDXrMKH4fbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We paid 55 euros for new years but it was completely not worth it. El ambiente es de clientes de más de cincuenta años,  la música es de los 70/80, tienen orquesta,  la acústica no es muy buena aunque le ponen corazón.  Hay una sala cerrada donde ponen sevillanas. Ponen buenos aperitivos, pasan bandejas de picoteo y hacen sorteo. Sitio tranquilo y agradable.
Gracias","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtWC4tzRiiHGIQKGrzlJK2&fid=0x0:0x7ed868ac02b43959"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Maribel Charmelo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUU9lZKMZE_soeZNMn2Sa72sVLMUeI758rILT1jtmavOBB5bo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Anoche fui a esa discoteca, después de estar más de una hora de pie afuera para entrar, con mucho frío y unas señoras discutiendo por los puestos de la fila, se supone que hacemos fila para coger buenos asientos. Mi amiga y yo nos fuimos a la pista a bailar y y señoras se sentaban pero luego cuando dejábamos de bailar ellas se levantaban y nos cedían los asientos como es normal teníamos las bebidas en la mesa. Hasta que en otra ocasión nos fuimos otra vez a bailar. Y cuando dejamos de bailar estaba un hombre y le digo permiso que me voy a sentar y no se quiso levantar. Y decía que los asientos son libres. Pero y entonces después de estar haciendo una fila para estar sentada. Puede llegar alguien y se sienta y te quedas de pie y con la copa en la mesa? Me pareció de muy mal gusto. En otras discotecas no pasa eso.  De verdad me sentí tan mal. Y un caballero que de caballero no tiene nada.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esperanza Lopez Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItlIDKkOmcJI70fbYO3ikYxu0GbrUwA_ZAVaM0uci0PIX70w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es una discoteca para gente mayor ( > 45 ), pero la música es pésima, del siglo pasado,  de los 70/ 80 incluso más antigua,  y no sé dan cuenta q esa música ya pasó. Aunque nosotro@s tenemos una edad , la música nos gusta de este siglo,  aquel ya pasó.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTpnBAju3Ibp1Y0GOW_HGTcfQ7DWxQvbu5fZtQYFLSpZjDfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un espacio acogedor, buena música, el personal de la sala, súper servicial. Es increíble encontrar los baños de mujeres a cualquier hora de la noche súper limpios y con un olor muy agradable, es de destacar la limpieza del lugar y el trato recibido.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pilar Huelves Ayuso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5Q8rPI9LtyCzgATMmbS-LhLlTXng6KPP2gyukq0KUSHsiMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ayer martes estuve en la discoteca por primera vez,
Me pareció muy bonita,  moderna. Y lo que me gustó. Es que no hay orquesta. A .mi particularmente no me gustan , es como si estuvieras en una boda ...y por supuesto la música 🎶 disco suena muchísimo mejor 👍
La música pusieron de todo , me gusto bastante. Pero por favor más música 🎶 de los 80, 90..de nuestra época...música que  jamás pasará.de moda sobre todo la inglesa, todos más o menos allí somos de esa época.....un ambiente de gente madurita a la que nos gusta bailar y pasárselo muy bien 👍
En ,General todo muy bien. Sólo ese detalle","Images":null,"When":""}]

One of the waiters was very rude because my friend was pushed by him (maybe without intention) and my friend just said be careful and the guy didn't like it. Then, the guy insulted and pushed my friend and challenged him to fight 😡.
Fortunately, a security guy saw everything and came to apologize for his college behavior.

At the end, we decided to complain with the manager and leave the place.

In the claims sheet, we wrote what happened, however, from the nightclub version, they denied the waiter's behavior.

We'll never go back there.

Think twice before going there.

One more thing, our drinks were stolen in a few seconds, we were next to the bar and dancing around and all of the sudden there were no drinks around... and these were not cheap at all...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj2qyWowE&fid=0x0:0xf7254b82d7c33d72"],"When":"2024-4-20"},{"Name":"Marctopus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUF9sbb5ailBcZtwTdcG3AY_BZRXfbIJOkc3L0jSs1KtBQNtHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I was not for dinner but only at the club session a Wednesday night: totally crowded, plenty of beautiful people and good techno-dance music. I'm not an expert in Madrid but I believe this must be a very well known place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMsNHxDg&fid=0x0:0xf7254b82d7c33d72"],"When":"2019-9-13"},{"Name":"Arnald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9pzpCyk-ypFh8AWHt13pv9iNRA-5Y9ZlCyPz5tv2KqJwLdRz7LA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's one of the best clubs in Madrid, amazing venue and amazing sound. I played saxophone at a party there and I totally recommend it if you're looking for a place to enjoy nightlife in Madrid.
SAXONARA","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl25PbjQE&fid=0x0:0xf7254b82d7c33d72"],"When":"2023-11-27"},{"Name":"Thuy Nhi Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9HmthEDoNCBXiYzbgtu12yP11j1vxX20vWnV9VTBBRUVF_GQT1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First of all, we already had trouble entering the club even though we had a table. Secondly, the security inside acted way too self-important. Honestly guys, it’s just a security job — who do they think they are? Especially one guy who kept checking our table even though we were sitting right behind him.

I go clubbing all over the world and I have never experienced such an unfriendly security person. My sister accidentally dropped a glass because someone pushed her. She apologized three times, but they refused to accept it and kept acting overly dramatic. It clearly wasn’t done on purpose.

If you want to have fun here, you either need to spend a loooot of money or you’re better off going somewhere else. The music is good, but overall the place feels very superficial.

We still got drunk, had fun, and enjoyed many cocktails, but honestly it’s not really worth it.
That said, the guards at the entrance were very friendly, and the music was good.

2 stars for the music.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gina Patino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWbT-Q4bcQM8M0jMcJmztDrGu8QhvrPvIP9boldVFvkF5ThKLc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t understand why customer service is so bad in Madrid. I came here for my birthday, and I wanted to have a good time, but there is not caring, sympathy. I bought  a hookah for a table and drinks… someone promised me water. Never came. A Bar tender named Edward, refused to give the water, because he said, I had to pay for everything, even though I was promised for water.
I can’t believe the lack of sympathy in this world. What have we become these days?
Tap water is given anywhere! Especially if I paid for a table.
Don’t come to this club. Customer service is horrible!
Please do yourself a favor and don’t come here! I’m sure there are better clubs, hopefully.","Images":null,"When":""}]

070 Shake concert🌖","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICep4-w2QE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2022-9-25"},{"Name":"Jay Artale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZG8j3Z8JKBVTCdrMjHcId6SG9Ac6UIMT8fqT9VB_hiDTGbdWJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went there to see Thievery Corporation. Only critique would be that there’s no sign outside the place so we weren’t sure it was the right location. Inside it was a bit difficult to navigate in the dim light because of random steps near the bar area. But as far as seeing a band there. It was a great sized location. Lots of places for a good view of the band.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLhsbFkAE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Marcus Bond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwzxEsEU7xc6uJfksl71zcbBuGPUlka6y8kqh2Fvccv1dKCrRTDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great intimate gig venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0XN8Jy71o_NtiYXR4RMTp&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Jason Whittle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWucP4xYJaQIyfaM98cSZjbmnGyhsWj_5N5cehl7vHGwzLAcg2dQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent music venue with a good sound and not overly expensive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvk-7i9wE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"Josh Pádua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl1biHkeRVeTys3EHdK6wJpYl0cvSh61kkpBb0fkXbd4zoSAk1og=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst experience that happened to me. I was leaving a nightclub with my friends Fernanda and Débora when we were suddenly held under suspicion of stealing 20 smartphones. We were the only ones who were held, and no Spanish or European people were stopped. We asked for documentation to the bouncer to prove they're cops, but they just advised us to go with them outside to investigate. I started a livestream on my phone to document what was happening.

During the investigation, the police touched me and my phone, demanding that I stop recording. My friend was also recording, and they almost took her phone, demanding that she delete the video. It was a humiliating experience, and we had no support from the police who should have been protecting us. They checked our documentation, searched our bags, and checked our pockets. We were clearly not the suspects they were looking for, yet we were targeted because of our race and appearance.

Even though I remained calm and asked if I needed a lawyer, they still held my two girl friends. One of them was wearing a short dress, and the cop was touching her to check if she had phones on her. I stayed behind to demand answers, and eventually, we were all released. It was a traumatic experience, and we were only targeted because we didn't fit the description of the suspects.

I want to use video to speak out against racial profiling and discrimination. No one should be targeted and humiliated based on their race or appearance. It's important that we stand up for justice and equality, and hold those accountable who perpetrate such injustices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRiPW_JA&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2023-4-16"},{"Name":"Игорь Мусорин","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLdhfSG9egsnwXJnTXgFOteAEVCNz_uNKPK_SBtASWtoYHw_TT9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything is fine, sound, light, atmosphere, and most importantly, an excellent program and beloved UDO","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-iu3PeA&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2022-11-26"},{"Name":"Inday Love Daily Living","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_Ec-orR2crLrO258ZdD6fA1iFGccxk5XNbqCqq3-QRS8EOId7aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an unforgettable night at this bar, the perfect way to end our time in Madrid. This fantastic venue offered a variety of halls, each with its own unique ambiance, and the incredible lineup of DJs kept the energy alive throughout the night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP7PSMgQE&fid=0x0:0x24eb987ea2343c8c"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"Maya SL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw2sC_Uw0dP8YCYJ-lPKIPzZfsYvO-99GFHqx4ndlQGVSBJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for a concert. I was a bit hesitant given the mixed reviews but it was 100% worth it. None of us had anything to drink so I can’t comment on pricing and we kept our coats given the bad experience of other reviewers. Regarding the sound, the sound was terrible for the opening act, and I feared it was a problem of the venue, however, the main artists had different equipment and the sound was absolutely flawless. The space is relatively small, so you are as close to the artists as it can be, the caustics are amazing and the energy is through the roof. As a concert venue I recommend it. Only drawback is that it was impossible to contact the venue prior to the concert. The never pick up the phone.","Images":null,"When":""}]

From rock balads to house music, from pop hits to spanish folk, he took us through a rhythm rollercoaster full of unexpected turns.

Felt like I was having a stroke. 1/5, I do not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabella H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRzBUlb6zPM59yGRFy0HcWNluMDfRes9UVfysHFn-JWbfcbA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely the worst nightclub ever and so unsafe! They charge you a fortune to get in and me and my friend both got robbed. Then the staff was beyond useless and started yelling at us. The security was so awful and rude and had massive rage issues. This is by far the worst club in Madrid and so expensive. The only good worked in this whole club was a bartender with red hair. She seems to actually be a genuine intelligent human being. Everyone else, just awful and incompetent. Even the coat rack lady had rage issues. The staff just dismissed me at every occasion stating that I must have just lost my phone because their club is so prestigious... why are you lying? My friend's bracelet got stolen off of her wrist. Please avoid for your own safety and I was very vigilant of my belongings, ive gone to many other clubs which had more people and none of this was happening.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valentin Paul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoyPxEjuxgC7RiaI25vO99-b6Cr70vMmraO2rcYTb1U3DATRKWjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Your classic, middle fancy mainstream club.

The crowd is on average end twenties and moderately chic. Good men / woman ratio. Drinks and entry is pricey, but the drinks are generously mixed.
Fun for a average night out!
35€ entry incl 2 drinks.
One drink around 15€
Wardrobe 2€","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasenko Hal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcL2qvvW5TVChcOAFf1qLka-XwetbMbfFizyMjIsyoMhOMHjLb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff at the entrance was professional. We were in the line for 45 minutes, we reached the door at 12:25 (free entry ended at 12:30) but they wasted time telling stories and holding the line so that 12:31 would reach and we would have to pay. They were so mean and so inconsiderate. The honky tonk itself is top notch","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Enrique Bermudez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3pmj5LHAsFK7y0mhef3wys43MQHwPi_vhK0UE0ZoT37IvEGQJVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must go if you like pubs and live music.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkUfdXu8zZDM_ITlezkgil&fid=0x0:0x3a82de085d18375f"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Nathaniel Sharp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpQkkZPFeMRgCJZR_bcv4hZu_I5zZGjkgujamYS9xxRDqdHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"As non-Spanish speaking tourists, we found this location less than ideal for a fun music experience. However, for avid Spanish rock-n-roll fans, this place could be a haven. Keep in mind that conversations might be challenging due to the excessively dark basement and overwhelmingly loud music. Additionally, seating options are limited as there are no proper chairs in the basement. Instead, you can make do with sitting on the boxing around the pillars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJmdqOJA&fid=0x0:0x3a82de085d18375f"],"When":"2023-6-30"},{"Name":"José Ángel Morente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl5QkpHkXVqi3fwjjgtZ8i3TURmL8Weycn9ZZENi8IbhDK4E9B1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Honky Tonk is one of the last live music clubs remaining in Madrid.

Almost every day of the week you can go and see nice local bands performing both international and local rock classics as well as funk, blues and soul.

El reservado en cabina merece la pena.
Estuvimos en todo momento con total seguridad y disfrutando por todo lo alto.
Gracias !!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMAtMOzhjQZOpOC5SwRbZb&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuHywWGs-6f8Igvns51OszWshXZ8lQpJSoflZBdpUplfaOah_O=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fuimos a una fiesta de breakbeat. La entrada fue barata, 13 euros con consumición. Tardaron en ponernos la copa 15 minutos contados, los baristas más lento que el caballo del malo. Una botella de agua, 5 euros, una estafa. Los puertas parecían haber salido de una peli mala de Tim Burton. Bordes y antipáticos, estuvimos esperando en la puerta 10 minutos por la cara, la sala no estaba ni medio llena. 3€ por salir a fumar, atraco tras atraco. La música se escuchaba decente.
Eso si, la fiesta de breakbeat el mejor ambiente, por la fiesta, no por la sala.
VIVA ANDALUCÍA 💚","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Inés de la Paloma Povo García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9BqJ3-yoZI6mhpbdIK4eHl-uoASDRlQlcgFfN_Z15XfHp0MX-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Aunque la sala era bastante pequeña, el ambiente era bastante cómodo y el personal de staff era muy amable y se preocupan mucho por el bienestar del cliente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAf6pQXH20DyPuVPuNTkeZ7&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Guillermo Recio Rodríguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGfLygJgeN7_66uBQgQTI5XvJkZi5LXVQ0UOVPSBmgAKUcmybxjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hay bonos de cerveza o refrescos y de copas que están entre los 15 y los 25 euros por 3 cervezas o refrescos o 3 copas","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1AO8Qmf1KqOgafdPfptua&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Nastasi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcn-OLKT_yNryFbvXuBPDIWCBlN4wcaM5a-n6oQYD7MHbR-P8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un club my simple que juega con los efectos de la luces y es perfecto asi pa mi tambien por la vibra,los suenos. merezca una noche de fiesta!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9J7sCpB97F_Vokj4hIJp6&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Noemi A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsNPPhIeDSjCEaHh1hZfvR5ZvtPGczhUwXZEsLszoDMuizQc-o0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estuvimos en una fiesta rewind.
Llevamos entrada anticipada con consumición incluida, para acceder, hay que esperar fila.
En general bien, con gente pero no agobiante.
Disponen de ropero 3 eur.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIt_agAg&fid=0x0:0xf68cedbeddce58f4"],"When":"2025-4-13"},{"Name":"Sara D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGU0Jkz5vMIz9RuCP8N6zRNJdLeOxJIlSZLfMFTo0-9POTJiSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Fui por el cumpleaños de una amiga. Ofrecen reservado gratuito en el mes de septiembre para los que cumplen, eso está muy bien, pero tengo que decir que es el primer sitio en el que pedí un vaso de agua y me lo negaron. Se supone que es obligatorio 😱","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatiana Beltran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwyaDQCjyS1gKWwlAzDlez6tq4acT17V4E7RHFtwGW5g5J4GRr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fui a un evento de UnderHell en NEXT Clubbing y la experiencia fue muy buena. El sonido y la curaduría musical estuvieron excelentes, se nota una propuesta bien pensada y con identidad.

Hay algunos aspectos a mejorar: el agua cuesta 5 € por una botella pequeña, lo cual me pareció excesivo. Los baños estaban limpios, pero no tenían picaporte en la puerta, así que no se podían cerrar desde dentro, lo que generaba cierta incomodidad e inseguridad.

También cobran 5 € por salir y volver a entrar, lo cual considero excesivo. Aunque el lugar cuenta con zonas de descanso, a veces es necesario salir para reducir el estímulo sonoro y tomar aire de verdad, especialmente en eventos largos o intensos  a veces no se trata solo de salir a fumar.

A pesar de esos detalles, es un lugar con una muy buena propuesta musical y volvería. Sería ideal que revisaran estas condiciones para mejorar la experiencia general.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Thomas Wash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRxmlkQT3DUwBxteWKWgjWQDFs78O__UaEfvj_ANXeBRhEojM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The area looks a bit posh but it is generally a chill club. if you are into hip hop go on sundays the music is amazing. the only problem is that you may see some people that look kind of sketch but from my experience there is nothing to worry about. there is not a whole lot of places to sit so if you go be prepared to stand or dance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shelaia Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILFRkET1jpTtkoBxiYzM6mbnlO0gKtdFJU9BExqEzsnutyYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Saturday has Great music!!! Hip hop, old school, Dance Hall, and Reggaeton! Upon entry you get ur tickets for ur drinks and the bartenders were very attentive at the bar. You can buy a hookah/shisha for the night for about 20€ and somebody comes to refill your coals throughout the night. What great fun !! I might even see you there!!! 😉","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQ_NLz23KeoHqyvvrxz7t76c7gnlNCKXOF3cTZF5Rl3DNxyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"AVOID! THEY PUNCH PAYING CUSTOMERS HERE AND THEY SELL FAKE ALCOHOL.

A group of three of us went here for what was meant to be a chill night out in Madrid with some good drinks and music.

Unfortunately, the experience was anything but good. We were accused of not paying for the bottle of gin we had ordered, at which point the waiter just took our drinks away. Upon trying to calm the situation down, and realising that maybe we had made a mistake, we paid again. Sadly, although we believe that we paid they never gave us a receipt so we had no proof. In trying to just continue the night and have a good time we paid again. The waiters and security however all continued to be incredibly hostile. We attempted to apologise over 6 times, and tried to shake hands to show that we did not mean any harm but the waiter kept acting hostile and not accepting our apology.

About an hour and a half before closing, one of the waiters then came and just took our shisha away. When we questioned why he took it away he just said they were closing, which we knew to be a lie. We asked why take our shisha then and not any of the others on the other 3 tables that had them and again he came up with some nondescript reply and then proceeded to call security on us, who then proceeded to kick us out of the establishment.

Again, trying to be polite and not wanting to look for trouble we left willingly but wanted to try to diffuse the situation. After all we didn’t do anything wrong, and we just don’t need that kind of negativity especially when all we wanted was to go out and have a good time. As we were trying to calm things down before leaving, the security guard assaulted one guy in our group by punching him square in the chest and winding him completely. The punch mark was red and visible for hours after. There were 9 of them threatening to beat us up, and only 3 of us (1 girl & 2 guys) trying to remain calm and respectful. Not wanting to start a fight, we left and instead we were followed for about 10 meters down the road by their biggest security guard.

To make things worse the alcohol that they sold us (a bottle of what was meant to be tanqueray gin) was most definitely a bottle of fake alcohol. We only managed to have 2 small glasses of it each before they aggressively kicked us out and we were all horrifically sick after. We hadn’t been drinking prior to going to the club, so it does not make any sense how 3 fully grown adults were so ill after 2 small drinks.

The people that run this establishment are a disgrace to humanity, they should not be allowed to represent Spain and Madrid in such a way. They were menacing and hostile from the get go.

When there are so many places to go and dance and have a good time, you do not need to go here. Serrano 41 should not have a license to operate. They treat their customers like they would treat criminals, if not worse, and they sell fake alcohol, which if mixed incorrectly could kill someone.

Absolutely disgraceful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MARÍA GÓMEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7fQnSQlhDXXzboHcUKZ6KPHBAQfogfr3nJ8k9zAUN-JpnwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Awful. I've been living in Madrid for many years now and this club is the worst I have ever been in. The line to enter is crowded, unorganized, and filled with minors carrying fake IDs. To skip the line, we paid 100€ for a "reservado" (supposed to be like a nice table with a couch and a bottle of alcohol) (we were 4 friends). The bartender gave us a tiny tall table in the middle with a side seat (we had to sit with people that hadn't paid at all) and brought us Gordon's Gin (6€ bottle, cheapest you can get) and 10 sodas. Absolutely A WASTE of money. The music was techno and latino, the crowd was very young (16-18) and there were a couple fights between drunk teenagers.
Never ever going to this place again.

[{"Name":"Lucia iñigo jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAgKWy_02I7qKTLZm9xK0JC-D_2zdbmog8shGEh1DyWdPoU7YBGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebre mis 25 cumpleaños y fue genial. Los trabajadores muy amables y atentos, nos ayudaron en todo momento. Llevamos comida y bebida propios, para unas 50 personas, en todo momento nos ayudaron y facilitaron las cosas. Pusimos nuestra propia música y los altavoces funcionaron genial. Hasta pude hacer algunos juegos con mis amigos. Lo recomiendo!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marti Martínez Solís","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZ5WbiMB6Qwa0J77Is1kxspdACHEv5H1Ns7fSmddaBwL0r_uFJcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"muy mala experiencia, nos cambiaron del local el mismo día y llegamos y compartimos con otro grupo y NADIE NOS DIJO NADA, los camareros maleducados, desagradables e irrespetuosos, el de seguridad no hizo absolutamente nada en toda la noche más que poner pulseras random a todo el que quisiera pasar.
Nos robaron 3 abrigos, bolsos, llaves, auriculares.
Nada recomendable, lo pasamos muy mal, decepcionante totalmente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JUCAR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgCf3JC69xuhu9yZmemjqTwR8HbHHzyTeO6viOZdbSwLhicdc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Celebración de 18 cumpleaños, Elegimos catering, muy bueno y llevamos nosotros la decoración y música. Todo fenomenal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEO_bj-um0Nq1gwE&fid=0x0:0xa46ff4a7f6397489"],"When":"2025-5-16"},{"Name":"Juan Juan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLej_CuUZ6z-FH3haar3mPOCGi2RPCuOVsrS1_2C87ph4JR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Vaya mojón colega.

Ropero sin perchas.

Personal insoportable. No te dejan estar fuera hablando tranquilamente y tampoco te dejan estar afuera con una copa en la mano (aún estando a 1cm de la puerta)

El baño de chicos no tiene puertas y la cisterna está rota. (Pasa igual en el baño de chicas)

Serio que la peor experiencia de mi vida.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rosa González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW29yMgRmdxx_i38RmRtkk4OFcrt2WaJr2_Be-FGlw_WoCim_6ITw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El sábado fue mi cumpleaños y me hicieron una fiesta sorpresa, lo pasamos genial, un trato increíble de todo el personal, en todo momento están pendientes de todos los detalles, el catering riquísimo y abundante, la  música variada y un buen ambiente. En definitiva, recomiendo este sitio para celebrar cualquier cumpleaños o para pasar un rato agradable con amig@s. nosotras repetiremos seguro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEycnarAE&fid=0x0:0xa46ff4a7f6397489"],"When":"2018-2-6"},{"Name":"Fernanda Griton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnLFMsQG7eu5Y81KMZMe_4znlGzJxJnRvB7ZzxzUyR-1h9NA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ya no doy cero estrellas porque no lo hay pero es la peor Discoteca de eventos que he pisado en mi vida no hay Ayre Acondicionado está pésimas condiciones, los baños está sucio las tapas del 🚾 se caen ni siquiera hay cadenas del batee  El Ayre Acondicionado no funciona estábamos empapado ya podrás imaginar no lo recomiendo muy cutre","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"gadea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbhQQKbjfSUV9tEBVEySs5u2OIHQwu1lsY0MjscKUh4-_jyE4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Si pudiera poner 0 estrellas, lo haría. Nos han estafado descaradamente. Prometieron un DJ y no había ni música decente, solo una playlist cutre. Dijeron que habría bebidas ilimitadas, pero ni de lejos, nos han timado con eso también.

La sala es enana, mucho más pequeña de lo que parece en fotos, nos han metido como sardinas. Los baños son un auténtico desastre: ¡ni siquiera tienen puerta! Una vergüenza total.

El personal, de lo más antipático y desagradable, parecía que nos hacían un favor por atendernos. Pero lo peor ha sido el dueño: cuando intentamos contactar con él para solucionar los problemas, apenas contestaba y, cuando lo hizo, estaba claramente drogado. Un comportamiento impresentable.

No caigáis en la trampa como nosotros. No merece ni un euro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iskander Brull","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUe3mCaAyWFt_tX3CtG4eSqW-BU0T45ZAmL6gh9WCtIkfQvQkRo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ayer alquilamos el local para hacer una fiesta de aproximadamente 60 personas.
A pesar que los trabajadores que estaban allí fueron bastante dispuestos hubo muchos errores que no son admisibles cuando pagas 53€ por persona: el cóctel de baja calidad y muy poca cantidad, después hablando con el responsable de sala nos dijo que faltaron por servir 5 platos pero que no los habían traído y no podían hacer nada. También teníamos contratado barra libre durante un tiempo y bebidas tan básicas como Cocacola Zero o cerveza de barril no había y tuvieron que comprar latas y servirnos latas de cerveza. Los baños sucios desde el momento en que entramos a las 21.30h.
En conclusión, no recomiendo a nadie alquilar este local por el precio que solicitan además de hacerte pagar en efectivo la cantidad integra de toda la reserva a excepción de una señal de 400€.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Daria Zhyvchenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIkJehRRXyn4k0k9oWxVb6SZ5ODvmwPaCyEwNSvb5GMNWsXjM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you like salsa o bachata, you Mustang to go there. It was cost like deposit,  you pay for 8 euro and you can buy some drink at the bar. Personal is good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsiv7K8QE&fid=0x0:0xfc6148fb6b4bf68"],"When":"2020-1-28"},{"Name":"anvolu 77","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLn1zjbait716B-SND_ImA5WX9ObCtq2q7OiOhC39rlIz8cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"From the various times I have been there it is a pretty nice club to visit. It has plenty of people almost every weekend but never too many that you can't move. Drinks and prices are what you could expect, maybe a bit positively cheaper. Have to mention too that it is worth it going and waiting for the queue early as the first 50 people get a discount or sale, usually one more drink for the price of two (3x15).
As with every other club you might or might not get lucky with the DJ, they are usually ok and they change so that you are not stuck with one you dislike.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sil Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9bFG3Pn36wPCon_ZB58u-RgcQfTlxI7eI1jpLXKaLw-w66COn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went there on a few a Sundays for their bachata and salsa workshops. Nice location and facilities and not too crowded for socials which is great.

Just for awareness, the dancers’ average age would be over 40yo.

Annoying that they only take cash to get in!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emilia Sokolowska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoIAsw0F80LimRjNsu4dgc4xNckiO3Np-dRQcu8TTK5SM5xiE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The salsa workshops were super nice but I feel bitter about the entrance experience with a rude lady who charged us twice the amount that we were apparently supposed to pay, with a bad and unwelcoming attitude.
There were many old suspicious dudes around trying to dance. What saved us was meeting a friend there but I'd think twice about going back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Magal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVt8zx2vKpPJnojyGDmOlppzNejl-4MaObbuXaZVqhvsDtHsws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had seen better places for dancing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sam Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILxEydTVPkorIzYT5k2NJwA8eQkEshElxiUPzQtwT8YoG8-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Would give a 0 if I could, this was the worst clubbing experience I have ever had. As a guy with an earring I was forcefully removed by 2 bouncers and not allowed back in until I took it out. I asked why I couldn’t wear it and they said it made me look gay. This is absolutely disgusting and shouldn’t happen in 2019, absolutely do not recommend going here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matan Blatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVa15icoVG9hmqRcM7LVc31wkuLevbUh-UEjvdY01zC5brCtCTFlw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The acoustics of the place could be better. It's a very loud place. It was very crowded.
The music was very diverse. I was expecting more Bachata music because it was an after festival party of Bachatea congress.

Unfortunately, my bag got stolen (I didn't put it the personal stuff storage). Lots of people left their personal belongings where I left it.
This never happened to me in any other Salsa Club in USA/Europe. There are no cameras in the club and it seems the selection was not tight enough","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Egon Balliere","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUT5av9JkcW9Ge7MWQi3T6fhFhwkOzzRL2R1oOauuVAg_9gWutl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was a nice place to go out, we went on a neon party night it costed 12 euros with 2 drinks inclusive. But it felt like we were the only foreigners in the club and it was 80% of the time spanish songs.","Images":null,"When":""}]

B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaoIi8jTjfEhyvzj75xx57QOSWgm0veap_8hKnmybx7a-UKex7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Cada vez va a peor, ahora te sirven el alcohol a cuentagotas, l@s camareros son antipatic@s, me imagino que es debido a la explotación laboral... Gracias por terminar con lo poco que queda de los bajos de Aurrera","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"soy heys","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKp6hxkll0zNYgH7A8yPLFc2Jb9gg0VhTM7oiZxAWX8AiZOyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La sala está bien, con muy buen ambiente y futbolín y billar gratis. Las copas lamentables, servidas con dedal (literal, con medidor). Pero lo peor, sin ninguna duda, las nulas habilidades sociales de la camarera rubia, que no podía ser más desagradable y estúpida (no tiene otra definición). Y no es que tuviera un mal día con nosotros, porque era comentario generalizado de otros grupos de gente. Si no es familia del dueño, poco sentido tiene que la tengan de cara al público…","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DogFame","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw1qvqwX7AN1dNB2OfbG0TxL0Uvnqcj4ztyXqgxcZrcRtSRx9vXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El nombre es una trampa, que nadie vaya a pensar que si deciden ir, van a escuchar una sesión de postpunk de la Movida madrileña (Parálisis Permanente, Décima Víctima, Derribos Arias, Aviador Dro, etc.) o un oro viejo rockero (Ñu, Leño, Mermelada, Coz, Asfalto, Siniestro Total, etc.) Las cosas claras desde el principio! Los puertas invitan ya a que unx no quiera cruzar la puerta paradójicamente pero si decides hacerlo pq no te importa tirar 7 euros al río Mnzanares, la experiencia de cliente es tan negativa con el personal de hostelería q solo te quedan ganas de q el ridículo dedal de alcohol q sirven por copa sea cicuta para acabar con tanto sufrimiento acústico y ambiental. Ah! Y eso de ir limpiando la sala es una utopía. Nosotrxs tuvimos casi q salir con una radial para q se nos despegaran los pies del suelo. VERGONZOSO de la R a la A. Cambien el nombre al menos y llamen a su local “Suciola” o “Sala TodoMal”.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paloma Ferres Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXko5MkSRqmyM7bWoMVEzeWIy2NU1yRNf0qzYr98cyZaZ053ND7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen sitio para tomarte algo. Excelente música y ambiente tranquilo. Volveré.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-mviFvAE&fid=0x0:0xcb2d8af0c4454329"],"When":"2022-11-1"},{"Name":"Alfredo López Lozano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfFCY3gYq_lutFS45RSCdVOhJUoCQVGRDtZgG39avLyARjgUPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Buenos camareros la música empeorando por momentos, no vuelvo más,
