[{"Name":"Allison Escobedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJHF7euMSZ_ZcNl8xZ_mSbygcp6M1ozCOZ2wz5E31ftf4VWUZpmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went with my friends on Halloween. Great music! The venue is a little small, people were leaving after 4-5 AM. Great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbvICMCA5ApUJ7nG7l8Rkg&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Tatiana Indge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4BTJ9qwlsvoPiTGVV6UBxtFRi8GkjIm2hW9PyGixksTloEuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's a fun place with great music. Very popular, so gets very busy. Outside around the club can catch a good deal, for entrance, drinks and free shots. Smoking is prohibited inside, but there is shisha (cachimba in Spanish). Not least important, can pay entrance with visa card.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk3uH4MQ&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2018-6-10"},{"Name":"Amine Tbaik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0PBmcC4qO1zNc2-gQ0iotVvNxEllBIKDLCAz7cG2AT56RKeqD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The good things about the club:
It stays open until 6AM unlike other clubs they close at 3
The dance area is so perfect. The size is perfect. Not toooo big not too small, THE PERFECT size
Clock room = 1 euro
Entrance to clubs in madrid has a common system between all of them: no free entrance, you buy a ticket and the price for it depends on how many drinks you want. For this club entrance 12€ for 1 drink
If you want 2 drinks i think the price is 18€, so it gets cheaper.
Stuff and bouncers are so nice.
Music is awesome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDMiJT_vQE&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2019-12-14"},{"Name":"Tom Harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIw7OkTCVG7Ud-QHdpiFQgGx6S4n5xN1wRzNp8sbRMK4JQ-vA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The club is the definition of a scam. The poor waitresses will need to try and justify the transaction went through but I have a transaction receipt for the first charge. Even when you show them the duplicate receipt with video evidence of you not leaving the bar management will deny double charging you. How sad they are. Please do not visit a bar that will try and use their countries poor technology as an excuse to scam you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Foltinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOadvoxBQIggTctfufPf1Vej1yx8qMg4jxpzYXfjKRFkVZbvKq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I know that this isn’t the club’s fault, but they should know the type of clientele that they have partying at their club because I got spiked by a man on New Year’s Eve. Thankfully, I was with my friends and they helped me get home safely. But it’s really scary and they think they know who it was we think it was a man who was trying to grab me the whole time. I have absolutely zero memory of that half of the night, after I got spiked.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisette Mazon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2P9vGyaQcmy0MBzz3CfmNdx_8Q2J50773UqTARzwDzPVMCg0d=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible service. Bartenders are rude and make you feel that you’re inconveniencing them when you ask for a drink. My friend’s phone and two other phones were stolen all within 15 minutes and the staff claimed to help but were not doing anything about it. We had to call the police ourselves to get a handle on things. Do not go to this place! Save yourselves!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"O Sow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXY5VAOaT91gwC828G_xr-dsrEGqVwjWhN3ozfUJAzO4jCGbCNk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sara held us down and was amazing host! Dope vibes if you are looking for a nice place with good Afro beats music","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Taliesin Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk9j7A4SgR2qhukRxWVc3kkKiCby2Wydr6SxNkKGGX8o4UgJq4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Acting as promoter for Samsara, Wolves Tours represented a promotion at least 5 times as "Buy one drink get two 'free' drinks" (a shot, and a full-price drink) - I was charged full price by Samsara for 2 drinks *and* the bartenders did a routine where one pretended not to understand *took a ticket* and the second bartender that "interpreted" *took the other full price ticket*","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENLf2qfpqLqRFQ&fid=0x0:0x9c42021986cb18e4"],"When":"2025-6-4"}]

En ella es posible disfrutar de noches de flamenco los martes, conciertos los miércoles (ambos días con música en directo) y un ambiente propio de una gran discoteca los fines de semana. Los fines de semana se llena de hombres y mujeres con ganas de hacer nuevas amistades. ¿Lo mejor? La situación, en plena Castellana y a poca distancia de muchas otras discotecas. #MadridMola","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glayne Bax (Skryabin)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyuJscbDdNcVmVTVW_QemY8CUbBgJ3PpReGAQLqHVeI1UVR2Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Sitio para gente madura, sobre los 40 de media aprox. No está mal, el ambiente no es de lo peor y los porteros son educados. Las copas no sé porque no bebo, y hace tiempo que no voy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Isabel garcia yuste","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYKJWgeT40bX5CvYOu_ndhjiheJLa5nRe0XEgTiJFhmZy-vwY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mi experiencia en Marmara nefasta, despues de ser cliente asidua ir a este sitio durante años, resulta que en la puerta responden prohibiendome la entrada y tratandome poco menos que como una delincuente.

Creo que los buenos sitios se distingen del resto por su trato con los clientes, eso le da caché a un sitio, y no prohibiendoles la entrada.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JM T BRICH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXA3uCAtKCkwmMb0so8wpArE4DO6_rhT2wzFrlRKwrEcgkKQTkZPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Discoteca, si se le puede decir así a este local a una planta bajo la calle, pequeño y sin ningún atractivo especial.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ben Rad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz9yaWGQwyt2cma0-UadpLaZU7JEikiuTfe08s17YwGlpMoJJ0Jg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is AWESOME! The main area is open and inviting, with a stylish bar to accompany it. In the back, there's a smaller room that they filled with smoke, making the strobe lights and EDM feel like something out of a dream. Finally, the graffiti all over the place brought a unique urban feel to the whole place. Not sure how I feel about the panda spraying people with a watergun, but I won't deny that it was pretty hilarious. Definitely not my last visit to this club!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk8Y3P5AE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2019-6-19"},{"Name":"Oliver Barnes-Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVriX6nqCT074-fjGa1UhYcLZ9B_T04mRqin32ek-KyAVuk28w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you want to experience what it was like to go to a dodgy small town club in the 90s, go here. This is just the type of place you used to find in a town of 20k people, far away from a city.

However they seriously wish this place was something special.

There's literally more "VIP" areas than there is dance floor. Which as a result means most of the club is empty, because nobody is in them, while the tiny dance floor (the size of your livingroom) is overcrowded.

This warm 200ml Pepsi (with nothing mixed with it) is €8!

There are so many better places that don't wish they were more. So go elsewhere.

On a positive note, if you're driving, there's a car park right outside the door. Handy when it's raining.

On a more negative note, most of the staff seem to be bored out of their minds. Presumably because nobody is buying drinks.

On a positive note, there's literally never a wait at the bar... Because nobody is buying drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBq8bx9gE&fid=0x0:0x787f6ae80a92980f"],"When":"2023-1-29"},{"Name":"Christian Boustani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLntBYx98R3HchmX-6vGqWM5jLYKx1wrLeapquM6cqsodlu9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the worst club I’ve ever been to. THE worst. And i’ve been to a lot. The guards were absolutely AWFUL to us. We got free QR codes on the website and they wouldn’t let us in

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carlos Zapata","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlGTvo5YV5HakvUbz4t4fNPBaQaTNtoeP7F3stZD0GBAZX1jztMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un lugar espectacular para disfrutar de la vida nocturna latina en Madrid. Desde que entras, el ambiente te atrapa con su buena energía, luces vibrantes y música variada: salsa, vallenato, reguetón, bachata y tropical, siempre con la mejor selección para no dejar de bailar en toda la noche.

Lo que más destaca es la atención cercana del dueño, que se preocupa porque todos pasen un buen rato, algo que hace la experiencia más especial y auténtica. Además, tienen buenos tragos y unas picadas deliciosas para acompañar la fiesta.

El horario es perfecto para los que buscan rumba larga: de jueves a martes de 22:30 a 06:00.

🔊 Buen ambiente
🍻 Buenas bebidas
🎶 Música latina toda la noche
🙌 Excelente atención

Sin duda, un sitio recomendado para vivir la verdadera rumba latina en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHnooUu_pJPSbRfavaDsF7&fid=0x0:0xa442d56fe1c2a01c"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"CAROLINA HERRERA HENAO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILfhfmEL3YtKTJEmKosccjfrvrbFHXOqGth5s2HtqOESkNPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente atención,  muy buen sitio para compartir, buena música, ambiente agradable, comida deliciosa, recomendadisimo 100%","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDN_ujnNQ&fid=0x0:0xa442d56fe1c2a01c"],"When":"2024-1-22"},{"Name":"Yuzu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmPe_rEcwwCYkdJkBI4IkhuZ7gg361TuLE0Lkmv2HI0sD65wjl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La primera vez que entré, me pareció bastante decente. Claro que hay un pilar en medio que obstaculiza un poco la vista de la sala completa.
No sabría decir, pero hay más gente adulta/mayor que jóvenes, por lo que el ambiente es un tanto distinta.
Si no fuera por los que cuidan afuera, no lo encontraríamos así que *preguntad* siempre que podáis.

Solo espero ver a más gente joven y darle más vida con música más actual.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfon Cuadrado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXM1EAsOHqfaX5AY8rGx7HHH8BJurSZKqTF-euFT2EXH2e5TUUf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reservamos para una graduación el local, en concreto la parte de abajo. No nos dijeron q tenían que entrar personas externas porque el baño de hombres está ahí. Y además el aire acondicionado estaba roto. Arriba se estaba genial, pero abajo era un infierno.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"cristi_102_","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTBlp3_PHTkeAD-6Iz-4Zzz8sw8kAlw4H-pN7By8RJw8fsfLy8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reservamos para una graduación y nos reservaron la parte de abajo "exclusiva" para solo gente de la graduación. No nos comentaron que los baños masculinos para todo el local estaban abajo por lo que entraban desconocidos todo el rato. Y encima no nos dijeron que se les había estropeado el aire acondicionado. Hacía muchísimo calor q era insoportable, y arriba si funcionaba perfectamente.
La próxima vez estos detalles se podrían avitar para q elijamos si queremos reservar o no en esas condiciones.
Por no hablar de que quedamos en un precio con barra libre y unas botellas en concreto y no había todo lo acordado.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel C.a","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiKVjoELM4G1gwHMEAZ6KiN1KBCcgihNLCV88s45jLmrmb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Es un antro, cutre, caro, sucio y peligroso. Nose como la policía no ha cerrado algo así todavía. Los vecinos tienen que flipar con las peleas que hay dentro y luego fuera y el mal ambiente que genera. No volveremos más con 2 veces ya hemos visto bastante.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mel Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXKBfMB2qCLfwOtaw8PcNd9vToC5ADXfVgCoWzFqJHQ1FwAFjs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Es la única discoteca bar que hay por el barrio, quizá por esto es que la gente entra, he ido un par de veces, asusta un poco el aspecto al entrar, por lo oscuro, los baños tienen lo justo, no he visto peleas o algo parecido, también es que no estuve mucho tiempo, era plan para terminar la noche e irse a casa, esta sitio es para latinos, música colombiana sobretodo, los precios de las copas son las mismas q en otras discos, en fin.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sergio Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBTvSVqwbI05jD8o7VQVd4e571VpoIfoGYtitGuF1gWoDzag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los cócteles son deliciosos y van muchas chicas lindas, el servicio, 20/10, muy amplio el lugar y hay billar.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jacqueline Bressan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWp1saDTmXzUcZCFg7wX6CnJdCxOHy6pr_U_0aqxUNcZH5tIL1-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No one speaks English there. They’re not mean only about skin color as you can see and other comments, they also treat white internationals poorly.
The girl at the bar with braids on last Saturday was extremely rude.
She doesn’t know basic English and thought my friend called her a b word

She then asked security to remove her from the club simply because she didn’t understand English.

I understand that Spain is not as strong economically as other European countries, and it’s fine not to speak English… but lying and treating people badly?

Don’t go to this club if you’re an international, no matter your skin color. We were American, Italian, and Brazilian — all white - and the treatment was the same. They simply dislike internacional people.

Shameful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emine Mutlu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhHilW_qMLGhmCU8vq0xB7409Ektmlke29xBCEFyft2YfGlG92=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This club racially profiled my friends brother at our graduation party. Before he was even at the front of the line, the bouncers told our group his hairstyle and outfit didn’t fit the “profile” of the club. They said this directly to me and my boyfriend at the front of the line, pointing down the line at my friends brother. When a mixed race woman who worked at the club came out to see what was happening (because I obviously demanded to see the clubs dress code which they didn’t have, and I started pointing out other people in line who were in shirts and jeans) the bouncers quickly stopped repeating his hairstyle as being as issue, but they doubled down that his “profile” wasn’t right for the club because they were “classic” style. He was the only black man in our group, and his sister and our class were there to celebrate our graduation. Once some of us got into the club, it was filled with white boys in wrinkled t-shirts and jeans. Some wearing hoodies, it was obvious the bouncers targeted my friend’s brother. On top of that, one of my friends that same night went up to the bar to ask for a glass of water and the female bartender threw an empty glass at her and told her to fill it in the bathroom. In the bathroom. Don’t support this club, the music is shit, the djs don’t know how to mix, the service is awful, and the employees are either racists or cowards or both. Spend your money elsewhere this place is trash.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Westberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3lkul7R9m5PfcRITeXlV94McZf5G8iUQcbua8YiXY_KchwFf5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went here for the first time; one of my close friends (black American) had her brother visiting. Out of hundreds of people they let in, they called him out and said he didn’t fit the “profile” of the club because of his (btw, incredibly stylish) street wear outfit, despite every other white man wearing hoodies and jeans. Don’t spend your money at this club.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryce Reece","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURad7R_aQJq8-36vIrCCASvkVrWj-GGWfYHGgDhmfVVNKa78Vmkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"club is clearly racist. they have no dress code listed on website but let white boys in wearing whatever but will turn around black men wearing the exact same, even better clothing. much better off going somewhere else","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A Nastazja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgRQnAjZse0YKDzCIM5szSa0sug6pPxsSRfDjjUd6TznTE56U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Racist workers and place. The worst club I have ever been. This place thinks it’s illegal to be a decent human being. Also disgusting and dirty inside. The owner should be ashamed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma Storck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgGiUBnRo7lyZm_bCmDfR8gc9StPP8rLvzzgyrDMN5-4lL70h2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This was the worst club experience of my life. The bouncers tried to snap my friends real ID, and required us to show passport, state ID, and credit cards to enter. When our male friends attempted to come in they were turned away for having sport shoes on while every other man inside was wearing sneakers. Once inside drinks are 16€ each. For this expensive of a drink and with the unacceptable treatment we left immediately and will not be returning. I hope none of you go unless you are looking to have a bad time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenna Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkPtrrsrKPNx0FwX1tNclUem0FRGGw-aKZqDzmU69ziiOfxzGEwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Staff is low-key so rude but I mean the music and the drinks were good I guess","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tilli Weissenberger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXntf8N8dfd9AFvREG0HBdVDQHY_JiXBtDCH5KZC2h4zUI2eRhuuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A nice and clean dance club. Besides we saw 2 fights the same night","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRiL3Nfg&fid=0x0:0xb74aaff9f348f730"],"When":"2023-4-16"},{"Name":"The Woods","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxz3thgMrnvV7OAML4ukeIG1AKMmLHBobZArP2utelogzlf-oA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I didn’t experience the whole “you have to be 25 to go here” business. I bought my ticket online and got in just fine (I’m 24). Fun club, love the face paint and live performances! Definitely a unique experience and something new.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICs_vDE8QE&fid=0x0:0xb74aaff9f348f730"],"When":"2020-2-3"},{"Name":"Sophy Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnqU9RnGOg4nVIy9mhNvmpDQsqXuIEA-O1lzu0MiLnhV4pBA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"€18 entry for a Friday night, very busy with different performances every so often which were good, however not enough variety of music ie hip-hop & RnB. Wouldn’t jump at the chance of going back.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxMv8jxnz7ASqahr3-PwRqTe5w7HLa-RnGUuhUp4tWb_aJ3QdP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I showed up at around 3am to check the place out on a Friday night. Interesting decor and setup. There are also dance performers who were disguised as monkeys and who appear have a good show in between sets, including some gymnastics and ceiling hanging from a steel frame structure. Cover was €20 and included one drink. Shoutout to the barmaid that served me up with a very generous portion of vodka for the vodka soda I ordered.

I was debating between giving three or four stars, and ended up giving three with the main reason being that the sound system quality is (imo) below average. Maybe I’m slightly biased as I would consider myself a semi-audiophile, but I do think that sound quality has a big impact on the vibe in any venue.

Music played was a mix of reggaeton, top 40 and old hip-hop classics.

Cool interior decor, interesting concept
and artistic performance.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan C (danny)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl3gGFKvvwZlqT1q_h6OXdPbRxvOp85zkP9Kt2ecAU6O0hfkWYyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The floating pool is really cool. The Asian decor is popping and fun. Recommended bar","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR5PCgggE&fid=0x0:0xb74aaff9f348f730"],"When":"2023-3-25"},{"Name":"Ltee Olads (LteeMusic)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpAyaqdtqw7nfIA-cP2YkqG_kHTQzG_1UnrpVNI0sFlF8g5Xo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"**Do not attend***Worst experience ever. I was visiting Madrid from the UK and attended with my Spanish friends. Everything was going great before a security violently pushed me without any warnings at all.  I was shocked and I asked him why he did that and he was right in front of my face pushing and been very aggressive. I strongly believe he abused his position of power at the club believing he can get away abusing club goers and getting away with it. We complained to the who we believe was the manager or the appropriate person at the entrance of the club and to our surprise, the lady was defending the security guard and even lied in the complaint form that he was attending to an emergency at the time. To make this clear, if he was attending to an emergency, he wouldn't have not continued to attack me for 3 minutes after he has originally violently pushed me.  Una's Chung Lee, it is important for you to respect the people at attend your club because without them, there is no Unas Chung Lee. Your staffs can not be getting away with violent behaviours under the premise of  "I'm working" according to the security guard. What the security guard did was crime and it is unacceptable.  This incident happened on the 27th November 2022 between 4am and 4.25am. Check your security camera footage inside the club ( the main hall) to confirm this incident. Good Customer experience is important in your organisation and unfortunately, this is not the case at Unas Chung Lee.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tatianna Tonnacliff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNC9dNyPN3eLL5p9SCprfB3WYGOypZ9FM3k93hrhVfufvzQv9hJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The Dj Wasn’t present and couldn’t even see the “shows” felt like no effort being put in, the DJ would leave didn’t even mix songs just played random whole songs like… I was in shock how much of a vibe this place WASNT …. no good songs","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William Rocafort","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdWpDlKcNrw82LMc9WSpvEdP4x5B1Qp0RyttjpWrLJoLmGHmr-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a blast during the reguetton Tardeo. All I would say is if you promise perreo, you better bring it! All I heard was Ozuna and Don Omar, music needs work like cmon now, but place does have a great potential!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamaica Aali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2olQenDcp7iHvIvIQmc5K6hRjZYJHBkwfsXV_jbHph6Z-jP4CXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely a vibe. My girls and I stopped in because a promoter outside mentioned that they played Afrobeats. Sold!  It ended up being a mix of sounds, but they played a few of our faves and we had a great time.

The reviews confused me about what the vibe would be, so here’s some detail. It’s a small but not minuscule club with hookah in the front and the dance floor focused in the back. On a Tuesday we paid a 12 euro cover that included a sugary welcome shot and a drink of our choice from the bar.

The place looks cool—think neon lights styled to say “Black Lived Matter”, a New York theme, and lots of posters of hip hop legends. It was a diverse crowd, but we were among the only Black women.

Certainly not a place with universal appeal, but it appealed to us!  The DJ was raucous, the people friendly, and at midnight things were really just getting started. Before we left we all said, “we’re definitely coming back here”.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mert Yüksel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMNCjW0yj4qdBbhf6x0ytUCdkYIGQAh1ywjgFfzjmYxh2LU6Pa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"That was definitely insanely bad for me. But the interesting thing is that is exactly what they offer. There are strippers inside and lots of people ordering hookah. Drinks are also insanely expensive(5€ for small beer). However, the staff was sooo nice, the music was cool and design of the place was very impressive. I think the place is on wrong hands. It really has great potential but bro……… don’t serve hookah in the club and get rid of the strippers….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-76DX4QE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2022-11-17"},{"Name":"Anna May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3ZM5MvF757Tp1mC19k7maCmFhPiSIxk_8Q6sEqcg820NiHpqY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped here on the pub crawl. We had a great time here. Super cool cocktails the way they are presented and tasted delicious. Highly recommend. The staff were lovely as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv5PitpgE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2024-12-17"},{"Name":"Bojana Chapkunovska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCiWXQ7iQElawD0Prny3_L9glkrCYk8fyVf0sK-ctGBuzuv_o=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The worst club I have ever been to. The smell was unbearable, the staff were incredibly rude, and the entire place felt filthy and unpleasant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeIa32b9UdGQyvgDqCtJXWSKEeIZ1IVQePVAgMDmU6R_SsyvjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Drinks: ⭐️⭐️⭐️
Service: ⭐️
Price:⭐️

It is a place that attracts very weird people. It has go-gos inside (not necessary) and the prices are not transparent. The attention is horrible and they asked us to change places in a forced way. The experience was generally unpleasant. just say that the shisha was not bad.

not recommendable at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpr7r8gQE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2023-8-12"},{"Name":"Volodia Kotylo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuSJBItdVemy9Vqp699KXn10HXVFb8AiFINxM2xe97sPHCjSCF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The club is veerry small. The screen is looping a 3 minutes long clip with advertising of ecstasy and sexy girls. Water is in the glass bottle, there is a small corner where you can leave it while dancing (and hope no one else drinks it))). That were so-so things. Good is your nice vibe, good company, local girls that know all words for Spanish songs. If you want to have fun, you will.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEl7DFxwE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2019-4-16"},{"Name":"Ross Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsXs7EYBfTkHk2IU6BT1dpYixBJB047gPOoIxPtuJKTdIdDiskVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Our first discoteca experience in Madrid. It's smaller than we expected, maybe only 20ft wide, but long, with 3 bars. Cover was 12€ per person but that gave you 2 drink tickets, which was actually cheaper than buying the drinks outright. It's one of the few clubs that opens early. We got there around 10pm and were afraid we would be the only people there. We weren't but it wasn't crowded yet at that time. By 11:30 pm the place was pretty packed. If you're not into the really late club scene but still want to experience a discoteca this is a fun place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDczaO14wE&fid=0x0:0xb49f2b9e7757e8f4"],"When":"2018-6-1"},{"Name":"Bash M.T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5VVzJbaw08qglqJOHSqjFAdkxsd6ObgUZcxLjmUYdhOWL6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst place in Madrid, full of smokers and bad people inside, feels like a cloud of smoke. Avoid it by any chance","Images":null,"When":""}]

We were 10 girls and we were treated with respect at all times. To be honest they treated us like princesses. Everyone was great and the waitress Agustin and Gustavo gave their all to make sure I had a great birthday. I even received a big backet of flowers for my birthday from the lady club owner. I couldn't stop dancing from beginning to the end, we were all possessed by the music and atmosphere. Thank you Kube for making my birthday unforgettable. Me and my girls we had a great night. I strongly recommended this place! 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yavor Atanasov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK71fGt2rjQvd4kuv1JfZgOO60bYSlbrjtVXBYWeMb4OH09nQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It's a chic place, good quality overall. Went for a birthday, ended up being extremely disappointed.
Food was overpriced to say the least. Basic bread will cost you 4.20€ 😂.

Plus, left with a bonus stomach ache.
Never seen toilets so disgusting in a restaurant in my life.

Couldn’t even see the “show” from our table, if you wanna call this a show.

I could say more but I will stop here for their sake. For the same price you can book a faaaaar better place in Madrid. 👎🏻","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lucia brave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC8qg8ynLJaXPz1EQoRsY5o-3GzkAf8coDx2j6IS1yUaInjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing experience from start to finish. The food was delicious, with fresh ingredients and perfectly balanced flavors. The service was impeccable—attentive and friendly at all times. The ambiance is cozy and well-maintained, making the visit even more special. Without a doubt, this is a place I will return to and highly recommend. Thank you for an exceptional dining experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kianyi Norwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYHFjb_UqxxN1ZSSln50uMR46vf0u4KXRffEMm7LP7d7-_5_g81Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came to Marabú on a Thursday night.
The staff was very nice and accommodating to my Spanglish speaking. Lol
The food was great.
I had the seabass.
Overall Marabú creates a very fun atmosphere for their guests.
I came by myself and still had a great time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJib2u6wE&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2023-6-29"},{"Name":"JAVIER RIVAS RONCERO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJclV_FrIpHkszaZ4qFnChtCR8aa38PUzraIuHbFHzB2QGFfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Place to dance and dinner , live performance when you take dinner , average quality food as the service is completely overwhelmed , but it was just simple as a good place and average food quality","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWxrmMHw&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2022-2-25"},{"Name":"karthikeya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSRBGm8F0s6Q5HcTpY65Q1ch067N2Pn-x0PMbIZggh0MrkS8d93w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has a really chill vibe, the best part it has a night club in it too …low-key hidden","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICOweCbGQ&fid=0x0:0xec80372dfa2031a8"],"When":"2022-6-11"},{"Name":"Bla Bla Bla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI9jxWTm9fpviUJMD39NHqDmzh8NGJKF9_CN8D06bWbJiIVFW5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Customer Experience: Not happy at all, sorry!
First of all the receptionist is quite distant and not welcoming at all. We arrived quite early but no one informed us on the dynamics or if we knew there was going to be a live show so half of the table couldn't see the performance while other tables were empty during the whole night. ( Not a smart move ) A drunken girl kept screaming at the bar with her friends but no one took action.
The waitress: She was so rushing on taking the order we had to tell her 2 times to wait, when she brought the drinks and food we almost felt like we owed her an apology, her very bad attitude resulted in no tip at all.
Food: Most of the dishes came in transparent bowls and very little inside, average food quality with discrete presentation.
Venue: Very cosy , well lit and nicely decorated, they have one of the best suspended bars in Madrid.
Price : They brought us the bill before even asking because they had to switch from restaurant to club ( Are you kidding? Who cares?)   Expect to spend about 45 to 50 Euro per person including wine.
Music: Very pleasant Soulful house DJ set + live act.
Advise to management: Train your staff ! It's such a shame we won't get back just because for that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7S19NO51IBz1lkKQAjF5A7A734a98YUTkzcv1KVTWASFNRhF8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to Marabú for the dinner show and was absolutely blown away! The talent is truly one of a kind and I had such a wonderful time. Special shoutout to performer Paula for making this such a special and fun evening!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Charlotte P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsk5NpwW7E2CauOvSEQrXWiTHw26xs_mpZ_xWDIouytr5UdSs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went there a Thursday. Pre class was good even though the level was a bit too high.

Please note that they open almost at the same time as the class is supposed to start. Don't come 25 min early, as I did. The doors will be closed 😆.

15e for entrance including class and a cocktail is a very good price! Wardrobe was 2e.

The staff both in the wardrobe and the bar was really nice. The guy at the bar asked where I came from and made jokes.

Gender ratio was good and the atmosphere warm and welcoming. Many people spoke English and I was invited to dance equally often as I invited people to dance. Nobody rejected me. However, I learned that here people dance only one dance with each person. Where I live, it is two. So don't take this as a sign they didn't like dancing with you.

There was a good mix of skill levels. Some beginners, some improvers and several advanced dancers. Age wise I would say most people were in their 30s or 40s.

The dance floor was big and there was enough space. Was also enough of sofas and chairs to sit on. However, the toilet could have been a bit fresher and with more than one place to dry the hands.

All in all, I had a lot of fun and would be happy to come back again next time I am in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emma’s Log of Places","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5qLG_Ysepae5uFQL2vlJ3AIFGRBJDvhfmBpxLrrVIMjLN-sI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went to get my social dancing kick, cost €15 for entry but also got a free pass for next day! The instructors were very welcoming and kind, spoke more English than I can of Spanish. We were taught Zouk, and then it was a Zouk Bachata social afterwards. Very welcoming environment and nice dance space. A bit sparse of a crowd but we did leave around midnight, on a thursday. So maybe thats on us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb8vCupAE&fid=0x0:0x5eeb31aec1666a2f"],"When":"2024-8-3"},{"Name":"laura Lalla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxfTTlC7kZsfK3ki-WX2wwWX898Z0FtspsFUvQJ3WErO9aY8RS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They write Friday before 19pm free entrance if u share the flyer, but it isn’t true, be careful!!
I arrive on time, i share it and i took them 5 friends arriving later , but it wasn’t enough, they wanna charge me.
Super unfair lady at the entrance. Plus if you are ‘friend of’ you can enter..didn’t like the behaviour. I went to another disco, bigger and free entrance for real, not bullshit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bartek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU39HWrsxuBFcP_DS5J2toaTDDcY-0H88d27Y8vQdXQ8DJPggw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for all the Bachata and Salsa lovers. Music is of a good choice and sound quality is great. You get a drink included in the entry ticket. The room is pretty big and the floor is good for dancing.

Also the are workshop classes before parties included in the ticket. All in all that is a great place, Thanks for the party.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JOSE BORT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt94QnccFDD588CWGw55MsQM1Xb74z5ZPo2NkVxvnW6EdRVJ7m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice club 👌 I would give then 5 start but the fact they only put Bachata sensual took that start away 🤣🤣🤣but if you love to dance sensual bachata style  , you would  definitely love this place 👌👌but as a Dominican I need my bachata to sound like Dominican Republic 🙌🙌🙌🤦🤦but that is just me","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christiana Stasa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwVas7rUqATegJdA27e2T1zArtITdSgG78kgaf6Xojk0Ch6bYe6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was great to dance, the dancefloor was huge! The only downside for me was really not selling proper water bottles. They only had a tiny bottle, which is not enough if you're dancing all night, you have to buy all the time and with the bar being so crowded is actually difficult. I just think water is very important in a place like that and was not expecting that tiny bottle to be all they had.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael McDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVW58KYn-nU2TlLWtoPVpqaieNKN9xr7hrpLIxmXQ1GfLdaSY0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m a salsa and bachata dancer from New Mexico USA. This place is on target and a big version of our best clubs. So many dancers. I felt I knew them all. Traditional salsa and smooth salsa. Totally fun.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Chung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGbfgqfhgK3PI24KRCaNu5vg65tI-zsDUICBiDgkkagt5qkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dancers are very friendly and comfortable to ask to dance. It is like a bar.  Bachata 3: Salsa 1 ratio.  Cove $15 euro with one free soft drink.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"sarah sofvk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJl_-s5PkaVrdW_iroRLjuHnhYgWQYa3mn9ERfVnLsSMuSbRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The New Year's party was fine, but the churros and hot chocolate were disappointing. They started handing out the churros late (around 5:30 am) they were cold and sugar-free, and the hot chocolate delivery was a disaster. They didn't reach everyone and only gave them to people who had reserved a spot, chosen by Mr. Aris. There were places they didn't reach, and people left.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Willy “Sirscribble” Boot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTOxJC-sTnzZ9-pi6KV0z-FALqVs9yui7FVUD3CkgiHWJdO7s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"good music and nice people, but the staff (particularly bartenders) were incredibly rude to myself and other patrons. embarrassing behavior for a bar where people just want to dance and relax, turning it into a stressful experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashton Diercks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3oKUJVS7DjYi-w_krE7q7ac1i4MlEHvC2ugaV6ggOL2UpczY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this discoteca you can dance bachata and salsa here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sofia Vaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6sBAEKCoKl-85ENfsk98G3LLRW0D6bsZc2XfTrlAck_uhtBj2=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GREAT music and energy. There was plenty of space to tear up the dance floor","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nataliia Bondarenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUCWjtqoMCE5FvGzJpZz0G_BeHO5gHzPMF0iZEdi41793dNP-8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Joined a salsa/bachata night here. One of the worst experiences I had and won't return. The place is very small for the number of people they let in. People hit each other dancing, smashing people to walls. It is a mess of people dancing, people drinking, people walking from area to area and people waiting for a partner. Uncomfortable to dance. 3 salsas, 3 bachatas and 1 merenge. The price at the door was 13 euro, which is totally higher than the place deserves. The advantage is the location - stressless to reach.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Robbins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7nNz9rFGelAPhxzC4Q-OML-6fA7rSsl5VJmaigSsasHYsUxAE1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don't normally leave reviews for discotecas, but I really enjoyed this place! I was visiting Madrid for a few days, and I came here on Friday and Saturday nights to dance salsa and bachata. So much fun both nights - a variety of levels of dancers and all were fun to dance with. Overall a very friendly atmosphere. It did get super crowded and impossible not to bump into people! Most of all I loved the DJ - he played all the classics and most popular songs, so every dance was fun. I hope to return to Madrid and dance here again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Naomi Sanft","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLovq7dhgVY32HNaSvT3Z2bER6-PcadHz4mZysrZfbZnD77aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My friends and I were having a great time dancing, feeling totally comfortable with the atmosphere and then it was completely ruined by an employee. One of the staff members, who was completely unidentifiable as such, asked a friend to dance and when turned down, he became aggressive and made up wild accusations in order to kick her out. After a long conversation with the manager, who refused to listen, we decided to leave. We feel lucky that we were in a large group, because as we explained this interaction could have ended very differently. I am disappointed in how management handled this situation. There are many places to dance in the city, don't risk it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clare O'Reilly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWguUOrmj-n-XQoazZe9qusdVnFA9UkrQIBqEMCY3Ai4E4cxYsJ_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Been here twice as a foreigner looking to try out the Madrid dance scene. Nice environment and people. The space is a bit small for the amount of people they had in the lessons. The main guy at the front door is quite rude. I don't speak Spanish and when I asked him if the class was here and at what time, he continued speaking, very limited, to me in Spanish almost brushing me off.  I'm also appalled that water is not freely served from the bar staff. They basically make you buy bottled water. I checked and it's illegal for any bar or restaurant in Spain to refuse you tap water. The older lady behind the bar was very rude when my friend asked her in Spanish and she was clearly talking about us negatively to her colleague when I asked in English to another bar staff.  The same guy from the front security also got involved. All pretending to not understand me in English and kept speaking to me in Spanish showing me a bottle of water. Considering this is a dance space and we're exercising this isn't OK! I understand the need for drinks to be purchased to keep the bar afloat but refusing tap water in a glass water is ridiculous.\n\nBecause of this, I won't be back or recommending people to go as I've been to otherwise amazing dance spaces in Madrid where they do provide free water!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Muy recomendable sus fiestas que hacen y a los DJs que contratan y las colaboraciones que hacen. Sala principal muy grande y bastante bien equipada con luminosos. El sitio incluye ropero de pago extra y tambien hay reservados.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtTEKzeA_CffrLSzbPezpm&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Daniel Alejandro Bermúdez Calderón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMKoH07jGgG1KkSmTjr_opYJqGZleT9YzMTllYiVLJaehVdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui hace una semana con los compañeros de empresa.
Hubo un pequeño malentendido con el reservado, pero por lo demás todo genial.

Los porteros atentos a lo que ocurre y, quizás sea casualidad, no vi nada criticable en su trabajo. Al contrario, estaban presentes y la noche fue tranquila.

La señora de la limpieza es una crack. Estaba en todos lados asegurando que todo se mantenga lo mejor posible.

La pista central tenía una infinidad de vasos tirados, pero eso no es culpa del local sino de la gente.

Tanto los camareros como las camareras fueron muy amables y profesionales.

El ambiente es bueno, y sí, hay gente joven pero creo que cualquiera puede ir allí y encontrar su espacio.

Me comentaron que habían más salas o plantas, pero lamentablemente no estaba abierto todo ese día.

Los precios son lo normal en estos sitios.

Por último, decir que la chica que nos llevó desde la puerta hasta el reservado, Patricia, fue muy simpática, además de ser super atractiva.
Quizás el único punto negativo es que cuando alguien así te acompaña hasta la mesa, después es imposible fijarse en nadie más 😂.

En resumen, sitio agradable al que volveré para visitarlo al completo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Gonzalez Cuenca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIw91VDrraT9lAeUfwk5oLFh5l4nzkrVZYJ-Cg4YASEmOa4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Mi experiencia personal no fue buena. Durante la noche percibí un ambiente bastante tenso, con gente buscando conflicto más que divertirse, lo que me hizo estar más pendiente de evitar problemas que de disfrutar.
En algunas zonas la actitud de la gente no me pareció adecuada para un local de ocio nocturno. Además, la mezcla de edades tan dispares me resultó incómoda y poco apropiada.
El personal de seguridad es serio y firme; cumplen su función, aunque el trato me pareció poco cercano. En general no es un sitio en el que me sintiera segura ni cómoda. No volvería.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUz3xHdRaN9ClAoloces7j&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"E.Alejandra Barrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL93XqHJZ0KSvAT82WqL_hFtqQWrODF_2AcIdimCQJOxBvq3w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hoy se organizaba un evento para menores de edad!! Lo cual en las descripciones ponía que los 100 primeros en pagar la entrada era a 1€ solamente ponía hora de entrada a las 17:30h y que finalizaba a las 22:00h .
Asisten los niños al lugar  a las 17:30 y resulta que había gente haciendo fila , cuando llega el turno de los niños ya con la entrada pagada con el supuesto descuento de 1€ les dicen que tienen que pagar otra entrada que eran 15€ .
Me parece increíble la falta de ética , organización y sobre todo que jueguen con niños de esta manera .
Sobre todo son unos estafadores!! De euro en euro que pagaron varios niños se hicieron su diciembre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgshuAQVzSGgzRoExQUvD2&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Diana Mardach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9PdsFChtU6n0l04GytlFmNP6N-JhPlaEnaddZG_rtRE6R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buen lugar para conciertos excelente acústica y sonido en una zona llena de bares y fácil acceso en metro y línea de buses","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6wo4atpAU3jn9GB57hW2Q&fid=0x0:0x5a0449a706dd8bcd"],"When":"2025-10-5"}]

Toilets were clean and the staff were nice and helpful, they even started up a Beamer to see a football match.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOX_2du1qsODuQE&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"Kenneth Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_XXcqXb7gYDRGJ6dkqV_F5ic9rk-KRF5mDdFKp_n8_jPqdHA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We went on a very quiet rainy Thursday and overall it’s a lovely bar/club with friendly service. The issue we had was the bar was extremely poorly stocked with hardly any drink options available, but the drinks that were available they were good.

I’d love to come back on a busier night to check it out","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Comitale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJe8g3MyFO4sKOfU_SVmLKBltb-9zBWBb1YKcaMrQ00SDxSMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I came to this club on vacation for the first time in Europe. I came to have a good time and I always end up buying at least 1-2 bottles when I go to clubs. I came here and the bar tender was working and gave me so much attitude and did not want to serve me and was giving me a hard time just to get a drink . She made me want to leave and I ended up buying nothing because of the service and atmosphere she created . They should really train the bar tenders to be more friendly and helpful . I also speak English/Spanish/ and Italian so they could completely understand me . I don’t recommend this place .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Ngavaite","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzIJA7GupeCMcbdHVAAcqCE3nYqhzrRr5RuLH05uXeh_BQidw-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Was looking forward to coming here when my friends told me they had booked a table. Took over 30 minutes to get someone to come and ask for the drinks, when they did come over they took one order them quickly went away and this was repeated again. Eventually we ordered our food, I ordered medium rare steak but it was delivered well done. Again paying was then hard to get someone to give us the bill.
Afterwards we went starlight down to the basement for the club and we had a table. Didn’t want to take payment before they gave us the drinks. I just wanted to get payment out the way early on. The music selection was good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRtOr6rwE&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2023-3-26"},{"Name":"Kathy Vela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP0Y8hokaVgI0weyOv8EBGKXJRiGRuJShPUJTJW1PKXX5zMXEMlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got in randomly. The food was extremely delicious: the Paella a la Mar and my drink was: Tinto de Verano. The first was a dish based of rice with seafood 🥘. And the drink was with Vermont, wine and lime juice. If you are not into red wine, it can be this an option. Of course the red wine Rioja was also good. The waiter was polite and cozy. We were there at 5.20pm and it was empty (which i like 😌).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPrOqgWA&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"Square Meters Digital","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxxFaj3y7ywh7eJjx6OD02trgbJhdqauTvYSWypHEVsFn0OngvSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Stay Away! New year's Eve 96 euro entrance and scotch in a wine glass. The place is empty also smells like a toilet. To get our money they were so nice and when we went to ask for our drinks it was watered down . I've been all over the world and this place was the worse . I can't give negative stars. My 4.5 million followers will be watching . Shocking","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf_dLzdg&fid=0x0:0x727f4371f09b5e12"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Raul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDEn6lzHJucGhWaosce3_NsABMGcpB7jA7o4oZk9QNWwvoHOOU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It’s a cute spot.. However, you can’t get a decent cocktail in the club. If you want a quality cocktail you won’t get it here. They want you to buy a bottle. You can’t get a drink made with an alcohol of your choice or a shot. You will be offered cocktails only with bottom shelf alcohol and they only had Heineken as a beer option. Better options in the area for a “club” experience in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItPfxDuUdUqwmz3KhBUQiniKLY132-wf90nZUT4JIH3GMWlA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place is a sham and a rip off. Whatever you do, stay far away. They have people that try to lure you in to the club  for drinks, dinner and music. And when you get inside, no one serves you any drinks after you pay for the entrance and for your first drink. They didn’t have any bartenders at the bar. These people should all be in jail. Stay away.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Johann R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVSE1EdFHQFJyFm_97lU6nOuOW6kG90V1TKBK949C6btMGqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great place to dance and meet people. They play different kind of music. Salsa, merengue, bachata. Also, you can order a hookah.

You can check -in your jackets for €2 euros.
Also, we were warmed by our tour guide to be careful with our belongings. Nothing happened to us but be aware of your stuff.

Three starts because we have to wait 20 minutes to get in and we couldn't get our drink in the bar we were seating, that bar was only for shots so we have go across the dance floor to get our drinks. They should sell the same drinks in all the bars that are inside de club.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICs_PXG8gE&fid=0x0:0xba7ea196e42354f3"],"When":"2020-1-26"},{"Name":"Noelle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8PVohiURSbwECqL_bjVPgf_-IvzoBwDE9AY4CwPasKaj9pdOs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Been here a few times over the years, its fine for a dance with friends. Fair warning - they apparently don’t give you tap water anymore if you need it. Only water you can get is bottled for 4€. Feels illegal to be refused a glass of water.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"miguel jansen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQFlkpPi3PPUAZnkMlxP31f-1Gg6K8BThrcCzLTt95j7n6NQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Employees are rude and disrespectful. There were two guys outside the club trying to get you in who were obnoxious and rude. When in line we were pushed together like cattle. They were mysterious about the entrance fee when we asked. We think we paid more because one of the guys outside told the cassiere that we were there because of him, which was not true and we almost left because of that guy.
Inside drinks are expensive. Music and ambience inside are okay. One star because of rude personel who tries to get rid of your money anyway they can.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daeun Yoo (Dana)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ219hSxI21xsqBc2GPjA0U_ySdAG9RhU69BA7QocRkTC4Wuw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They kicked us out for no reason without even explaining. They even pushed us out. My friends and I were having so much fun inside, but because of this incident it ruined my day. They didn't even apologize. I feel like they are racist. It was the second time and I even recommended to my friends, but now I won't go there again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gergő Danku","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj3DX3S3pKQGSl-iQv4KKJJG3iUFUiH9O0FwCA2I0NHHm_ZhzZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was inside, came out and when I wanted to go back again after 10minutes the bouncers wouldn't let me in. They made fun of me saying go home english, nothing else and told me to pay 50€ while I had the pass for tonight. Talked to me in Spanish only and waving. I dont drink or take durgs and I was wearing a white shirt with trousers. I was completely respectful and tried to explain how I need to get in because all my friend are in and I just came out few minutes ago. They didn't care and strated to act tuff on me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqpXyyQE&fid=0x0:0xba7ea196e42354f3"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Alisa Dimick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWWLqXuxcxrpphq7uOF4vvoQ1oxtR2Io-UN2qPuFzDemQZyqdFJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had two friends that had already gotten their phone stolen from this club, I came here against my better judgement and my phone got stolen too. The employees did not care at all to help or ask any questions about what my phone looks like if it does happen to show up. Aside from the massive thief problem, it is a cool club so only go if you plan on leaving all of your possessions at home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob Suters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdtIqSQtmTWWsOo4lSnbICX6HvWS1hxRdm9l7FNEVKf_Cw3dU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In 30 minutes my phone got stolen. My whole bag was ripped open and the lock was torn. I tried to get the security guards to help me but they didn’t care at all. Also I know 3 other people who got their phone stolen here. The club doesn’t do anything about it. Almost as if they were working with some kind of gangs who rob you in clubs. Also I paid 30 euros to get in. Would not recommend going here at all since the costumer service is horrible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lesh Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIezMv6B7Ng8VVDrRmJd4Gho3f24yf2IAaH68lb1V9XroSuVRtCw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is undoubtedly one of the best places to go if you want to have FUN.
I went last Saturday with a couple friends and I couldn't be happier that I went there.
It was the DJ's Birthday and he sure knew how to turn on the party!
There was also DJ Luiser who was as good as the resident!
I'll surely come back!
Thank you all for that amazing night!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Angéla Szücs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGmTqC-VV115IzK9-K_HTUnj4fNnxOa9WHf35VbXCTBSN8hRfd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The music was okay, the usual salsa and bachata which can be found in every place for dancers. The bar is nice and the 10€ entry fee which contains one drink is reasonable. The cloakroom charges 2€/item, which is outrageous in my opinion, as all of our stuff was put on one hanger, and we still had to pay 8€. Next time I will definitely bring a backpack and put everything there. There were no locks on the toilet doors in the ladies room, which is quite inconvenient. Apart from this, it was a nice experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQhOG-UQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2025-3-2"},{"Name":"Neda Terzieva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPblCOl7_yBxj-2xpGz48pNrJpdooXCkm0PAv-Ir_DKvM95oCMmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The best place in Madrid to dance salsa, bachata, merenge. Very kind staff also. The drinks are very well done. Nice atmosphere","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gelly Mikko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-ubTuyl-sl9naun9NxUYVzmMoCsBeCnhhXE6TtEjjOX58fC_k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Entrance fee covers one drink, there were some girls giving out free passes in the front later on so keep an eye out for them.\nThe wardrobe charges per item (scarf, cardigan and coat separately)! But also bags are allowed so maybe put everything in one bag and be done.\nDrinks were good and music great. Got a bit packed later on but could still dance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDF6uCjKQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2023-11-5"},{"Name":"Laz Ranasinghe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfzElhlKeZZoBLqNzKgDdYY6uDix1a8GFAyD6kxk52ONMo4QGRmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great local place to try tapas and wine. This was part of our tapas and wine tour in Madrid. The tapas were great, the staff was friendly. We tried vermouth as recommend by our guide and it was really good too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO-dbT3gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2022-6-14"},{"Name":"Luis Alberto Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7PIfKKxtlgssYIpqgSuMnbNFaAXow8uuX5m5lmHHoqZPxaz46mw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Needs a better DJ. The music felt more like someone's Spotify Playlist than a club DJ","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnQjsPYvIXyfOVqe-jCg_A\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Judi Caruso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs-R1N5mTY3i6GS_OnwxMyl2-UGArEZxvIwbCCewNABAvapomE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My daughter and I found this little gem on a Thursday night. . . last night of our Spanish holiday; first night in Madrid.  Luckily bumped into a local d.j. at another club who knew we were looking for the best place in Madrid for Latin dance.  He led us right to the door. This place, “el Son”, in the heart of the city did not disappoint. 10 euros cover charge, including a drink was very reasonable. Great atmosphere. Great music, with nice mix of salsa, bachata, merengue and some regaton. We got there at about 10:30 pm.  Fairly quiet with tons of space to move on the dance floor.  Warmed up at midnight with dance floor pretty packed by 12:30 am.  Dancers of all levels having fun. Wish we could have stayed all night but had a morning flight back to U.S. the next day and had to leave just after 1.  Would go back to el Son in a heartbeat and fully recommend to all Salsa (Latin dance) aficionados!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6sNzNkQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2021-9-18"},{"Name":"chad svastisalee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeSnr_aSxwmv7hQ1UUhS_OAvzXlhMipOCV0Rcxsxtc4CK9910M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Discoteqa El Son spins a variety of Latin music including salsa, bachata and merengue. Everything starts late, if you get there at midnight might be disappointed with the small crowd you may find. As time passes crowd does get bigger, and the floor gets full of dancers. Did see a range of mostly beginner to medium level dancers, and in a corner the pros doing crowd pleasing spins. Discoteqa El Son is a friendly welcoming place. There’s a 10 Euro cover charge to get in but it includes a free drink. Nice selection of hard liquors, specially rums. Options from Puerto Rico, Dominican Republic and Cuba among the rum selection.  Some reggaeton played as we were leaving. Too busy dancing than taking pictures.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHmOHwmQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2024-8-31"},{"Name":"Deborah Rosado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQGw5ZfYAOqg4601gXbyKVbYWrLsP_deYM8CdNtAd5jdy3cA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were a group from Tenneseee, DC and Puerto Rico and we danced salsa bachata allll night!!! The dance Professor was a whole vibe absolutEly had a blast! Drinks were great aswell.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5uLGmZA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5155b3a9fe802516"],"When":"2023-10-19"}]

[{"Name":"Unknown Reviewer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDAYuI_55EKl9jEEJ2TpBkTvwPzjtF8ChuCZkyHbKATM5c2VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We didn’t enjoy our visit at all. The venue was extremely hot and felt uncomfortable throughout. The atmosphere came across as cheap and borderline sleazy — not what we were expecting. Most of the staff were women clearly over 40, dressed and behaving in a way that gave off the vibe of a hostess bar. While they were polite and knew their limits, the overall setting just wasn’t for us. It felt tacky, low-end, and not suitable for anyone looking for a classy night out. Whoever recommended this place definitely didn’t share our taste.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robi Mulli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLsgQV3ieT7tQoAosL3C7ti6fffLQlzIDDLDjx5iWvAwIg5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Allegra is the best","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pedro F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSQgHpYJ4b0U63AanNQs8oC-2upNw-3vgvyRaNhQR5BRLDNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nos lo hemos pasado espectacular. Muchísimas risas y Susana ha estado genial, es la tercera despedida q vamos allí.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MARIO CORNACCHIA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLo4-ptq5qPuMwJoCZ30kvDxO_p27gWpTAxWlLHpnX6Q-Jgow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebramos la semana pasada ls despedida de soltero de un buen amigo y nunca nos imaginamos pasarlo tan bien. La comida y el servicio fue excelente, y el espectáculo increíble!!. Estuvimos muy a gusto gracias al buen ambiente que el restaurante genera con sus clientes. Lo recomiendo al 100 %.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jose cibao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJcRW1ohKznve8XKfD5djY1IHbFLz14-NofqzEeZq6u9HfHtI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Muy divertido, mi primo se lo paso en grande con tanta chica. No se lo esperaba para nada, porque el sitio parece un restaurante normal. La comida estuvo bien, aunque no me dejaron comer mucho con tanto ajetreo, eso si las copas de la disco algo carillas, aun con los bonos nos gastamos un pico en bebida porque se nos acabaron rápido pero bueno un día es un día. Lo tendremos en cuenta par ala próxima vez.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEw4vTowE&fid=0x0:0x7aa6360c69cfd244"],"When":"2019-2-15"},{"Name":"Roberto Trancos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg6fpB-IyfckxASRuUoQUYRL-2ZTWOTPMvig1ZmZKxs0Bs7XM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cerveza abundante y mujeres ¿Que mas se puede pedir? Eso si la discoteca no la encontramos, salimos tan tocados del restaurante que nos quedamos en el primer sitio que vimos abierto. En resumen fue una buena fiesta aunque no recuerdo la mitad de las cosas. Un saludo para Carla, mi striper favorita ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4pb6pJA&fid=0x0:0x7aa6360c69cfd244"],"When":"2019-3-6"},{"Name":"Aaron Moronta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0nKsuxcoG8oQfMjIGoxKzLBwVoEKYiIJZ-VRW8TguEnCR7q4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No interesa.
Comida fatal.
Bebida puro agua.
Chicas muy bordes la chica de trenzas.
Muy caro para lo q ofrece.
Hay lugares mucho mejores.
Pocas chicas, solo hacen caso a los grupos Grande.
Probar otro sitio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEufCghwE&fid=0x0:0x7aa6360c69cfd244"],"When":"2018-10-6"},{"Name":"David marin rodenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkoGr9VaJSfpZByiFsVec3W8BEuM_8B6h4za-KL-D0v-qIeg1v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nos dirigimos a ustedes para expresar nuestra profunda insatisfacción con la experiencia vivida recientemente en su establecimiento. La calidad de la comida fue extremadamente mala, siendo la carne, en particular, absolutamente incomible. El precio que se nos cobró —cercano a los 1.000 €— resulta completamente desorbitado y no guarda ninguna relación con el servicio ni con lo que se publicita en su página web.

Consideramos que hemos sido víctimas de publicidad engañosa, ya que lo ofrecido no tiene nada que ver con lo que realmente encontramos: una estancia en lo que parecía un almacén, con instalaciones en un estado lamentable, impropias de un lugar que cobra esas cantidades.

Lo único rescatable de la experiencia fue el trato de la chica que realizó el baile, quien fue muy amable y profesional. Agradecemos su atención y comportamiento, que fue lo único positivo en toda la velada.

Un saludo","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"paulgug’1","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOMlnbGD2TqkEA5bHZsfacjvuMFz8uST0VOAX7-LHqMvUiEKDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The venue itself is nice.
But the way they organize is the shittiest.
No seats whatsoever, everyone in the theater is standing up, from top balcony to ground floor. First come first served, so only the first raws of people standing at each floor get to see something.
And they don’t turn off the bright large advertisement LED panels (whisky, beer, tequila, etc.) at each floor during the whole concert.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ozzy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBpawQWbhvkAQqLaQ7NsJFOBkG3JAvoQDKPf0Kmn7cGrwYsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"VIP Experience That Wasn't

Purchased VIP tickets for New Year's Eve. The experience fell far short of expectations.

Tickets stated doors open at midnight, but we were told entry wouldn't begin until 1am. Security directed us to the standard queue without even glancing at our VIP tickets. Had to ask twice and eventually just walked to the VIP queue ourselves.

It was freezing outside, yet when the ladies in our group politely asked to use the toilets while waiting, a rude staff member at the door flatly refused. Security also walked through our group aggressively.

Paying for VIP should mean a better experience, not being ignored, dismissed, and treated poorly. The staff's attitude, from security to door personnel, was consistently unprofessional and unwelcoming.

Very disappointed. Would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacob Stitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5xicvQ6sY4OQQ_Fe8MgvRgkN8ITGUKPLTxla9R1IjTVMhz4wCQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Commercial nightclub that all the promoters and Sol wants you to go to. [{"Name":"perkash singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu7dcywv_MNTpZCBxFUFb1gvAFECTC4kFSV3h0P_mvDjKCFOmk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited this coffee place, which had a very modern and open design — and the clientele definitely reflected that. It was interesting to see a slightly different café concept. We ordered two mochas, and they were OK, but they really needed a bit more sweetness. Other than that, it was a good experience overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD88cvv2XeaLZlLd5hqfnRR&fid=0x0:0x4276c2e87fc44d28"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"NomadCafeVibes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJyQxTH9ZgnbyMXac7Ut1pZCtgF3uh7g1OH3N5lbUAaLB0DNdM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"For our Nomad 💻 tribe, here a few comments!

• Type of working: SOLO and SMALL GROUP | they have a corner table (fits 4 comfortable) and side table (casual seating no chairs - bench style, not so comfortable for long periods of laptop work) specifically for working on laptops. There are other tables but are marked for no laptops and only for eating. Also there is an upper floor but is not accessible for coworking.
• Music: 🎵 (medium) | it is a chill playlist that has some slow music that isn’t too loud  - perfect if you have to do some admin work or focus tasks.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️ (good)
• Dog friendly: with a small dog, it was no problem.
• Food: recommend the tostadas (in pictures) that are tasty and a good size for the price.

Overall: 4/5 ⭐️
+ The staff is friendly and service is quick.
+ Prices are reasonable for specialty coffee and brunch.
- The coffee was good, not amazing.
- The co-working space is comfortable if you manage to get a spot in the corner table.
*There are 2 locations, this review pertains to this specific location only.

Give it a try, cheers! ☕️

Overall, an amazing experience from start to finish. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEI6-2-qnpeiStwE&fid=0x0:0x2e0e80750c187a98"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Robin Hunsucker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrqTdK3BwI8IR5prvRsipEa2H7VICpCtX4uCKQ325TvYNeN1tC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super cute place with really good coffee and great service! Had a nice coffee cocktail with amaretto and it was delish!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDby2ZF9WxY8f3AeOOZeG0Z&fid=0x0:0x2e0e80750c187a98"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Mariah Day","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXlrkpvjFx-2Pg1CH2C3uVyB-wEc1yh-UlDRXDJY8eCoPcgl4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped by this brand new cafe today for brunch and really enjoyed the food/drinks! Even though I rarely drink sweet coffee drinks, seeing an iced vanilla latte on the menu gave me a pang of nostalgia and I had to order one. It was SO yummy!!!! It was like a little hug from home. 🥰 The food was also delicious. One of my personal gripes is how overly sweet breakfast dishes can be. The apple and brie toast was just a perfect amount of sweetness. We overheard the waiter telling a customer that you can also order the egg dishes with different types of eggs (poached, scrambled, etc). I also want to note our shock when they offered us free tap water without us asking AND it came with ice! We will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ_635jQE&fid=0x0:0x2e0e80750c187a98"],"When":"2023-7-8"},{"Name":"Linda Chiodi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIdfv4t60dxS1Xj_7oGC0T_1B4kVSTLhT1ee0yV5A8L7vy9PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to stop for quality coffee and food. We had an espresso and a cookie and both were amazing.
We were served by Oscar and he was friendly and caring.

Also, the place has some nice art that makes the vibes unique.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN_a6_j85pmdcA&fid=0x0:0x2e0e80750c187a98"],"When":"2025-5-25"},{"Name":"Troex Nevelin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbd3RihCFiN0_1jvTg2o0kE4tnIqpEfyJXXcVhVUAM3XVZ_aPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm not fan of hipster atmosphere but coffee and breakfasts are great here and personal is kind and attentive.
