Waiting for w coffee 25min. When I asked staff, „can I have coffee I ordered, please? Totally surprised stuff asked me ‚when??? ‚Besides this, food delicious and guy waiter more than helpful-very professional, top attitude!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anasofia Cano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPCQEdtGjFc2OHZKWtOAO_v-3ypnm_svwnoNomNA3k4UyrDNmV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My go-to study spot, this place is cozy, warm, and has great coffee and pastries.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elia Prieto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9GTeo8FO3Cc0w6wGK2dBp8DR8AwU8mEThEZPXW11oi9yD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lleva poco tiempo abierto y probé a desayunar allí un croissant a la plancha, de sabor y por dentro está bueno, pero con la sensación de sequedad en la parte de fuera. Pedí uno normal sin que fuera a la plancha y creo que es por que los deja muy dorador por lo que la "corteza" queda dura y se cae la mitad del croissant al plato...que recoges las migas y te las comes, pero yo creo q si lo hornearan 1-2 minutos menos ganarian bastante. El local es acogedor, apenas ruido, las bandejas las dejas en un carro que tienen al lado de la entrada. Tiene terraza fuera. Y la atención fue buena.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmRfQi8t-mwdDs1vMx9ukI&fid=0x0:0x800e977cf46d6612"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Alejandro Carpinteyro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvy5hALAT5VZpiEZu-Twtn60iuJz_A0Y5IU8DAiZuzv-Rw7Sw6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El día de ayer, yo tenía 30 minutos después de haber acabado mi café y mi galleta estaba trabajando un rato mi compu, cuando de repente el gerente de la tienda me pidió que me fuera porque ya se estaba llenando el restaurant

Hasta eso todo entendible

Pero había mesas que llevaban más de tres horas, que claramente eran de la misma nacionalidad del restaurante

Yo soy visitante, vengo de México, entonces siendo sinceros era el único de tes morena y además a el gerente yo lo había visto atender esas mesas y cuando me dijo yo le dije “ hay personas que han estado más tiempo que yo, no crees que es justo pedirle a ellos que se vayan?”

Me dijo que no había visto y que por favor me retirara","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvMb8xzI6Xvf9VQ1ptlhQx&fid=0x0:0x800e977cf46d6612"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"juliaccavia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-UFga9ommlGge2k9_OkDEtBq1SSByulJ6-xEc0uNx6FV7YeOG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos venido a desayunar y ha sido una buena experiencia. El trato de los camareros a es muy bueno y hay ofertas de desayuno aunque nosotros no la pedimos. El café está bien ☕️🥐","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQxHcpA7Ti5zoTk3dW4xVf&fid=0x0:0x800e977cf46d6612"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Sara Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrAWUlNNWIgkIXpZNGVMErLu-TnTozFppbH6BjB_BuIU24-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Local nuevo, con un ambiente muy agradable. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Harry Flynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWboafIxq-HPXkwVB9sb5F74UTDuT__FQiES47tL-b-wCfGItryCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Normally not one for indulging in these tiktok trendy, instagram hype places but that’s my problem. The sandwich here I have to say was absolutely brilliant, though my supreme jumper took some damage from an unforeseen (and unwanted) pesto splash, ultimately culminating in a quite unappealing green stain that definitely doesn’t complement the white font, I really enjoyed the sandwich. It was the famous comer a casa (or come a casa - these European languages are getting to me). If you fancy quaint scenery, there’s a small plaza nearby where you can fully indulge and be at one with the local Spanish pigeons. I for one was a huge fan of the sandwich (be sure to add that additional honey for an extra euro, come on, you’re not iker casillas), it added an somewhat unexpected delight to my day, temporarily allowing me to forget the dread that accompanies existence (oh, and my forthcoming exams that I am totally unprepared for). Circumlocutions aside, please do come here, you won’t regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGbDcDZupqC_mGKPxBs2lM\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"JJ Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUj_EqmsttSZsuBJcIrj5ahZQ53YkoSw_XM8p50qhziEUkROs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly staff. The sandwich was juicy and delicious.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michele Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNwVJlw5_07XJdzJbFW0q4FQehMP50lrZ_ipPMktwKTVyZTP4P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pedí los sándwiches por delivery y me sorprendieron la presentación y la frescura con la que llegaron a casa. Todo estaba perfecto y delicioso.\n\nComo único punto a mencionar, la focaccia con rellenos algo pastosos queda demasiado blanda y tiende a deshacerse. Aun así, el resto estuvo estupendo; se percibe claramente el cariño con el que preparan cada detalle. 🥰🥰🥰🥰🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4YY6kS7Hhzxyu5thIb9PN\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Tasting Senses","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRkpnUmKlkXGKX4kT47xoxB-jVMqOD-uKh7k_w7_LNzGopnw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Habíamos probado sus focaccias en otro local, pero pasamos por delante y se nos antojaron, así que compramos un par para llevar. Escogimos come a casa (con mortadella, queso stracciatella, pesto y pistacho) y chueca (con chorizo a la napolitana, queso provolone y albahaca). La masa está de diez, pero esta vez no terminamos de acertar con los rellenos. La de mortadella nos gustó (aunque menos que diavola, nuestra favorita), pero la de chorizo no nos convenció (se nos hizo bastante pesada, y no tenía demasiado sabor). Es una opción a la que recurrimos de vez cuando, y seguiremos haciéndolo cuando tengamos ganas de focaccia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGYI2P7HziHcG0V02yV7OO\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Franz Jeremy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuDynjthYEkTfQERCJb7X5haH1W9zq8_OxT_3QfyhI5acvST5tHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pase por este local nuevo aquí en Metro Quevedo, la señorita Verónica me atendió y me dió una amplia información sobre los productos, una persona muy atenta y da un buen servicio. probé la Ñonna estába muy bueno 100% recomendado. Muy rico la verdad, ni foto le tomé 🤤 jajajaja","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRYHNFJNYswFcE9L77vxG2\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"alberdry romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXU9YNhYGkL68n9V1jORlTZXSetknC76m8dpixvDM2CxVkkRpI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pasé por este nuevo local de focaccia en Madrid, y de verdad que la experiencia ha sido única. Un buen ambiente, una atención 100/100 por parte de Veronica. Me he comido la focaccia Chueca y la verdad que tiene un sabor único. Sin duda 100% recomendada.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbyoCvL7q1mYnkOS1WMYDe\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Francis Aristigueta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhcgvDbIsPrkn_qaleqsa3zpUtvcV5IpYk9G1N2nw1gzqNtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pedí una focaccia de mortadela y pesto para llevar, al mismo tiempo había otro pedido para llevar, la chica ha puesto las 3 focaccias y se confundió con mi pedido. Me di cuenta ya cuando llegue a casa que me había puesto una focaccia de trufa no siendo esto obviamente lo que quería, entiendo la confusión pero hay que estar más atentos ya que es molesto consumir algo que no has pedido!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCojj7fTLhhhyuHj6-t9fDG\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Norma Llinas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKIrbz01Votoy4IPophXIpIo_ts7fBAkDj5GBYnJVOM4iU1-4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui a la nueva sede de DIVORARE esta vez en Fuencarral, y conseguí lo mismo de siempre, calidad, en el producto, buen ambiente y la atencion maravilloso, me comí esta vez la come a casa y una rellena de Nutella, excelentes en todo, sigo siendo fans, éxitos ❤️❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAODth193v8LzEOQlMMoF4f\u0026fid=0x0:0x29761bf7f34e2b7c"],"When":"2025-9-21"}]

• Type of working: SOLO and Couple | they have long standing tables facing the wall. Comfortable for a couple hour work either solo, or with a friend or two.
• Music: 🎵🎵 (medium) | The 2000s songs were a bit distracting as we kept singing each song 🙈 overall, it didn't bother if you have to do some admin work.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️☕️ (outstanding)

Overall: 5

* We still gave it a 5⭐️ review, because we understand that this place is not designated for nomad workers.

For the non-Nomad workers we suggest this spot for the easy-going vibes, the lovely customer service, and very tasty coffee. The price of the coffee is VERY reasonable compared to other specialty coffees in Madrid!

Give it a try!💃🏼

The employee came, took the dog away, but did not offer any sort of apology, or offer to help clean or any sort of comment of any kind. She just went back to work as if nothing had happened. Great salesman (barista),
Nice coffee (Madrid is not known for its fine coffee but this establishment serves its customers good ☕.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKzrvMpw0mGcMQKuOKXipQ&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Catie Litteral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKb0Fx_n8kNokPuo3KysxYEJJnqiFUG5s3fG8OQbfvP8-EzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cafeteando has by far the best specialty coffee in Madrid. No other coffee shop even comes close. Beyond the coffee, it's a beautiful space with an amazing community built by the owner and the baristas. It's a place of warmth, happiness, and friendship.

Recently, Cafeteando has been targeted by false, negative reviews for organizing an event to provide support to a Palestinian hospital. That's not politics, that's just humanity.

And pro tip: if you're visiting Cafeteando on the weekend, try the cinnamon rolls!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anne Dachs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU22RAYLbfzihMESnMgpb9-xsEVVgYJ-ymFwMXKJLllwjDF9c8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am picky in terms of coffee….and this is an absolute treat!  They make by far the best coffee in Madrid, topped up by great service, homemade cookies and a cozy ambiance. It’s a small oasis and perfect to recharge during a busy day","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teona Mikadze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1Ln3w9eaDnKnjjmOskBrqvEIitF6ojo93EtWu1k09AHH5pA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favourite coffee shop in Madrid, I have been going there for years.. it’s a coffee shop with a soul, not an average one.. really special specialty coffee and Hugo who connects people and has a big heart!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Negin H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYJ3EYusjbQFDz2GXB25QawwKOjS8brcVO9EooEkdufkKoJWE-dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious, non pretentious coffee shop. Will be my regular. And I've tried many in this neighborhood.  Wish we had outdoor seating space but still this place is great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alyanna Fabian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsWv15tPfJFRzAGjIFCn8MWLl8RLXpWjHyCzJGHuF77w8yvpc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m so glad we stumbled upon this tea shop while looking for places to go in Google Maps. We saw that they had good reviews and that the owner knew his tea so we decided to give it a try.
The owner recommended hot rooibos chai tea with oat milk to go with the perfect cold Madrid weather and it did not disappoint.
Definitely coming back here when we find ourselves in Madrid again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-kZ6giQE&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2022-11-6"},{"Name":"Michael Beauregard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEngUd7ij9oEkGhQgrPnd6U_qxSIWkiG1ZXwF0CYZ5V403MeJo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As the name conveys, Cafe Te Ando is small enough to simply order and walk.  However, the service and coffee was anything but small.  Yes, I ordered my usual, in a to go cup.  The “filthy” dirty chai caught my eye and It certainly didn’t disappoint.  The chai had what I believe was a hint of Almond.  Nice.

Should you find yourself lost in the Chambri neighborhood of Madrid, I suggest you walk to Cafe Te Ando, but don’t plan to sit down.

Enjoy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_3cfsDg&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-1-18"},{"Name":"Rania Elahouel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuBWQObW0syiokhYYN6MaAMNllH4VuMENKhtQF2HZlkf0T4ozq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice coffee and amazing dirty Chai 🤍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmNvbV-G2hvkaU1itybsVS&fid=0x0:0x26ed851b9b6c56f6"],"When":"2025-10-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chiara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrPN1-v5DBrfwtuZzhxappZYP8gwvVTGUzI0faFpAtQza1pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favourite hidden gems in Madrid. I stumbled across this place looking for a decent flat white in the morning (kiwi coffee snob here) and was blown away by the kindness & top tier banter of the owners, which is an absolute cherry on top for the excellent coffee they serve. Mil gracias a todos, el mejor cafecito en Madrid!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZYVpp52ntEybOdyZecV-0&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Will Shaughnessy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkhPyTGpPViyxFK4Pk-20FkQ9UVVCLH74J-lRdmWPgxSYDQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My friends and I stopped by here on our last day in Madrid and were extremely pleased with both the coffee and service. There were many different options for beans(all roasted in house) and the coffee was rich and flavorful. Our barista was extremely friendly and beyond welcoming. He took the time to explain the differences between the beans and clearly has a passion for the work. Hands down the best coffee shop experience I have ever had, I hope to return one day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPyLt5bK3MSgPA&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Craig Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEht8QVFjL3gST3Mt71KKwCCXJ2LcwOS1F8KiD0hAKcKYeYsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my. Wonderful, wonderful place. The barista was so helpful and friendly, and made me the most delicious filter coffee. Great espresso options are available too. The pastry was delicious to go with it.
It's small, and they spend as much time roasting as they do being a cafe. If you're in Spain, you should buy their beans to try at home.
If you're in Madrid and wanting to try good coffee, you're blessed with so many options, but this café should be at the top of your list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkic2F-wE&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2018-9-13"},{"Name":"Anna Quinlan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp_VD4zINntiOM_wcOv3kJbpyCOwei1CdqT_uhJn-UvW7G3Nhd7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This cafe is a hidden gem in Madrid - Enrique and Reina are so passionate about coffee, and you can tell with the amazing product and space. I did the barista class and learned a ton about how to properly evaluate beans, prepare espresso, and steam milk. 100% recommend for either having coffee or taking a class!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnqPTocA&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Bryan Druhan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjPPh0Fnnvc3M4ukK93F4Sq45uxmnP87_h3d2ZwoGjYnVQug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A home away from home!

Enrique, Reina and Mateo are the heart of this wonderful artisan family roastery. The passion and tradition of incredible coffee can be enjoyed in every cup!

The coffee is expertly prepared, but moreso the love and passion for their craft shines through in everything they do.

Amazing coffee, but so even better people.

Come and experience the love when you walk through their doors. 10/10 experience all around. Todo perfecto!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tuğçe Küçüköner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZkzbLkfSfvKcJbh8zQcMUCZujis-MgNzyA8QlHy8qHpw8_KQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best coffee experience that I have ever had. We bought coffee seeds from there. The owner is really nice and kind. He gave good recommendations about seeds. Place is also very nice and clean and also it feels like home 🌸 hardly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kim Kian Wee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXteb13s0ItkGHfZvfx2NgLVebkFABNDFdiDscUVBWVXPUha1GM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The most amazing coffee experience in Madrid. Definitely worth making the detour to visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtLIQuDBcHJerNYxBU36fx&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Oana Miclos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7KWrqtxrDMaaBizEgN5roytY5qnaz7xvB2tyrrG1nT1nmUJya=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small, cozy coffee place with a coffee passionate owner that makes your stay an experience, telling you about the coffee and the place.
Worth a try (and more)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAxeHfxAE&fid=0x0:0xcf4af329090909ab"],"When":"2025-2-2"}]

[{"Name":"Funda Torun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWiVYfneMp3xQhqsxRvOD68blSKsAlGPjO5r6Y1t6FasaM0z8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best food spot I've tried in Madrid (vegan, non-vegan doesn't matter) and this is coming from a person who comes to Madrid every year past 10 years. Everything we tried from the mains to the dessert were amazing. 👏 We tried pad thai, albondigas and double pistachio, everything tasted great, very good seasoning and rich in protein. The staff was very friendly and paid attention to the detail.

They have limited tables so I would highly suggest making a reservation before coming. I would be definitely coming back 👏","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Flying high in the vegetarian world: incredibly rare find and astonishingly good dishes. They are simple, creative, well curated and have super fresh ingredients.
The michelada is vegan and it’s the absolute best I’ve had in Madrid (absolutely standing the comparison with the original clamato one!).
We chanced upon this place and I’m going to be am back over and over and over again!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXjMrFKw&fid=0x0:0x5ba4ba02478860d1"],"When":"2024-10-13"},{"Name":"Giannicola Scarpa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXClF41WTsd9pTWZnvCJSQjF-y1w0xMbkdF1ZUbdY18g-62_cWN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The place is so quaint, the food is inventive, healthy and just delicious! The staff welcomed us with a smile and the service was fast. Will definitely come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Szonyi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYMkMr0uiRbbiK8sIHRjNGEckzAqtgrNC0B3B36ZwPv-zdfnxkRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really liked the food here, everything was *chefskiss*","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMG-RBdDN72p1ABs8kgNOd&fid=0x0:0x5ba4ba02478860d1"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"El Pulpo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI19EfISgQnjNfuIkPRLWoL7JOwUoHOUT6QYM_ZshCuc1NbFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited this place as we heard very nice words from it and indeed was great! Potatoes and jackfruit were so good and meaty… and tempeh meatballs were the best i tried so far. The staff were super kind and helpful…! Overall a great experience. Hope i can visit the place again soon…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC216aX3QE&fid=0x0:0x5ba4ba02478860d1"],"When":"2022-4-30"},{"Name":"Ingrid Helene Røger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYMaKLM7tswNvGnNEfqb_ZBQPgLaQ4UDnn3CMl7BlmXi7hk-w7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a pearl! The food was very tasty 🙏🏻❤️ And the staff were super friendly! Best vegan place in Madrid 😊🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxm6KVfw&fid=0x0:0x5ba4ba02478860d1"],"When":"2023-6-15"},{"Name":"Jaime Alcántara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDYBgxcd7N_XhJXfUWaXiva5uNA_3xN3V9eqEQoNJamSRTsi9h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing. The artichokes are out of this world. Simple but yet so tasteful!

The restaurant is small but feels very familiar. The service was perfect and we enjoyed our food a lot.

Definitely recommend. Would come here again. Finding a parking spot was easy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julian Gomez Castellanos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMINbqGcbpmXgLdTBK-FE_ninpjinojHZYR2srOafr7RW9YuLE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love it! Was curious on trying this vegan spot in Trafakgar (near Olavide) and left very happy.

Atmosphere: very nice and relaxing

Service: my waitress was very friendly and patient in making suggestions.

Food: I picked the breakfast combo that consisted of Tea (or coffee), OJ, chia pudding with fruit and a “meatball” sandwich made out of soy and topped with a delicious tomato sauce.

Price: 16 euros

Verdict: will return for sure!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Me trajeron las croquetas congeladas dos veces, me lo tome a risa pero cuando les dije que no me gustaba nada mas del menu me quisieron cobrar casi la mitad del precio por una botella de agua y un plato de caldo. Also much like the rest of Spain, neighbors and strangers mingle freely and converse with each other at cafes and this was the best thing to see and experience. The coffee as expected was superb and cheap. Go! Enjoy!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Majkowska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9lv-iK76LXyO_LoVeOtMF3GQx5KgOVtUM5PHGc2i38ld9ZPYe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cool very old school place. But also it serves spring rolls with your drink sometimes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJiXd7snMUShRafCeeK7YUWk4B_bxyw8fx5BB6Gb0CcPMZcjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Armables","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ariel Authier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_Oh5vBIw42AcPcM-OcXxjiqkSVqmXoq5SUxTm-zrehCueH6Hw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old school Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Antonio Escobar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGuAANxMoLirf1WCNYd4jaKpuh3GS82kueKjv9o-85NmzfngE_NQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Ok","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfonso Carrillo Molina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTb20N9MKIyP2sC46nWPuyNvk_msBnAi5OJSCVUy_2Is1eWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ambiente inmejorable cada viernes y sabado! Trato exisito por parte de Lee que incluso llego a ponerme un Malaga - Depor  a mi solo en la tele grande mientras puso el Barça en la pequeña. Recomiendo mucho las rosquillas de vino del desayuno!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"VÍCTOR VIRGÓS. ESCRITOR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeUloCkpr7xh5wdfBhSyxqxAc1QbMBes1xey8X0bQKtUMLeT4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Me gustan mucho estos bares de barrio de toda la vida. Bares sencillos, donde comen los trabajadores y los vecinos. Una cantidad más que notable de tapas, raciones y bocadillos. Los montaditos están fenomenal y el café me ha sorprendido. Mucho mejor de lo que esperaba. Atención al cliente muy amable, rápidos y diligentes. Me gusta también mucho la cercanía con el cine Proyecciones y la boca de metro de Bilbao.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Indix","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNuf5Xwx96QHUeQpJ0I91j5BLt7yA8RzVYMmLr_olRxgsPlpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi experiencia con el bar? Voy en silla de ruedas, tengo esclerosis múltiple, con todo lo que mi enfermedad conlleva, me he acercado cinco veces a pedirles a su encargada, y a los camareros mal educados que tiene, los cuales responden en un muy mal español, con una falta de educación y empatía tremenda, a que por favor su clientela tenga consideración con la gente discapacitada y les dejen libre tránsito en la acera!. El bar no tiene derecho a terraza pero toda su clientela bebe en la calle.

No dejan pasar ancianos, mujeres con carritos o gente en silla de ruedas.

Los derechos de la gente discapacitada en este país están garantizados, para que la encargada se lo diga a su personal, aquí españoles y extranjeros deben respetar la ley, no solo son mal educados, son "MALOS CIUDADANOS", no entienden que una silla de ruedas necesita espacio, tampoco entienden que la acera no es para beber, y menos aún al parecer entienden que no tienen permiso de terraza, pero ahí están todos sus clientes bebiendo, obstruyendo el paso, y metiendo un ruido horroroso en la acera.

La actitud que tenéis, es denunciable, la acera es para la gente y no para vuestros clientes borrachos.

Deberiáis aprender a ser mejores personas, mejores ciudadanos y mejores vecinos.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The restaurant was cosy and fresh with good energy. The staff were friendly and very helpful. Two waitresses serve outside and attended to the bar. This was good team effort. The food was delicious. It was fresh and very tasty. This restaurant deserves my 5 star rating. Well done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"CRISTIAN JIMENEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRWKsfGyeHsl5e7QL-wYYuV7vvKTmWAoN9m_J9NMftJX3TeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Christmas lunch, so it's always something risky.....and the following happened:

1.-Menu starters included three dishes; one of them never came on the table.
2.-For the main course, one of the options simply ran out (and this was not the most chosen, btw), so some people had to change his/her preferences.
3.-The dessert was something ridiculous; you could be considered happy if you could take two small pieces of nougat, in the best case.
4.- Layout of the tables was simply not fitting the requirements (they knew og many people we were, and ensured in advance that we would be in two big groups; reality: six groups at the end).
5.-When some people asked for complaints sheets, they tricked and declared them that the organiser was actually not requesing that (which was not true).

Conclusion: if you are not prepared for a lunch with a big group, don't dare it!. And if things don't go in the right way, please try to satisfy the customer, not cheat it!.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shachar Ashkenazi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUEmUXzrsubhnR-rznmk2MY1VmlWrq70NlSqh4aWyW8euE8eL00w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty local restaurant!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI29Wj7wE&fid=0x0:0xf3d2635deda9dfa5"],"When":"2025-4-13"}]

Everything was delicious, especially the soup and shrimp large dumpling. We thought it was going to be an average meal as it was just the most convenient place to eat nearby, but it turned out to be special. Also, the little dog named BonBon comes with the table. So well behaved and a dear. Also, the tea leaves were a special variety from China. Tasted so good. We really enjoyed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA-NGdlAE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2025-2-6"},{"Name":"George P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3LZMuByew0QeIbs9C7ecCRX2a28bzjlMjoLKc1_tmT8E2n5pZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great noodles .. had the weekday menu... Spring rolls and curry chicken noodles.  Both were excellent. The noodles (homemade) were a bit light on the amount of chicken but not a big deal.  A good amount of food for the price paid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID10OaEKw&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-1-4"},{"Name":"mir P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQ57z73654hB2qKSVHGVzb1sEuN6ckFMb5XGoDi0mcb_Vyyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"very tasty noodles with vegetables and rice with chicken.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfl5ubhwE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2025-1-10"},{"Name":"Den Yanine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVA8asG8elHCdYS4FJQxBtZZoVhhxwFbJ4DY_WoP2yk39C1xXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La comida es exquisita, la atención inmejorable y la locación es perfecta.
El tinto de verano especial que prepara Alex, es el mejor tinto en toda España y no exagero en decirlo, acompañarlo con los tallarines hechos a mano solo hace que toda la experiencia sea irrepetible.
De igual forma probamos varias cosas del menú y todo fue igual de delicioso y disfrutable.

La atención de Alex verdaderamente hizo que toda nuestra comida fuera un deleite. Un lugar infravalorado que no se puede perder en Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD34DurAE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-4-16"},{"Name":"Ana María Ramos L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfg2omvoLPL2nTzZCZ9PH0JokmB4M1X_ckbvrCiaUpF2FP3bcE5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un día, de casualidad, volvimos a encontrar nuestros tallarines favoritos. Éramos clientes habituales de sus dos locales anteriores y echábamos mucho, muchisimo, de menos estos tallarines artesanales. Es una opción perfecta tanto para comer allí como para encargar comida para llevar. Todo riquísimo y ellos encantadores siempre.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jorge sanchez suela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZPbd5USGcQPcoEJWcP5xoErxxc1CvOX-ZvW7J84o_9qDK5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"estaba todo increíble que bueno estaba todo !!!sinceramente de lo mejor que hemos probado en madrid lo hacen todo genial y los tallarines caseros se notan demasiado INCREÍBLE, el pato también lo hacen de diez !!👍🙏🥰
100% recomendable de lo mejor","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID73Zif9wE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Miguel Angel Marcos Bueno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtsBfletIB6-sgKEMpOS9VsBfTW7_J3zzpMvJwhkVDYSgi8I_H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un local de comida Asiática de fusión muy aceptable,tallarines muy buenos,buena decoración y una gran atención,buen curry y buen producto fresco","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3vL_JuwE&fid=0x0:0x4a0c5180cacc24e9"],"When":"2024-11-3"},{"Name":"Marta Cuevas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzdmWjgWAcZ7hJFV9eLrLgooPyxP8ZhBP85IqmWjX9GtsKVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llevo más de 20 años siguiendo a la familia que regenta este negocio, he visto a su hija crecer. Este es el tercer local que tienen desde que los conocí y en todos ellos la comida es excepcional y el trato excelente. Todo delicioso, pero para mí son un must los tallarines de cualquier tipo, el arroz (sencillo pero increíblemente bueno) y la sopa agriopicante.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Selen Yıldırım","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyVxaiO79VycvNRA6COaahMrNZ4AoBAiHmxphwUCPFOLI3oAZK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I would never go again. Horrible service.  Made us move tables 3 times ,mid eating. Put us in way two small table (we were 7). Too crowded small tables music is so anoying as well. Hope you guys see this and better the cafe. Food is allright but noting was special or insteresting to order. Imagine the table in the foto while we were all eating, nothing fits so uncomfortable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKKvzRtw24gSvs5DpYEGTH&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"ola khalifah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEUhIGUVyTdgsmNY7652Lz9GCz3tJrQxTqk1UnKdZuWkTbir0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really had the best experience here the staff was very nice and understanding we arrived 10 minutes before closing yet we told them that we came here by taxi only for them and they take our order and asked us to be comfortable and to stay as much as we like , they gave us the best coffee experience in Madrid. And also respected us as Muslims
Thx toma cafe for this great team you have 🫰🏻🫰🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU0HNNcARHrcINwA0GPOiZ&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Vera Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYzaBa3AgVW0epqJr9X1SIFf6IvWD-jSUr3j21mtVoU8F8ynI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My big love for many years. Every time I visit Madrid, I come here for the perfect cappuccino. Time goes on, baristas change, but the quality stays the same. Every time I get a perfect cappuccino with perfect latte art. I really appreciate this commitment to quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZTq-AKNVANPT44NPzOu2N&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgkSCcZcafqyJH3l0RxsbCcIyw5fY8OMtpryj40MBGDscY5o4Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered a medium Flat White and received a small one. I told the barista (the long haired Argentinian one) that thats not a medium coffee, but a small one. He then perceived to tell me that that's a medium, and showed me a cortado cup saying that's small. I was late at work so I just left but it's unbelievable how some people just wanna scam you. Besides this when I first told him that the coffee was a small, not a medium, he started talking to me with a very bad and superior attitude, gaslighting me.
I bought coffee from Toma in the past three  years almost daily, but this is gonna end now.

---------
Answer to the owner: I was not expecting for you to say anything good after reading all your answers to other people's complains. It's very funny how, instead of saying "oh we're so sorry for what happened" you keep pointing the finger to those in the right. I explained which barista it was so you could know and talk to him for the future, but it's clearly you're just like him. A scammer between scammer. All those ugly answers to people's reviews... it's amazing how people still buy from Toma. Your attitude is disgusting. "No drama just coffee"? Yeah, when you won't be scammed on your own money. Until then, shhh. But don't worry, controls are on their way. Your business will be revived soon, or are u paying peple to be quiet? ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsUo5UtaFV5-0m93mUEz7c&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Kristina Völk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKo4BA3vg-yrtcc0a3jvDrCCuucqXn5-e82jwAnflVygG3W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent coffee!! The staff is friendly and knowledgeable and the coffee tastes really good. The breakfast menu is simple but delicious. It’s a great spot to sit outside. Also the music selection is great - good vibes in general. Shoutout to the Maradona trinkets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo8qvAQw&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Pency Lucero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvdoAahFIB1Fft6iiG5ERm8WsLfEX6obOl4OsVeX3XyPzAZyba=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My best day in the summer of Madrid consist of staying here late afternoon (6-8pm) outside drinking matcha and reading a book then walking all the way to Parque del Oeste to loiter on the grass and watch the sunset! This spot is so cool and perfect I wish I can take it everywhere with me! I love the fountain near this place and it’s just in a really cool location which is actually hard to find if you’re traveling enough. Other than that, matcha is on point! I’ve had 5-6 matchas here and probably only one wasn’t that good (their baristas rotate). Pastry is tasty, love the brownie. Elizabeth, the waitress, was especially nice, attentive and patient.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aurore FG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJQXu7fQFbRfQFLG-8vVMSTJYQAl5s6-XcOhBlt4pVAgFbtoew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Good for drinks and tapas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jairo Ochoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgSnO9GWYL8eibIYjzCDzfNYTy0f7IXH2uMIpeL9x_LrFw7Z1v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En la calle Fuencarral, al lado de la Glorieta de Quevedo se encuentra ubicado un bar de tapas que cuenta con un pequeño recinto interior con dos mesas altas y dos puestos en barra pero que en la parte exterior cuenta con dos amplias terrazas en las que puedes sentarte a disfrutar del ambiente cosmopolita en esta zona de Madrid. La carta está basada en la clásica oferta de productos para compartir como: jamón, queso, tortilla, salmón ahumado, en plato o tapas además de diferentes tipos de tostas acompañado de bebidas frías o calientes. Buen trato personal por parte de sus empleados.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFjM1BuSmNrkjIi8jphUQW&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Taty Campos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq8rLLhES5roOMszMNk-alSDDOU2lhjgq84jOOoXub_coSuYw4OA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Sentarse en la terraza es muy agradable, para tomarse algo, observar el entorno. Pero el camarero a cada instante viene presionando para que comas algo. Soy vegana y alérgica al gluten, hay poquísimas opciones para comer, unicamente la ensalada de tomate sin ventresca.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJqrsBOqTpP6Mxx4GTCSCT&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Javi Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwZqHaHGJFHU38cxZoeDSC-tFJFvIPvM0Gtc699NVMC-2Z-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Nuestra experiencia fue bastante mala. Tanto a mí como a mi pareja nos atendieron de forma poco agradable. Al pedir la bebida, la mujer que nos atendió nos cobró al instante sin mostrarnos el desglose del precio, simplemente diciendo el total, y ni siquiera nos dejó recibir lo que habíamos pedido antes de pagar.

Además, cuando notamos que faltaban 10 céntimos de cambio, no fue por la cantidad en sí, sino por el gesto y porque sentimos que se hacía la desentendida. Esa actitud nos dejó una impresión muy negativa. En general, la atención nos pareció poco profesional y no salimos nada contentos. No pensamos volver.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaume Casals","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4N9OkSJ-NrV2TR8OqOFILMoR0lgMgdCwkjjI4U0Gfw5QpRJk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es una auténtica locura sus precios, hemos desayunado tres personas, casi 40€ 3 bocadillos de jamón, 1 cola, 1 café con leche. Te ofrece unos churros de cortesía y te los cobra. Una vergüenza!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"José Manuel B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJCIVCZP8b-bIHxIwN_f6XtdMo1TrIVvOQo8ve1jYhlKLVMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Septiembre 2024

La terraza es muy agradable, pero con unos toldos negros que aunque te dan sombra absorben calor
La tortilla recalentada a microondas y como las de supermercado y el pan chicloso
Con el café te ponen una minimagdalena que está bien
Precio caro, café y pincho 6,50€","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH3IT5MA&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2024-9-2"},{"Name":"db","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGH4c8ssRqKWAa32Y3R4RS_tzYRBAs7y68AAuEh0fmmtX2Z-OB7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"3,5 ⭐️ Pequeño bar - tapería en la zona peatonal de la calle Fuencarral (una de las más transitadas de Madrid) pero con numerosas mesas en terraza que, con buen tiempo, se suele llenar. Cerveza bien tirada y vinos a su temperatura correcta acompañados siempre de aperitivo. De comida no ofrecen nada espectacular y los precios son exigentes, aunque tienen buen jamón.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJnJG42QE&fid=0x0:0x914d3ef810774652"],"When":"2023-6-22"}]

[{"Name":"Mike Evans","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQeXXJz75Wr7J52m73hyovmTqg0AnNKyzCDtmLVOULNdMAtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is great for COFFEE. It’s good quality and various options and they know how to make a cappuccino.
It’s a different case for food.  The menu is limited but regular, however the preparation is a little below par. The taste is good, it’s not bland. Maybe I was unlucky because my eggs on their version of what is essentially eggs Benedict were rather undercooked. I’m not a fan of transparency in my eggs.

So overall, nice atmosphere, good attentive and kind staff, great coffee, average food based on this visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRwnzxfCjHoawllkGClWi9&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Pixie Tomacruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaqMvziiktx0rAlI3KEvqfIMfPfZUtenXSkBVTx8uD-IFONtam=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my fav coffee shop in Madrid. very quaint and warm atmosphere, and they always play great music. the employees here are very sweet! i got an oat milk latte and their salmon and ricotta toast, and both were phenomenal. a great place to sit and journal, or spend time with loved ones over a wonderful drink!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBoqtRCYhVdSDN_1yBkHzFP&fid=0x0:0x131a755e98447985"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Sarah Cook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGTBmUAzI1pwwFqYdQ7_H_hacBZ-YB63zIiRvyZx1SVukQQ2Ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, lovely atmosphere! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jordan Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2dXoAGbDdFXiDSHhvsrNxiYC-cuk7dJF8Z3V3ai8nTQgQEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A new gem in Chamberi mixing specialty coffee, Chinese tea and minimalist design that totally works. Their menu is super unique (though I wasn’t fan of their popular eggs toast), but you can tell they care about details. The vibe, music were amazing especially for those who want a spot to chill, read or use it as a cozy coworking space.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1su2XSAQdtnvxtImMwd4B&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This newly opened café offers specialty coffee, baked treats, and light brunch options. The interior is simple yet inviting, with white tones, bare walls, and a personal, cozy charm. The owner and staff are warm and attentive, welcoming guests with a glass of water upon arrival.

We ordered an Iced Latte, Iced Matcha Latte, and a Financier. The coffee was well-balanced, the matcha had a bold and authentic flavor, and the Financier was soft and moist—pleasantly sponge-like without being dry. Most drinks and pastries are priced between 3 EUR and 5 EUR, which is quite fair considering the quality.

It’s a lovely stop if you’re in the area. Though seating is somewhat limited, the space feels open and relaxed. For the best experience, I’d suggest visiting during quieter hours to fully enjoy the peaceful atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKeFgOjh3Kqzew&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-6-2"},{"Name":"Samar Al Hashimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjYbyxmkfVgyrE4PnDb97uHzuA2SJppxvCrbYaU909kSa7tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A hidden gem in the heart of Madrid.
This coffee shop is so much more than just a place to grab a great cup of coffee — it’s a full sensory and cultural experience. Every corner is beautifully decorated with incredible attention to detail, transporting you straight into the heart of China. The atmosphere, the service, and the flavors are all exceptional. Can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_61aXVw91a3VVoj-5OLwy&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Sophie Rupp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-FnIiLEoMTPdQgH1kptbRWQbPYoYhsfhBPEBV7toDudAXBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been to this cafe about every week since it opened and I would give it 6 stars if I could! I personally am getting wary of overly “aesthetic” cafes in Madrid where the focus is getting in, getting an aesthetic picture of a watered down matcha for Instagram/tiktok, and then getting out. This is NOT one of those places, as the quality of the atmosphere mirrors the high quality of the food and drinks. The matcha is real fresh matcha and the baristas take extra care to make sure it’s made correctly, weighing out the grams and using the correct mixing technique with the chasen (whisk). Here you will not find fake matcha pre-mixes. It is without a doubt the best matcha in Madrid in terms of quality and flavor. Their hojicha lattes are also incredible (same here, the baristas know the correct way to prepare them). The food and desserts are flavorful and fresh. The staff is so friendly and will help you if you don’t know what to order. The ambience is very cool and inviting with a great mix of modern meets timeless antique. The attention to detail to all the aesthetic elements (cool art, vintage chairs, interesting light fixtures, even the light switches in the bathroom are cool!) makes you feel like you’re somewhere luxurious. It’s a great place to have a long talk with a friend or work with a laptop in a peaceful atmosphere. You can sit on the terrace or inside. If you’re wondering whether you should go here, the answer is YES!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKuGwoq5pNXujwE&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Olena Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhSSG4HghqUFi_mWFB4hGxTrUeY5O05dQcxGQxPBprptELmoW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is literally my fav coffee place in Madrid and I’m a big fan of visiting different places!
The interior design, the idea, coffee/matcha , desserts and everything is just superb!
Love their pain au chocolate! Definitely must-visit place for everyone in Madrid!
* every time someone comes to visit me in madrid , the first place I take them to is Jinping E Hijo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9APnh4l9OymhjlLjSQ3Lz&fid=0x0:0x788b63fbb16d4d84"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Ashley Vega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbkraCifuf5FwjZQRJRAtr9yokFQv7-c-qodnkhSdDwPYTjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came across this coffee shop on TikTok and gave it a try. I can say that the aesthetic and ambiance is beautiful. The service was great. And the matcha was amazing!! Best matcha I’ve ever had. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Howie Vegter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDR8-sStJkfsrmwMndNuX86iOra2GfEvl1G4vuC8TVdlWIwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic local restaurant with good food and friendly staff. We went here in mid-August. We had gone to Museo Lazaro Galdiano before this and wandered around for a while trying to find a place for lunch. Most places this day in mid-August were closed. There were a few that were open but didn’t look appealing. We eventually stumbled upon La Golondrina. The waiter/owner spoke only Spanish, no English. We saw this as a positive, making the place more authentic, less touristy. We managed to order eggs with potatoes, some kind of fish, and tinto de verano. Everything was great. We’re happy we found this restaurant.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Billy Bouli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBdStEvEwy5vIGWcSlNHQxYm91Jxexht5zQq5c5Ztr2NjgQ6Yp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cafe/ restaurant populaire au bon sens du terme. Ho preso un menu le patatine mi sono state date con due dita di salsa veramente vomitevole.
Alla mia richiesta di non mettere pomodoro e insalata ( gli unici 2 ingredienti che si possono aggiungere ) mi è stato detto che veniva 2€ in più.

Esperienza davvero orribile sia a livello di cibo che di servizio e mi dispiace davvero ma davvero tanto per chi ha mangiato il pollo fritto. Lo sconsiglio a chiunque. Il peggior kebab in assoluto.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"adrian bobu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLqpWycnxAYkTPpMTx5N6Wjj5XAcDWYv0Wei-Geu3iextuVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Somos conductores y tanto yo como mi compañero hemos comido en mucho lugares de Madrid y sobre todo comida rápida pero este es uno de los peores sitios que hemos comido los precios para la cantidad que ponen no es nada razonable en sima apenas te entienden de King no tienen nada","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis de Navascués","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBEiWfiJAD1sH-UKxltnHTvp4JzNEKOYGe2ItZxZmefteDwHJi6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El peor kebab en el que he estado. Le di a probar a los que estaban en la cola y todos le dijeron que estaban heladas. Entonces comenzó a amenazar con tirarme las patatas de la freidora a la cara (y haciendo amagos). Había 7 testigos. Jamás volveré y no se si denunciar","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier Vivar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIYF_cWDo8UoaoUz5YiKY3UDOTYWCfv6ExGu9oHpbvFEg8sDQS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Basta de malas reseñas. [{"Name":"Elena sofia Franzosi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhADSx0ilhDhX0HyNbYt2fCxaZiOCr_-RCHmSK3Tqq3zaiXkDt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience doing some smart working here. The upstairs area is specifically dedicated to people who want to study or work, which makes it quiet, comfortable, and perfect to stay focused for a few hours.

The atmosphere is cozy, the food is delicious, and the drinks are just as good. I would absolutely recommend this place if you’re looking for a nice spot to work or study while enjoying great quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9unc7out1LPl9aHrOrvO9&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roommates and I love GOD and are here all the time. The coffee is some of our favorite in Madrid, especially the cappuccinos & cortados, and the atmosphere is warm and welcoming. The staff are always kind, and it’s one of the few cafés where you can comfortably sit without feeling rushed. It really feels like a neighborhood spot, and we’re so grateful to have it so close to our home and also the ability to study there as well:)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0g1MnYb2_w-0d0LYK3nll&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Ziara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUymTPA7YTW7GwZTMxsaNNhYF_wiibB7zkShwJBdrE72p6jNI0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited over 10 cafés during my two-week stay in Madrid, but this one stood out – I just wish I had found it earlier! The vibe is so warm and relaxed, perfect for being alone, with friends, or family. The Americano was the best I had, the burrata salad was perfect, and the service was always kind. I spent several days here working, studying, and even drawing. I really love the whole café concept – the atmosphere, design, and spirit. If I ever come back to Spain, I’ll definitely come here again. ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENvlru7ax_nvMg&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Arielle sturk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqFKQH74DvVJhdmxJ7Q_8Hw2i_EzFGZJi235gsLkC7eHY72A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst customer service EVER. I wait in line to order and after I order the lady working said “oh if you’re going work here you can only work upstairs so you need to check if it’s full” I said ok no worries, I go and put my bag down upstairs and go to the counter because she was in the middle of my order. A big group comes in and she keeps ignoring me off to the side so then I asked her “excuse me would you like me to get in the back of the line” she said with an attitude “is your stuff on the couch?”I said yes, she said “you can’t work on the couch upstairs there’s signs everywhere I don’t need to tell you that” which she should have told me that to begin with after I put my stuff up there (it was very obviously it was my first time there). It was her attitude and how she acted like I shouldn’t even be in this coffee shop, the disrespect and not wanting to serve me was crazy!! You guys really need to work on how you treat people. My first time there and as of now my last!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Savannah W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUyr8WTLMHJ5qYXt0W-LBxU5GOjbdaUwuOOgErfJ4Exw1OxQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"☕️I got a vanilla latte - lovely, plus it can be difficult to find flavored lattes in Madrid
🥐variety of food options that looked yummy, but I didn’t try any
🖤cool vibes & good music
🪑plenty of seating - two floors
💻laptop-friendly tables on the second floor - very popular, would be a great place to work for a couple hours if you snagged a spot","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maya Florian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAxKQb6PHl7lBfApssgYfMmGeEE93NecYLVUjejYdlOPMCpIwW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible experience.
At first everything was fine. Then we were rudely told to move because “laptops aren’t allowed downstairs,” even though we weren’t using laptops at all. On top of that, we were told that even the way we were studying/working wasn’t okay — which makes absolutely no sense. So studying is not allowed either now?

What makes it worse: the person sitting right next to us was actually using a laptop downstairs, at a table where laptops are supposedly not allowed, and nobody said anything.

Upstairs was cold and uncomfortable, with unstable tables and chairs, despite a 25€ minimum consumption.

The coffee was awful (and I drink specialty coffee): extremely bitter, badly made foam. The chai latte was basically water.

Rude staff, terrible attitude. Never coming back. Not recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHsDdHkmXEwbmd9Ah0kXIzlHCy5s-EJ9KT0KS6YlcwVXDfXeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best in the area for sure. Staff super friendly and vibes couldn’t be better","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRHaahlAAFQuUDjqqmCsfM&fid=0x0:0x15279b0481db7f1b"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Dora O'Donnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSpsMR4xySRuvdQLQwR2S4ewCB8Fe5x8l3akXFbkKJ8j0P1Nk-cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our coffees and food were so good (avocado and tomato toasts). user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Xabier Granja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDBDFY79QSrweqnDBGDgTlRL0DAkGQXKPseySaZAr3w6G4dTyVqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee, likely the best bagels I’ve had in Madrid, and fair prices! This is the most NYC-style bagels I’ve found in Madrid, everything else just doesn’t compare. Staff were nice, you can get some work done or just hang out, and the place is chill. I’ll definitely come back and I recommend you try them out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVWyGv20l2bL9SkzcLoEt_&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Lindsey Golden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlYP-4D7mExmvKnnF5eGg7ZhuG_JbNXj8C-kuu_HWDmMOpNgyT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOW!! If you are traveling to Madrid and enjoy eating bagels, YOU NEED TO GO HERE!! I am currently visiting my boyfriend in Madrid and we decided to try Nopa Bagels this morning so I could get my bagel fix (I eat a bagel at least once a week). I got a plain bagel with chive cream cheese and my boyfriend ordered a bacon, egg, and cheese on an everything bagel. We were BLOWN away at how good the bagels tasted just by themselves. I mean ... just look at how beautiful the blisters are on my plain bagel for yourself! Gorgeous. The amazing taste and beautiful presentation was likely because they are sourdough bagels - like Apollo Bagels in Brooklyn, New York where people will wait in line for more than 30 minutes just for the delicious sourdough bagels. It all made sense when I met Nopa Bagel's owner and learned that he literally lived Brooklyn, NY for a long time! Nick was easily the friendliest restaurant owner I have met since arriving to Madrid and the atmosphere inside Nopa Bagel mirrored his hospitable demeanor. Further, as a testament to how good Nopa Bagel's food is, I believe I was the only tourist in the shop. It really seemed like a gem for locals and it will continue to be a gem for me. I can't wait to go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASyld7hejUA0kK5VlU2Icu&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Andy Cohen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7-l1UTqxdE31RVD5aulQz-Zn-l28rs5coaD_zM-zdKsOe6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I was ready to like these bagels, but they’re simply not good, and the sandwich preparation is poor.

I was drawn in by the beautiful blistering on the crust (this is usually a good sign that the dough has been properly fermented, allowing the bagel to develop its distinctive taste). However, the bagel I tried had a bready, unsatisfying texture: a bagel needs to be chewy! It should be a bit of work on your jaw, this bagel just fell apart like regular bread. This is the single most important feature of a bagel, and sadly they missed on it. Moreover, while the crust was beautiful, it was actually too crunchy rather than lightly crispy as it should be - this also messed with the texture.

My other big problem is the lack of sandwich making skills. Take a look at the picture of the pastrami sandwich. Verrrrrry little pastrami (the taste of which was also just okay). 90% of the sandwich is cabbage. If this happened in Brooklyn there would be riots.

Speaking of New York, i would not typically be so harsh if they weren’t charging New York prices. I come from a long line of NYC Jews, and I was looking for a little taste of home after moving here. Unfortunately the only familiar feeling I got was in my wallet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMBYdrBRS0QjVfe9rRJvqa&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Alvaro Nunez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9ua_z7YWGh8Oh8OFuREWO9vePa0qdoxnrJs-ZjYnCDjEsbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After living over 10 years in NYC I have finally found a place in Madrid with bagels that are as great as the best places in NYC. I was so excited to see they had bagels with cream cheese and lox on the menu and it surprised me how delicious it was. They also offer an excellent barista coffee in a great chill atmosphere which rises the level of the experience. I will go back soon to try more products on the menu!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ross fitzgerald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJba69iWZv8Wu30CIahyssWCrWpe-SG5roSX6Xkyq-P3QYDmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super friendly and helpful staff while also a buzzing atmosphere.

The bagels are sensational, we got turkey and the pastrami. The bagels themselves are made to perfection","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVMmTbmPaTzlhCUjbEHOdH&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Michael Simon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoztomQr8vY5y2JQ5-dbZ44adoM4Tif2yfC10WlwCG5DAhl-FN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From a Brooklynite: This is an absolutely legit bagel and lox. Had a sesame bagel, the perfect crust and chew. The salmon both tasted amazing and had the right texture. So happy to find this in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBItKOJH_ZT249xrEhfHdmS&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Anne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu5FVk5svAcp4qfjYsX4hhWsdsLNDUeTneWkh_s27ckuyqH9az=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my second time trying Nopa Bagels, and both times have been great. This time I ordered a Sunset Park Bagel (made with fresh scrambled eggs, cheese, and avocado) - the bagel was lightly crispy on the outside, and soft and chewy inside, the egg fresh and fluffly, and the combination of everything simply delicious. The coffee (latte) was good. The place is very comfortable - plenty of tables, and my friends and I sat and chatted for over an hour. It's also spotlessly clean. I also bought cinnamon rolls to bring home - they get those just right, too - tender, with the perfect combination of cinnamon and sweet (I do not like overly-sweet cinnamon rolls!). Definitely worth a visit, and I will be returning!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alhassan Migaybil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWtI_TlxNHJfVWdYWZlWEq0XKe4bd8WvqBNzDls0zXzss9GTM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I mean.. where do I start?
The owners were very welcoming and friendly the moment we entered the place. They gave us a little about themselves, the place and the bagels they offer. Great couple and I wish them all the best.
The food was too good. We got the brunch offer with an additional bagel.
Sunset park sesame bagel and turkey zaatar bagel. Really good options. Very filling. Very tasty. 10/10 would recommend.
The atmosphere makes you feel like you’re chilling in Brooklyn even if you haven’t been there.
Best brunch place I’ve been to in Spain so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXkJfl8gE&fid=0x0:0x2927f26810764dc4"],"When":"2024-10-12"}]

[{"Name":"harsh shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1dI-Tadx6yclaTVlKiLJAYnypx8bFtyRq5KZy44E0r8Nz4u9i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for evening drinks and very courteous staff too!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alvaro de la Cruz Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0FAqtKyQWb6DZu0hd7W6FXxjD37AvIoYPQFwWudKkaGp1DqCz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Un lugar que da de comer a muchas personas de las oficinas que hay por la zona.  El menú está bien, bastante normal, con comida muy normal pero esta bueno.

Mi nota negativa es por el servicio que dan. Da igual el día que vayas que siempre te recibirán con malas caras. Da la sensación de que siempre están de mal humor. El último día hasta me quitaron el menú de la cara de malas formas mientas lo estaba mirando…

No lo recomiendo teniendo otros restaurantes mejores y con mejor trato en las inmediaciones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR_9Lq9QE&fid=0x0:0xe88bb431f676362a"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Angie Angie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4QY8qoQT15EcShosxKa-u28zaO8htyB70tk6AfwlXTxgiKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pésimo desde el servicio hasta la cara de las camareras que les llega al suelo. Vamos que da gusto entrar allí para salir con disgusto. Con la misma mano que cobra y recibe los cacharros sucios la mete en la caja de las patatas y te las sirve así sin más. Te acomodas en un sitio a tomar tu bebida y te empotran los platos sucios de las mesas habiendo más espacio en la barra. Vaya que íbamos a comer pero se nos quitaron las ganas de la “buena vibra “","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Gabriel Robayo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMZYpdNYgHaEk1Hc2d286wF5nJQrdlmLwJGTeKKRKU-AQ5g9PN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor tortilla de patata del barrio el trato es agradable pero hay que ser inteligente para entender el rollo familiar del sitio no se fíen de los comentarios de otras reseñas el sitio siempre está organizado y limpio y las chicas que atienden son muy agradable y por cierto no necesitan ser familiares del dueño por son ellas la dueñas así que mucho respeto con los comentarios.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"HELENA CARVAJAL GONZALEZ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgtYKWAYhBY1yxPAP1NF-khwwrPQdXV5rUG5Lgvq9XhqEm0m5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"El único atractivo de este bar eran las tapas que ponían con la bebida pues las camareras son super desagradables y siempre parece que están molestas. [{"Name":"Maija Keil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMRy3LVgpnTH2p8TAjOMxxwxJEsDiOFh2h-aQMPV3I9sJ8Qgha=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came here for a Saturday coffee and study session with a friend and we really enjoyed the atmosphere. I ordered an iced latte and una tostada con tomate, both tasty. I really appreciated the interior design, everything from the art on the walls to the plate my food was served on, was cool and thought-out. The music was good too. It is laptop-friendly, but we did get kicked off our table in a bit of a rude way when it “got too busy and they needed the tables,” but no one actually ended up sitting at our initial table and we were shoved in the back on an uncomfortable high table.
Great atmosphere and vibe though, would recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeU05WKysH163FFqgcvAwO&fid=0x0:0x75a6064a16601665"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Jessica Bello Salguero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjf3k_eq67JiyzvMCplcIKm_dc9S8kBYqfrvEsScxxHPWqrFPlOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I really appreciate the answer by the cafe to explain why I was unlucky with the food. Great to see places listen to customers which is not always the case. Unfortunately I will not be able to visit this month to share about the food. Once I do, I will update the review.

I reiterate the service was very good. The barrister was very friendly and professional. I also liked the decoration of the place, minimalist and with style. It was comfortable to work from there. Ideally prices could be adjusted (I prefer when cafes charge the same for any milk). The toilet and the soap could also be improved","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ2J7Gfw&fid=0x0:0x75a6064a16601665"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Alicia P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKK6ndByQpDCnSd35Pa_SWe-T3ztE6BRZWzxIzcwWVbkQz47s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a cute coffee place! user_reviews: [{"Name":"Sergio García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8cplwJp-RIcoWMDEalkPfmMNXzH4adoFnBwzKohLstignAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Algo tan sencillo como un desayuno se ha convertido en una experiencia tan agradable que he tenido que poner una reseña. Es la segunda vez que vengo a esta cafetería restaurante y si la vez anterior disfruté de un excelente café y una tostada de aceite con tomate, en esta ocasión y al ver la buena pinta que tenía la de otro cliente al entrar, me decidí por probar su tortilla de patatas y aquí es donde debo hacer una pausa para aplaudir a este establecimiento porque es con diferencia una de las mejores tortillas de patata que he probado, ni muy poco ni muy hecha, en el punto perfecto y si a eso le sumamos que el café es buen café de verdad y la excelente limpieza del local junto con la correcta disposición del personal, pues lo dicho, comenzamos el día con un momento redondo. De corazón.. Gracias por hacer que existan negocios así, porque así da gusto.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7C_l3yhQ9Su2uvIlDPI-X\u0026fid=0x0:0x314c1e1a999519d2"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Javier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy-Cin4G8i9xmzs-6TECysleK0bbWZxy9dbA09_1wMZGmBINkS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mi experiencia: unos espaguetis que parecen hechos por un niño. Tiene dos plantas y también terraza en el centro comercial.
La atención fue muy rápida aunque poco empática… de hecho nos insinuaron que pagáramos abajo porque había personas esperando … no nos importó porque teníamos prisa … pero es un detalle que no nos gustó.

[{"Name":"Damian Górecki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjWLDRXc1JuFSMvpNelNtyYTDZLUXwEbiWO7Hy3jWNppmZUNnL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's an interesting place, I like the concept of an open kitchen. Unfortunately, the staff didn't speak English, so communication was minimal. But that's ok, coffee is a universal language ;) Breakfast was simple but tasty. The batch brew coffee was good, but it's a shame they didn't offer pour over. Only hojicha was average. Well, I drank better, even at home. Overall, it's a cozy place, good when you're in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGO7G3wK99CzsUnuXUdn8I&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Anastasia Yevtushenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeaueEG_uLlj8eUjWcyUq9MR7pj1n_PcxuF75ybQCym2R_14YTvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I didn’t really like the ice latte because it was too bitter for my taste. But the carrot cake was tasty!

The barista wasn’t friendly but in general I liked the vibe of this place. And the music was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJapfVuIrQ8RvvqzUAH3W6&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Olena Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhSSG4HghqUFi_mWFB4hGxTrUeY5O05dQcxGQxPBprptELmoW0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"spent a rainy morning here, and it couldn’t have been a better choice. The ambience is warm and peaceful — perfect for reading, meeting a friend, or just relaxing. And the coffee is truly top-tier. A place I’d happily return to and highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCiNIt3AvefP0akrlsNnGB1&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Janine Negrin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKEZ3laaBympGpdCwX4h0q4jmKGPA2pT_eV9PFX4Ciyn495pNBeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to stop for quality coffee and a toast. We loved the mocha orange. The matcha was fabulous too. The bread for the tomato toast is high quality. Friendly staff and perfect vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7HK1bnYJC6q-vJg2wLHT9&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Eric Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRzx0OhbyJw0H7jexR7CqvUGAtflmQXK1FhAx3MDLhRxmeceg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice little bohemian find in Madrid’s Malasana district. Good coffee. Nice neighborhood feels. Creativity community Artist hangout. This must be the place. Love finding places like this.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQ6W9lHoHN0-PUzeuctdao&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Martin Ti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI9UeXSNiPylX1fBMwVHUBmUEA9litKJrxcajOZDlcWU_SFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious coffee & food and a beautiful cafe. The coffee machine is set up so you walk behind the bar. It feels like you’re walking into somebody’s living room. So you do feel at home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9vR89ZhNGTtb2EJo70VLQ&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Ohia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmTFx5Xsc4Yedf08_kAuAubIDY-IKtUuZ1uRHEZD5Fw56FEDwz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SUPPORT THIS BEAUTIFUL BUSINESS.

While visiting Madrid to see Chicho Trujillo, the bad-ass revolutionary Cumbia band from Chile, I happened upon this gorgeous cafe. After a quick “Que onda?”, conversation with the owner felt like we had known each other forever.

Everything about this place made me want to stay all day. The super smooth coffee, queer photography books, cinnamon rolls, eclectic cozy ambiance, 90s hits playing at the perfect volume, and witty bilingual conversations with the owner make this place more than inviting. It kinda felt like home.

Whether you live in the city or you’re just visiting take a minute to stop in and grab a cortado, or cafe con leche, or whatever your favorite caffeinated drink might be, you won’t regret it.

If possible bring cash. Support small businesses.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9KifgphvZWe2H0cwf3zTv&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Gelo Petsvona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkT-pEJm2WFUVOh__yE0AURAx59esaN3Xe3HyZCfse6vl7Zw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Awesome little cafe, great for getting morning coffee, reasonably priced, good coffee. Interesting menu, we had three different toasts and they were all good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuwx-zoZHh8bflOYnbMGrw&fid=0x0:0x46e43714f833e192"],"When":"2025-10-8"}]
