user_reviews: [{"Name":"Anna Malczewska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9yJCRmCgyTQhowzmOMPQyusjMkRpVj8jwFMImib510PalD3s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a lovely café with amazing coffee! It’s been a while since I visited a place with such a great vibe. I ordered a pour-over and asked if I could choose the beans myself — the barista smiled and said yes, then told me all about the coffee I picked: where it’s from, the farm, and its flavor profile. He asked if it’s okay to brew it with a V60. He was absolutely wonderful — his energy, kindness, and smile lit up the whole place and everyone in it ❤️ The coffee itself? One of the best Kenyan brews I’ve had, served with a little info card. Truly a 10/10 experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8cycp8Waj7mjqj7acFOA1\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Ángel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULTsQNtaaWdNK_X35IfAs7Av_J2d1XmN-KLNDaBy1UY6QarWE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled on this place by pure luck. The vegan avocado toast was a masterpiece, lifted by a sprinkle of Maldon salt. Coffee hit the spot, and the service was warm, especially from the lady running the floor. Five stars. Best avocado toast of 2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHYj5mw3lF9Iy8ZvM1cWnh\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Rachel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaLM_WNZyuR1PIx00iYk9GbavHcSYUmzKj1NNbgya2Hgc-Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really nice ambiance and servers. Food options are good too and has vegetarian option. Pets allowed. Laptops as well but only on specific table and on weekends it gets really busy that you cannot do laptop or work there. Love the place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMyq5CT6lvqXmC-Vnsb-do\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Jo R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFRPRsQaxjweWB_qKQS60LPTiFl3JzrCju2UgbdOXvG8tPxyaT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this coffee shop.  Cute atmosphere, service was friendly and fast, food was delicious.  I had the BST (bacon spinach and tomato), my uncle had the grilled cheese, next time I’m having the avocado toast because it looked amazing and is a locals favorite.  No food photos bc we were busy eating it!  Cappuccinos were delicious as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKnnjPen7IKR_wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-5-22"},{"Name":"Maria Jose O.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYQJftCiwY2uEburAfPYoZDySTB2YdOv_WQl0c7NRhZvhF5A0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Expensive and not tasty. The place is really nice but i didn’t liked that you have to seat in specific tables if you’re reading with an ipad or kindle or working. The assigned tables are uncomfortable so can’t even see how someone can work on them. The matcha is expensive and i’ve had better ones for the price. The carrot cake wasn’t that bad but was dry as it looked old.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNPOy8d2pClFYZivKT0IDK\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-7-6"},{"Name":"Nataly Amezquita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlVvaFblqIBHco_wWXjXQ1Ya5nxAR0ijeOPcS1GyV0msUj9dks=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I have been here twice the chai latte is good.. but one of the wait staff was rude which it doesn’t make it a good place. We see two people whose came in and saw and round table available  he wanted to obligate us to sit at a table where all the people are on the laptop tightly squeeze. I feel his approach could have been a different.  We also saw him be rude to a father and a baby who sat for two seconds before leaving and asked him to get up from the couch because people will come in and not see a table available, meanwhile the table next to us was empty.  It sucks that this happened!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wilmarryme","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7ormXQ6hUzWDMU8fLeI_bA8QCvui8iFYf5AHbSpmLRnOfrLM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love the coffee here, it's rich, aromatic, and easily one of the best I’ve had in Madrid. This café is a perfect escape from the busy, crowded coffee spots in the city center. Tucked away in a quieter area, it offers a peaceful and cozy atmosphere that’s ideal for relaxing, reading, or getting some work done. The moment you walk in, you're welcomed by the warm, inviting aroma of freshly brewed coffee. Plus, they offer free Wi-Fi, making it a great spot to chill or be productive. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quality coffee and a calm, inviting space.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYyrmIvwE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5b44186e9365ca07"],"When":"2025-5-3"},{"Name":"Laura Amirchanov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyVCt6CKRFE-QfEM55jujnnZiPPtcHCdTTkytiAx5LfYXjRsP7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Good coffee and service, but if you want a place to work it is not the best. Can be crowdy and using the Wifi is only allowed for 45 minutes unless you order again. Allowing a complete hour access would be an appreciated change !","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Grayson Steinberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0FM-DTGeRq-ekiimGFBlFHH05AKAAIJzcPJgJV79ZCQwiCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Before I get into why I've left a three-star review, I'd like to point out that the service was excellent. Absolutely no complaints there.

My issue has to do with the false advertising on La Desayunería's new menu.

Context: We've always been big fans of La Desayunería, particularly for their pancakes (which are or, at least until recently, were the best American-style pancakes you could get in Madrid) and their marvellous skillet potatoes, drenched in cheese and sprinkled with generous doses of onions and peppers.

In fact, the first photo, taken back in August 2021 during one of our first visits to their Chueca location, features these very potatoes. They were so delicious, the skillet potatoes alone were enough to convince my partner to pay numerous repeat visits over the following three years, with and without at least half a dozen friends who we also converted into loyal customers.

Fast forward to today, about six months since our last visit. Besides the fact that prices of most dishes had increased an average of $2 to $4 in the interim, the skillet potatoes we ordered today did not remotely resemble our favorite dish (exhibit B: the second photo I've shared). Can the real skillet potatoes please stand up?

Not only were these alleged "skillet potatoes" a sad, microwave-reheated attempt at home fries, they were a world away from what La Desayunería had previously advertised as skillet potatoes.

I never imagined you guys would stoop this low, but I'm afraid that today I was deeply disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoyPmVfg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I like this place a lot. Visited a couple of times with family. Children friendly.
Generous portions, good prices. Friendly atmosphere.
I really like jars with cold water that are served directly when you sit at no cost!
My daughter enjoys pancakes so much! Last time we try those chocolate brownies - yummy 😋
Fries are tasty. The burger is good, especially the bread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZ7qCU_wE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-10-1"},{"Name":"RC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlKVKTxDPdnEjvP8YmcYdXkT1KBu0mDRTwyMd5NwPqlZxCSg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I ordered the grilled cheese sandwich with fried chicken!! The sandwich was nice but the fried chicken could be better ... it looked as it was re-heated... dry and hard to chew.

The place is well located in the restaurant area and tables available without reservation required.

They could have a lunch deal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPwKXqiAE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2024-11-20"},{"Name":"Lily Fune","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLl_Nd3Rk9TemDO5HAFBYBfC7yOxBhtbYOSS5LE1Bpet_x7-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our server name Islam was extremely nice and approachable.  He spoke English, which made our experience much less stressful and very helpful throughout our visit. His friendly attitude and great communication really made a difference. Excellent service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Montse Aroca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzgqSuZc3XOaq0dJtpI7NoIw6Scv-M9mhCfK9mYdEfhrlz0xFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and amazing food. I love that they served the food with a glass of tap water","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6nCYiMVvCZ_QFkOQVdDsN&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Amanda Donnelley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8InSUuIi1XDi6HdPNsvA5PbUmWTZuF3UUM0Ol9_In8dX2gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Only go for pancakes everything else sub par.  Service was slow, grilled cheese and fries were cold, fries said hand cut but they came from the freezer.   Pancakes were delicious and fluffy, huge plate of food.  The table was sticky and the tables were packed into this location so made it hard for families to get to get to tables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxr5OGYg&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Solis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkg6bjGMNoP_8Y-DXy7p0TtXTe2VEANXFKMEShZlC4sjHCf7GnBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Of the coffee places in Caliedo, this is my favorite. They have good coffee and cake. It was also not too crowded, while the playlist was awesome. I can't wait to comeback for the pancakes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwzPvMdw&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"António Ribeiro Lima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiXNy-z8DnPA3Ry_rM-vu5gz7taDMlJUFJ_jas4EzJpjuTQWXr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Avenger is known by smashing and destroying pancakes, reason why he told me, the storyteller to pick a pancake place and let him know, that's what I did.

He wants to throw a Divorce Party for his Divorce Tour in Madrid, and in his last podcast episode, "How to Throw a Divorce Party and Ignore being Alone" he told about the power of pancakes which he started liking by watching The New Day, a wrestling faction composed by Kofi Kingston, Xavier Woods and Big E. He feels the power of positivity and how people are happy by consuming them.

If you're looking for healthy pancakes this is not your place, I was looking for that, but on the other hand, if you're looking for diabetes and sugar rush, this is your place, the service is pretty fast, which would let The Creator happier than ever, it would be even quicker than he would get back to "action" , and they keep you hydrated by giving you a glass of water, the only non-sugary thing.

Ventilation system is quite good, if you wanna work there's space, and music is from your God's playlist, of course! The bathroom it's mixed but big, you can relax inside while changing your diaper.

In general pretty good, and in an area with a lot of options, Throw your party and have some calories","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRz8jNxQE&fid=0x0:0x5bd4d8907b25031d"],"When":"2023-4-13"}]

[{"Name":"Nikos Gkekas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN3C01iDzOo4jHsOUqjcjowoBrQjZNgAzWHYiwpxxYw7ttCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect place for breakfast or a fast lunch in a family business. The tortilla with the caramelised onions and cheese was tasteful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICGhNSznQE&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2021-10-20"},{"Name":"William Molina Gener","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjdmjb7BIPBDkvvq7ktW31djOulnPtkV9_GMJ18BAHbX0U0UNb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pasé un día por casualidad y desde entonces se ha convertido en mi cafetería de referencia para desayunar. Tienen, sin duda, los mejores pinchos de tortilla de todo Madrid: he probado el clásico, el de trufa, el de picadillo de chorizo y el de jamón… ¡todos espectaculares!
El personal es amabilísimo, te atienden con una sonrisa y hasta te preparan el café como te gusta sin que tengas que decir nada.

Un sitio de 10. Totalmente recomendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3BwM1kFx1y28vNBPvY0zs&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Roberto R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnE3JqOttVYEFozmpGZ7YxDa_zWt-98ASB5ma2y1SnToBT3avt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cafetería clásica situada cerca de nuevos ministerios , un local no muy grande con un barra larga , bastante gente a la hora del desayuno.

Yo fui a desayunar y pedí el pincho de tortilla con cebolla , un pincho bastante generoso , pata cortada en trozo irregulares , bien frita , buena proporción de huevo y patata , muy jugosa , sabor correcto , punto de sal ok y pan normal.

Resumen : Bastante buen pincho de tortilla

Puntuación : 8.2

Precio : 4.75","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC8GxdUpUpRNB8doZkEYv0&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"vicenta sobrino bolaños","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3mG5-YUfzRzqoixCF0xxMDW70QLoVJoEFmZY7oaI9gT1F0TGAcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bar muy bien ubicado en Madrid. Carta de bebidas y tapas muy completa. Tortillas de 10, varios tipos. Muy sabrosas y bien elaboradas. Los dueños lo mejor. Atentos y muy profesionales. Obligatorio para tapeo. Recomendable 100 %","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrkcWQoxkSptgU4RpD3RIn&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Manuel garcia sevillano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgtaACk7Ij0HWIovKp3KDv5e5umTWgogD5WkQbWj-0fLP2JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio con encanto , donde podrás degustar entre una de ellas la tortilla de patata , para todos los gustos
Gracias por el trato recibido .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeFZbx45sfFi90n6TaYsi7&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Pablo Fernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiaKNiP2P7xsrZ1_UQvCZ2d4ytiuItke9-TrIlRAiR28tGOtSB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El mejor sitio que he visto para tortillas, con mucha variedad de ellas, local pequeñito.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGhymZKIr5wkkjcV6vjC_k&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Cristina GP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlIOY4bphMbFMv9W7XzsV9tOKXv68xV0ont6zjJ_SxPYJeog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hoy he descubierto un nuevo lugar justo al lado del centro de salud de Espronceda, y enfrente de el centro de especialidades de Modesto Lafuente. Se llama cafetería La Pepa. Leticia, una artista en la cocina, no para de salir de la cocina con tortillas espectaculares y una sonrisa, con cebolla, sin cebolla, con cebolla caramelizada, con queso de cabra, con chorizo y 1000 variedades más… todas ellas cuajadas por fuera y blanditas derretidas por dentro. El ambiente, debido a su proximidad, Está plagado de médicos/as, enfermeros/as, celadores, etc. Ruben el Camarero, una carrera de fondo en escasos 10 m de barra, alucinante. Tiene oídos para todo el mundo, y una contestación amable para cada uno de ellos. El café buenísimo, yo que lo tomo solo y sin azúcar, puedo dar fe que sienta bien y tiene buen sabor…  Sin duda es exactamente recomendable para venir a desayunar, o para venir a tomar un pincho de tortilla en cualquier momento del día.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICPhbuhjQE&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2024-11-26"},{"Name":"Irene Guzmán-Benito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7bj6hFmnsKbddas1oGhTY-3xLO8dJUjCwyTJlSIPIzDI-9YhtUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Realmente tienen de las mejores tortillas de patata que he probado nunca! Son muy amables y te hacen sentir bienvenido, además son tremendamente rápidos y eficientes. Siempre que viajo a Madrid me paso por allí. También puede pedirse para llevar!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfqdCvaw&fid=0x0:0x659d272c4372f082"],"When":"2025-1-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mich Cam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV135An19lwVjuDr_8EAjSkQKRntU7gaN_T7YYn_dEBlyvPDB8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really good cheesecake! 🍰

🙋‍♀️ Tourist here!

We stopped by this place based on a friend’s recommendation (they live in Madrid) – they specifically told us to try tarta de queso, so we came just for that, right after lunch.

The tarta de queso didn’t disappoint! It was super tasty, nicely baked, and not overly sweet. My husband and I shared one slice because the portion is actually pretty big for just one person.

Personally, I still prefer a more traditional cheesecake – I like the firmer texture and the sweetness, while this one has a softer, almost liquid center. But my husband absolutely loved it!

We’d definitely come back to try other dishes next time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzg7GKUNvxciUM9jCySIe1&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Robert Doris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq9U43UMcqgrhBi4JRU5gUOA-6TYnBjlTOmZGiGj2okJGNI1At=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ate our midday comida (main meal of the day in Spain) here on October 20,2025. We sat outside. Our waitress was Mariana. She was wonderful and made this meal a great  experience. The three of us had the menú del día which is a fixed price three course meal with drink. Delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAx_ruzi05fQ5Z_WDAvWqLm&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Callum Murray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEYnjw3m2qR-8qVRzMe4J6q1oguin97w1fD0EJSx7xKkghQTdr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Omg the cheesecake says it all. So well balanced the sweetness, the savoriness and also the super creamy and liquid center!!! The other dishes were quite average with nothing particular to call out and thank them so much for preparing an early lunch device for us (12:00).
Would strongly recommend everyone to come here to have a try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD35H7pQE&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2024-4-3"},{"Name":"manu muraleedharan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlFwdDdnyRQ_YgPNKS5thNKtgH728byhtwqMPzh5eYZQb44Gv6XQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Oh the cheesecake at this place is out of the world. It was really nice to sit outside on a winter morning and partake in it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxMgq3pX5g-ZN1tQOGlkxH&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Jose Luiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPlLIbOnx8kuKf3yfPMSjVaAaBINmzqGen9oj2LncWP4O8Ejoj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice food, quick service.

Only a bit noisy, well, this is Spain, noise is normal...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_X4JnWDXyBwG-vyvFknDO&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Enrico","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURJ97MeXORzlE8YaRgLS9P6ehTQWvBPZS6hG_tqqXLLxzHV0Sm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally the BEST cheesecake I have ever had! I had a lot of them with different twists but this one in its simplicity truly just hit me. We actually went only for the cheesecake and to have a break from the heat. Staff was really friendly and surely well trained. Prices are a bit high but the cake was worth every single cent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICuyvWexgE&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2022-7-25"},{"Name":"Bob Dyck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOBnpvRUysw27lwMVceFMZ7cVWi1e_EXCvt4Yba3LE1tLcA-ug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We wanted to have a decaf americano about 11pm. We tried and tried with no luck until we came to La Bientirada.  Even though it was quite late and all we wanted at the time was an Americano, they were very accommodating. The decor was delightful. The coffee was wonderful.

We are heading back now.

Do yourself a favour and try it out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC79dPhOw&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2024-8-17"},{"Name":"afnan fandi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpM3_ZScT_NoJnUH1oC1fr3qfRAL-7eTfK5QyFYrdPhqF-TwRC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Outstanding service, making up for the average quality of the food. From the moment I walked in, the attentive and friendly staff ensured a welcoming experience. While the dishes were satisfactory but not exceptional, the exceptional service provided by the waitstaff truly stood out, making it a memorable visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ-vGK7QE&fid=0x0:0x6e7399bdd3a229d2"],"When":"2023-6-25"}]

[{"Name":"Norma Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOH3gcMTvZ5BuuAUjKD-Y_-Kmj3JIBeqL5s6STVmnSw6wSG4V7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to Alabao because my husband wanted to try their Cuban food, and it ended up being such a wonderful experience. Even though they didn’t have vegetarian options on the menu, the owner went out of his way to make me a delicious veggie pasta dish. I also asked about fresh juices after seeing them on Instagram (apparently they’re only offered on Sundays), but he still checked if they had mangoes — and they made me the most amazing mango juice! The service was above and beyond — so kind, friendly, and genuine. Great food, great people, and such a positive atmosphere. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen Kovacs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjaeC21n1xKlv0QVt1LO0SGKwfS5wqqKyufy7m1LISCHzjgqt4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We enjoyed a wonderful lunch at Alaba'o including a perfectly cooked tuna steak with a side of Cuban rice and black beans. [{"Name":"Leonie Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqE6HpDK52xdFw783Fpx1m7U4vR5POSQXfBzKaDXpmPNAIpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A little slice of Sardinia in Madrid!

Beautifully renovated place with lots of charm. The food was absolutely delicious – super authentic and clearly made with love. The chef and staff were incredibly warm and welcoming. For a moment, it really felt like we were in Sardinia. A must visit!! 😍👌🏼 and don’t forget to order the Seadas as dessert!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-ULQnHeFghBBaCxzFhNZP&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Review Lover 777","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzGR_uGvnk6n18Xx2LO0QwzxHFLMjYMX7J3pRBEYu7KABw-nk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant deserves 10 stars. Not only is the food amazing, but the staff is so kind and generous! My daughter felt sick during the meal (seems like early stages of the flu) and these guys went above and beyond to make her comfortable and took care of her until the taxi came. We are grateful for your hospitality and kindness! Keep up the good work. We will be back soon!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nayla Hasna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsP6SOGC3mFZf8nDlUKP_iV3WFk-nhhs789LqL8NZMBWACBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Food was not why i wouldn’t come back to this place. Refreshing salad, tasty carbonara with crunchy guanciale, and a delicious tiramisu. It’s a shame it all ruined because of one of the waiter who were rude for no reason.
Beside getting told the very first time we entered the restaurant that we only had 1,5 hours to be here and not in a nice way of saying that, we sat down anyway because of the good reviews of the restaurant. The lady who took our order was actually kind, but the other one is just insoportable. Drinks and the salad came rather fast, but after some time, the lady came back to us confirming if we ordered a carbonara or some other menu (couldn’t catch what she was saying) around the time the carbonara was supposed to be there already. Anyway it came, about 15 minutes before we were supposed to leave the place. And this carbonara we were waiting for was just dropped on our table without saying a word. Without even looking at us. Just dropped. It was a delicious carbonara with quite generous amount of guanciale, but we ate it in silence because we both were pissed. A simple smile or any kind gesture would make up all the time we waited for it. A man came to us to ask how was the carbonara, talked to us nicely in a friendly way, which i think the only thing made me smile when i was there was because of his warmth. When asked for the bill, that very same rude waiter again just dropped the bill rudely it even made a sound of the box hitting the table. We checked the bill where at first they put the bread we did not order so we had to correct it.
I would not expect this kind of experience from this level of a restaurant in this price range. It is not cheap, the least we deserve is getting treated with basic respect. Good food is simply not enough when you leave a place feeling disrespected and unwelcome.
I suggest anyone who values a pleasant dining experience to think twice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoqazrjwE&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Mihai Ionescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJS_uVoSl9vmjeYLy8chd3JCX_WgbXICNvlH5tuq-P2XKAbBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely spot in Madrid! The fish and meat carpaccios were both excellent, and the calamarata was absolutely delicious. The seadas were just as good as the ones we’ve had in Sardinia. Highly recommend this place. We also really enjoyed chatting with Nino about Sardinia—it added a personal touch to a great meal. We’ll definitely come back next time we’re in Madrid! Grazie mille, Nino!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDztoJIn74r97cAas6gOeHW&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"Richard Bean","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdjYpoNXsN4fafOISAzUxSgmAzJt7JK3UJGsRTmfDJKbHO7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a terrific place. The food is really outstanding and the host is excellent - helpful, informative and charming. Interesting and really well executed dishes with a lot of good thinking behind them. We had the spaghetti vongole and fregula al gambero rosso - both outstanding, and a delicious Sardinian rosé. Highly recommended. (Only constructive criticism - dim the lights a bit!)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leonardo Rossetti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb8FpL_Et_D73XbF-U-fb09PQyj0aa1XprKmILNgnpcy-47OpsTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic place. The food was amazing, we had the queso fundido, the calamarata with shellfish and then cheesecake (which we recorded because it was delicious) and the seadas.

Everything was fresh, service was super attentive! I couldn't recommend this place enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP7PHh6QE&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"נבו שבח","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0Rzh3QdE-tpiqk47cGW05noFmwOWZ8QF397oSRRfPb83a0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent!!
The food was delicious, the wine and the digestive was just perfect and above all, the owner of the place has such a good and welcoming vibe sharing with us the Sardinian experience.
10/10!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9mIvmxhpEbYdD5quYKxLM&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Anton Sakhniuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_Bl8NQSfebhs_iqIjdfpCk0cGQ0jZvUtbX3mYVuo1Ya7XQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It’s a shame that rude customer service from one of the waitresses ruined our experience enough to never want to come back. The food is really tasty, but from the first moments we’ve been addressed very rude, which you wouldn’t expect from a restaurant of this level. We were 15 minutes late for our booking because of an accident happening on our way there, out of our control. First moments, we were told we’d have to leave 1.5 hours after our booking time. It was weird but okay. After finishing salad, our pasta took a long time to arrive - 15 minutes before we “had to leave”. The waitress just threw it on the table without saying a word. When asked for a bill, initially she included the bread (€3.8) which we refused from the very start so we had to ask them to correct it. Again, bill thrown at a table like we’re unwanted there.
Because pasta arrived late we didn’t leave at the time they warned us - we left around 2 hours after initial booking time - and there were a number of empty tables, which makes me wonder - why did they want us out of it that fast, even before we sat at our table? This is not a good look

The other lady and the chef were nice, but just one rude person is enough to never want to eat there again, despite delicious kitchen","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoyaP8Ew&fid=0x0:0x426831e6016c7d85"],"When":"2025-4-26"}]

[{"Name":"Dilruba Erkan Ozdemir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc0eq3wtBEbYqxwyzyr-YsGNLrI_tfTFQisX-LIQRc6Gow4ljq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"About the starters, bread was good but butter wasn't really. We liked the croquetas but didn't like the sauce of prawns.

About the main dishes, we found the steak tartar very different than usual and very tasty but the sea bass was just average.

As a desert, we had torrija and didn't find it very interesting either.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDowbjbOg&fid=0x0:0xd62cda5cde114690"],"When":"2025-4-25"},{"Name":"Isabella Rigamonti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-XBeH13yWkYk7-DPCyWx1M5rtUucDpPYqQOMt0Ra-KwCOjXP1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible new place!
We live around the area and saw this new restaurant, we were so pleasantly surprised!
The food was incredible and also a bit different which we really enjoyed.
The BUTTER was great!! And the steak tartare very different than usual and soo good!
They have a lot of gluten free options and great gluten free bread.
The owner and servers were all very very nice and attentive.
Great place and affordable prices! Will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZtcH_vRUuUYvaUriludZn&fid=0x0:0xd62cda5cde114690"],"When":"2025-6-15"},{"Name":"Alicia Cenda Pigné","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp5QmyssB_zFDOPCCA2hYCajG7oa3Je1tEG2zQWDKU7nqhG1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came here twice and the food was amazing both times. However, during my second visit, the experience felt more like running a marathon than enjoying a restaurant meal.

The waiter was extremely insistent on clearing our plates, repeatedly trying to take them away every few minutes. At one point, they even removed my friend’s plate while she was still eating, which was quite shocking. This happened about five minutes before the end of our reservation.

Throughout the dinner, we constantly felt pressured and watched, as if we needed to rush and finish quickly. I would recommend this place for fast eaters, but not for those who want to enjoy their food calmly and in peace.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kamila Iskairova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6Pq3wyR91VJqqlnthhKiCoGuh_rxDFsO2565SHMNHDZE9BZtF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We celebrated a family event at Pangea. Carlos and his team delivered a great service. He was very attentive and made sure everything went smoothly. Our guests were mentioning the high quality dishes and lovely atmosphere. We are very happy with our choice. Definitely recommend this place ♥️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Max Hewitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEAccQtIgOmLIakqB2INS0nwjxl57VmFCufyeCc_ASldjJvw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic, elevated modern Spanish restaurant. Highly recommended for any occasion","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Beth Phipps","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRD-_aAp4frIwpA7IwGvvzE15vy5T3vBGIAYT90O1S855brk9F=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great relaxed atmosphere, wine was awesome and to steak tartare was one of the best I've ever had. Todos los platos que probamos estaban deliciosos. Todos coincidimos en que la ensaladilla es sin duda la mejor que hemos comido en nuestra vida, casi parecía mousse de lo suave que estaba. Cabe destacar la atención inmejorable de Júlia: estuvo increíble, fue muy amable y atenta. Hizo que la experiencia de comer allí fuera aún mejor. Quizá el único punto a mejorar serían las sillas, ya que eran un poco incómodas. A pesar de que hacía frío en la calle y la puerta del local se abría con frecuencia para servir a las mesas de fuera, dentro del local en planta calle se estaba bien. Todas las mesas estaban llenas y aún así el nivel de ruido estaba bien. Lo recomendaría y volvería sin duda.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvPuUvIT7n_IzUj05qodFr&fid=0x0:0xd4a395e06aa75a52"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Mireia Solà Llort","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1zg68MpPKmX0TlXXpG7n5ZOGhnr5LwQM_QRUFs5AWJ7-awRDKVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He pasado muchas veces por este restaurante y no le había dado la suficiente atención. Servicio muy atento y todos los platos que hemos probado estaban muy buenos: las croquetas muy sabrosas, el atún, las berenjenas…

La tarjeta tíquet Restaurant no me ha funcionado.

Pd. Recomendable llevar suelto si quieres dejar propina.

Ahhh y recomendable reservar. Tiene terraza","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7P1dNKbwTXzY-73NI1Tju&fid=0x0:0xd4a395e06aa75a52"],"When":"2025-10-10"}]

[{"Name":"WILINTON VEGA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUh74dl5aoFg83ZawsZbdpgyzpS2VAFP7PNM4Ep71uL5eLuR4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Taste of Home at La Rochela – Authentic Colombian Flavors in Madrid

Someone recommended La Rochela, and after seeing the great reviews, we decided to give it a try — and it was absolutely worth it! The restaurant offers authentic Colombian dishes, and for us, living in Canada, it truly felt like finding a little treasure from home.

We started with Platanitos con Hogao, perfectly cooked and full of flavor, followed by a generous Bandeja Paisa with all the traditional ingredients — delicious, comforting, and beautifully served.

The customer service was excellent. Even without a reservation, the staff quickly found us a table and made us feel very welcome.

I highly recommend La Rochela to anyone looking for authentic Colombian cuisine in Madrid. Warm atmosphere, great service, and incredible food — a wonderful experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFaP8pTbLibVjSpSGPx7mo&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Jorge Gomes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSmVl9jiDsoUFlxyZY-GJMkEmxVUIcI4jXxKH03O4a4-wydTYj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty colombian food. Large portions. Friendly service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCRlg7IlkxbMy_4LJ9V7v7&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Yolanda Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwQhkBbVImmw3z4XgaGYHHZKc2stLiB_bFtWuNoiR0_9uJLL-E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite restaurants in Madrid — not only because it serves authentic and delicious Colombian food (the best ajiaco in town and the tastiest dorada with patacones), but also because they make you feel at home. Pair your meal with a refreshing mango, lulo, guanábana,  or guava juice, and don’t miss finishing with a tres leches or brevas con arequipe (figs with dulce de leche). If you are craving Colombian flavors, this is the place. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDW_aOkSmkobi72fbnNB8Kc&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Cho Wei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKCr41mVjIPZfazqs6viGZN1VjXQC2IPNA4CD1_9oYEZLUnPId=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was on. Point. Can’t complain about the food whatsoever. The país bandeja straight up sent me into coma, just like how my Colombian friend’s mom made it when I visited her in bogota. Beautiful plate.
The reason I gave it a 4 star (I can’t give 4.5 cuz I really would) was the service and the layout of the restaurant. No doubt when the food is smashing the line has gotta be long. We were rushed a little bit throughout our dining time. I understand that there are reservations, and I really appreciate the wait staff giving us the heads up.

I’d book ahead of time next time, so there’s plenty of time to eat and chat and take in all the food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBuJrfgGqZjHBP9hvCp2Uh&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Reece","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoCXwjAkURv1KALx0KH8aCoqXv04YnOEvgFoT-7h5BNhXI62c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really delicious food! Really large portion size.. would definitely order the sancocha again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZTC9qwAJaBxgFZUYdj3JQ&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Manuel Salvatierra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqORJJMlMdM6LfNtLSYqdJcJ39mU6ImsKqYSWDbleDa7G8VX4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly authentic Colombian restaurant.  When we had dinner there were lots of Colombian families having dinner as well and most staff is colombian as well which tells you pretty much it's going to be great. You have to try the chicharrón, whole fried fish and tostones. Full of flavor.  Dishes are plenty full so you can definitely share.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXze2v6AE&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2024-10-19"},{"Name":"Sahar Boroumand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMP7T7bcmIzhfChXAQn27nNddJa3KqRFWujvTcYRRRcci3P9VYRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a great experience. Food was so good. Be aware! Dishes mostly are so big. We were a big table and everybody was so happy with food. As a vegeterian I had lots of choices.
Staff were so freindly and welcome. I think prices concider to quanitity and quality were fair enough. We will come back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvg7SFrAE&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"iVan Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX03tS8FT_CzYgFh704KrdJeNKZkTFdMrHH-o0BG3-q77EEU-JqGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very very good and authentic Colombian restaurant in Madrid. Hands down the most authentic one in the city. The Ajiaco is done as they do it in the capital city, Bogota where it derives its original name "Ajiaco santafereño". Creamy yet not too heavy. I also appreciated the protocols to keep everyone safe. From measuring the temperature, to the cleaning carpet and the pretty useful mask holder! :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICC5fbBtwE&fid=0x0:0xb520b0adaa4659bc"],"When":"2020-8-30"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Aud-Marie Anglevik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIktxVThDmQNBh2NUWvnQum7MABlWNM7GFj9L3FMU08CRFFZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing, possibly the best I’ve ever had. I’m almost embarrassed to say, but this is the first time I’ve had to lick my fingers in public. The service provided by Christian was great as well, giving reccommendations and keeping the good coming at a perfect pace. Will definitely come back here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwwO6EJA\u0026fid=0x0:0xb528d9a4f0bdea97"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Dissa M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlr1UyigdwfhTuHHng4FmhMhL4ARtpq3-EcimwcEaAj4hC1dw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad we found this place. Everything we ordered was good especially the mussels, kimchi wings, tuna and the chocolate dessert. The service was also outstanding. Cesar made an effort translating the menu and took time explaining each dish. It was a really good experience that we went back on our last night in Madrid. Would definitely be back when in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDe58Ca7QE\u0026fid=0x0:0xb528d9a4f0bdea97"],"When":"2022-10-21"},{"Name":"Fermin Andujar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1OrPKmCDnm8fvFv9h5wr8wyH6XKbDEdVB2rLcLSgk1eRRvrGUgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LOVED this place. Everything from the dynamic menu offering to the chef, Cesar. The wings were super crispy and was a bit shocked at how solid they were considering were in Spain - this is coming from someone that eats a lot of Korean fried chicken. Also highly rec the tomato dish (can't remember the name) but it was a really refreshing appetizer to start with. All in all highly rec this place, good energy, good food, good people.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxgdbK3wE\u0026fid=0x0:0xb528d9a4f0bdea97"],"When":"2023-5-18"},{"Name":"Steve Greenblatt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwxE3lIVXRP5oDvgEz45BNyW09GgWMZzE9Wl4d_i2wBoY9LnqV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a delicious dinner at this lovely little local spot in Chamberi. We shared the tomato carpaccio, the mussels, and the  Asian salmon. Each dish was great! The waiters were very nice ... and worked with us on our less-than-stellar Spanish!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDKt874qqnDejDH2rue92lnsBzMx8DGvL9dFnKgPFvj6bU5VNT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were positively surprised by the excellent dishes we found in this restaurant. All were super tasty but from my POV, the carpaccio was the best one. On the other hand, the staff, it’s really friendly and attentive so makes you feel very comfortable. I will return again for sure!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-q7fcVA\u0026fid=0x0:0xb528d9a4f0bdea97"],"When":"2022-11-13"},{"Name":"Manuela Uccello","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXl5j-1B6avbvrEHazx2G8AcbMs6lp2iMVQwLvZGdwgAOW6Uw9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is honestly one of the BEST restaurants in the world. The concept is incredible, a fusion of mexican, spanish and asian culture, which was soooo fullfilling and so innovative and DELICIOUS. The owner explained every single dish concept with enthusiasm and knowledge, thickling our curiosity. Every time you try a dish, you never want It to finish. The tuna tartare with lime is to die for, the Bao with fried squid and their special mayonaise is just pure lust. The price is totally fair. Highly recommended, you can trust the Italian and the Greek!😏 muchas gracias for the amazing experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR38TQfA\u0026fid=0x0:0xb528d9a4f0bdea97"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Karolina Juzwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXS_YphXB-KA7UucVMA2fzBieyHJ-kCkYwJfbxfEue2L7KiaGXj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were super lucky to get in that restaurant on a busy Friday evening. The chef was so nice to find us a place and talk us through the menu. The food was mind-blowing. Carpaccio with truffle paste and mustard ice cream was insane. Amazing cooking from the heart. [{"Name":"Joey Jex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwrOE2gSMWIeNSljLr7FhUnxrZgBr6FQoSa_u3QW8qvCBSbiYj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t recommend Villa de Foz highly enough. I really enjoyed my food here as well as the ambience and service provided. The perfect local restaurant.

I had and my go to are the Octopus/Pulpo A Feira, Grilled Garlic Prawns/Gamba Ajillo - which are the best I’ve tasted in Madrid and I’ve tried a few and Galician Beef Entrecôte - which was absolutely perfectly cooked and tasted fantastic.

For me, this is a gem of Madrid and a place you must try whether you live here or just visiting!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vlad Petreanu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3FrXK8WLXgtssOYpZ-IHVpVcZ6ClmdFfGb2Pb-9zsLVwZ828ucg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good experience, excelent meals, lovely interaction with Adriana, the manager. It’s a local’s place and the restaurant can get packed later in the evening (after 9 PM it gets crowded very quickly). The pulpo a la feira (a la gallega) is unbelivably tender! Also do try the boletos con huevos. You can also get very good wines at reasonable prices. Highly reccomended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICGrbXRuQE&fid=0x0:0xc3577d4a4b8a15a5"],"When":"2021-11-6"},{"Name":"Ruben Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgkPWK-omdVGanTi5qLBm0XHu5MeqjGWycm3fNkD_nAZBhfdS_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recommended by locals and simply impressive!! How good remains over the years. Quality is superb 👌. Long life la Villa de Foz! And came back again and again better....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZwvmwSQ&fid=0x0:0xc3577d4a4b8a15a5"],"When":"2023-9-27"},{"Name":"Marc Halbheer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuwu7c95dMKujPN5bzF2RbG4jZKQSetbaF57ywlVWGM0WBfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately totally disapointing. Not very good food, very expensive for what it is. The service mediocre. We regret to have eaten in that place!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oswaldo Alves Viegas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXE3Qn0KrekmPhM35HaXERfAQBTrn53ISZhhPe07mZl825anqOlMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excelente place if you like sea food and fresh fish. The service is very proficient and fast. The menu is diverse and the price fair","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDm9LbdYA&fid=0x0:0xc3577d4a4b8a15a5"],"When":"2022-1-20"},{"Name":"Iñaki Serraller Vizcaino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhvHrAv8Kc-m5Bm_IVNlwWh45Pq9zJ5b0t8qi6y_ns-x3lBhE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great galician produce expertly cooked. Professional and kind service from the hardworking owner. A nice place to enjoy a good meal at a leisurely price. Fair price considering the quality of the food.

The wine list could be improved but it's definitely serviceable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos de la Barra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1TeLGOXSR8O99R0YUYp7WW1MCM_t95PPNRiJU-Esv6qRxNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a great surprise! We walked in the later part of a rainy Saturday afternoon. It wasn't full ... which was a huge surprise for a lunch time in Madrid.
They took amazing care of us, we order the Salt Baked Fish and the Beef to Share. The Quality of the produce and the cookign methods were spot on... I am still surprised it was not full. Wine prices are fair! Food is excellent and service is caring. I will go back soon, we really enjoyed it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"lisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqQwuR9csf0ep11oQo6_0AssmKHCAes4onnVSdVjXqzRzzdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was our favorite restaurant in Madrid-exceptional service, food and wine, very attentive and friendly and helpful staff.  A  beautiful family owned and operated business which is highly cared for.  Thank you for the lovely afternoon!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Cristina Lupusor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJaYxGhAbirtfEkHdku8vvQAIiIIZU2GpH6Zh4xdbvdx1FyXPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyed the food and the ambiance! They recommend two plates per person which we found to be very fair.

We also liked the fact that the menu was well thought out and had a limited number of positions that were very well executed.

The service was friendly and helpful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBk1Ub5P1bccy6jbA5yAAOQ&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Mona Tauber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2zxf5mcI1MFzQM3QiiosjolFaX_YRMoHRGRBNMfHFVvGEIf0y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Grateful that a local told us about this gem! Nestled in the lively and beautiful Trafalgar neighborhood, we enjoyed every aspect of this dining experience, from the sexy decor that created the perfect ambiance and the friendly wait staff that engaged with us about the creative menu (& restaurant name) to the beautifully-presented plates of elevated dishes that arrived at the right time to allow us to savor the moments & meal together. The owners are fluent in both Spanish and English, making it easier for guests to order and feel welcome. Don’t miss this gem when dining in Madrid. There is a reason why this spot is popular among locals and their reviews are well-earned. They pay attention to every dining detail.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoJyLpCYNhF3LvR3E2L6Xc&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Tania HLR","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9FUAIqqYF-I4DpABfUBMoJ9e9fY-62NzNiQdBcJ60WalcDaup=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great place!! Located in the vivid area next to all the terraces in the square of Olavide. They also have a terrace, they have used the indoor space in a great way but there are a couple just looking at a wall but the whole place is well decorated and a lot of thought put throughout. The restaurant is a great concept with a combination of different cousins in the Mediterranean with the creation of an island as a concept. Menu might seem small but oh man is it worked through and absolutely delicious!! All the plates are sharers and believe me you want that as you want to try as many as you can. The service was exceptional with helpful and very nice, will definitely coming back and recommending to more people!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIvrz5gAE&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2025-4-2"},{"Name":"Anastasiia Marufenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7RaVjtyE6XczeE3REvEWAsckw_QTx0edjW9Lzgw7ohUn110qW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a treasure we’ve found in Madrid! The food was just a masterpiece! Everything was so delicious, and for me, as for Ukrainian, it was such a special experience to know that the chef is Ukrainian and find some Ukrainian ingredients in some of the dishes. The staff is spectacular, and the customer service is at the highest level. The place is so well designed and perfectly thought through. This is definitely the restaurant I’d recommend my friends to visit, and I’d go again myself!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEO35w_PPytyv8wE&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Jesus Andres Duque","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUGnF2yZnYMsM4nG5mMbqAnEKmBBUC2idPyykwpomTSAFjacTi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited this incredible restaurant, and it truly exceeded expectations. The story behind the menu was fascinating, and the recommendations made by the staff were spot on. Each dish offered a unique and delightful experience, from the artichokes and monkfish to the tartare, butifarra, and lamb. Every dish surpassed the other, with perfectly balanced flavors, aromas, and textures.

Additionally, the wine recommendation was superb, perfectly complementing the dishes. The team was extremely knowledgeable, explaining the entire experience with passion, and the service was exceptional throughout.

Highly recommend for anyone seeking a a remarkable culinary experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw8-ruOA&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2025-3-28"},{"Name":"Nadia Adan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcoKVX9LviM8Wdk6pwWcHbr-882gm9cgWa01NbLDwkaLPKMr-Xwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favourite restaurant in Madrid! The food is delicious with really high quality ingredients and the staff is amazing.

If you’ve never been I recommend letting the staff “surprise” you with their dishes, you won’t be disappointed! I was really pleasantly surprised by the beetroot carpaccio (something I never would have thought to order myself).

They also have a great wine selection.

It’s a little expensive, but it’s worth it!

Thank you Pedro and team for always making our experience great!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDV79bN-gE&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2023-12-19"},{"Name":"Jon Malamud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKioZh_9890ouXjWRtHJuS90oC_iJbNtoWz5jdR2gZgN3qEgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved the overall concept and atmosphere of the restaurant. The food was marvelous with very interesting takes on squid and appetizers. We loved it and would come again and again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9__IdCBq7c7uVPIEAipuO&fid=0x0:0xf3b18da50d038c2f"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Marta B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ20tB0mDJ9SHQgINVJ_fKuvaYuJwpYWtWeN5RGKj09umaQ5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We absolutely loved it! We were a group of 5 and we stayed in the terrace. First of all, the ambience is great, so pretty and cozy. The service is also amazing, the waiters are so so nice and friendly. Lastly, the food was out of this world- you never know what to expect, every dish is a surprise and so different from anything we’ve had before! Definitely one of my favourite spots in Madrid, will definitely be back :)","Images":null,"When":""}]

Well done!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Comidas De Madrid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIoZn5CRehQrw9F8vs096ZAhgBM1aotgXiIbV1zvh9l4nOFwKI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"CREP NOVA
📍 DÓNDE: C/ Eloy Gonzalo, 4
🍽 RESEÑA: Junto a la glorieta de Quevedo hemos descubierto este restaurante que nos ha llamado mucho la atención por su gran espacio y su carta variada centrada en pizzas, pastas y crepes. Es uno de esos sitios al que ir cuando estás por la zona y quieres comer algo rápido y acertar.

Nosotros probamos:
-Patatas bravas (5,60€): No son las bravas que esperaba, pero me gustaron mucho. Muy buena ración para compartir entre dos y una salsa tipo alioli muy rica.
-Crepe especial (6,55€): Huevo, jamón york y queso. Su especialidad. La verdad que sin ser una receta espectacular o muy llamativa nos gustó mucho.
-Pasta con trufa (15,20€): De principal probamos su pasta. Cantidad moderada pero sacia mucho, con buen sabor y olor a trufa, un poco aceitosa y termina haciéndose un poco pesada, pero cumple con el antojo de comer una pasta rica.
-Pizza Mallorquina (13,50€): Tomate, mozzarella, sobrasada, queso brie y miel. La variedad de pizzas es enorme y esta nos gustó mucho. La miel tiene poca presencia, pero la sobrasada (aunque en la foto puede parecer justita) tiene mucho protagonismo. Masa muy fina y conjunto muy ligero, nos pareció una pizza diferente pero apetecible.
-Crepe dulce con Nutella (6,55€): De postre eligimos su crepe dulce a compartir, que nos trajeron directamente partido. Lo que veis en la imagen es la mitad. Muy buena porción y con mucho relleno de Nutella. Buenísimo.
⚠️ A DESTACAR: Tienen más locales en Barcelona.
💳 PRECIO MEDIO: 💵💵
🏆 PUNTUACIÓN: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐

*Invitación","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCvSs8bWA7i7abL378ISMR&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Paula (FoodByFoodies)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqjwLB7qGU-wTiWQIyAIYF4mXu1dk6wX7kNeDRrx77WKGFHj0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Su propuesta se basa en ofrecer pizzas de masa fina y super crujiente con base de crep.
Además, ofrecen servicio de reparto a domicilio a través de Glovo. 🛵🍕
Probamos un total de 6 pizzas siendo todas ellas espectaculares con mezcla de sabores super interesante!
Nuestra preferida sin duda “Nova 15”, con tomate, jamón ibérico cortado fino y un huevo en el centro ♥️
Trucazo: se pueden pedir medias mitades para probar más sabores! 🤪","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBF5VoBbwVMzozbnluIBr9o&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"raulfoodie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWi_eJHsELyFroj9ADZKFjwBoeXrKUA1mEniYlFQPUiR4j_45M7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un sitio realmente bueno para cenar en Madrid centro. Nos encantaron sus pizzas, de masa fina y muy jugosas, sobre todo la de jamón ibérico y huevo es excepcional. La de queso de cabra y miel es todo un acierto. De entrantes os recomiendo sus verduras a la plancha y las bravas. Para culminar un crep de lotus muy rico. La atención al cliente fue excepcional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_eVDBMAfSlhYcqwr3PiEw&fid=0x0:0x1cdc5f0fb0f22211"],"When":"2025-11-22"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Nelson Sang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7qLjN2PCdpVxu7tZIrKdWiZpmAVxzz_pdLYP9HfUj8s-z8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On my visit to Madrid, (from the USA) we went to several restaurants known for very good authentic food from Spain. I believe the owner's name is Hilario (I hope I am expelling it correctly), he treated us like if we were on his own house. It was a true gastronomic experience. Fur sure, I will be back on my next trip to Madrid. FYI- don't leave without trying the Fabes. Tiene una terraza muy grande y con buen ambiente.

Los camareros son bastante majos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOFN-aorDyqKVQOz7Run7n&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Carlos Irala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQpUNtm1r6-bwFh-gOjijEYs7EQo7HpVzAP0HMSMqj6lLJ2qLRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El lugar bien para unas tapas y si les gusta el fútbol pueden mirarlo tranquilamente. Lo único es que deberían especificar el tamaño del zumo. Tenía mucha sed y ganas de tomarme una, me pedí de melocotón y me trajo una de 20 ml. Me quedé cortísimo y más por el
Precio que es bastante para el tamaño. Servicio de camareros bien.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjuNCRZmNt4aHlbOHZtNE5&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"David Rueda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVdvhy-rBIeEuYWy1tcR_RHwebIGVmFxLzxeUBAu0MESTFZH4_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Con mucho ambiente alrededor y tanto en terraza como en el interior.
Local muy grande, con mesas abajo y arriba .
La atención muy buena, amable y rápidos.
La comida con muy buena pinta y lo que probamos, estaba muy bueno... tanto la tosta de jamón ibérico con tomate, como el mollete de carrillera de ternera con mayonesa de pimientos.
Totalmente recomendable.
Se han desmarcado de otras cadenas similares, ofreciendo mayor calidad. Eso sí, a un precio mayor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ97OMtAE&fid=0x0:0x17a8dd789f705f98"],"When":"2025-3-8"}]

[{"Name":"amanda asham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUU69s_zeNUrN5GiHG-SCEW4wujTSK4Fofa6flZHeg_JmUA-TY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had the ‘meeting menu’. Ambience was nice, staff was prompt although felt a bit rushed. Our favorite dishes were the scallops with mango, and the steak tartare with bone marrow. A couple plates tasted good but felt was missing one small adjustment (e.g. to add a dash of salt, or more acid to the flavors). The tasting menu was priced fairly for the value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVBxGYPrHsZCZeO5ttlm75&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Inga Krastina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEjjT088FoH-UYvYpDmektAUi3DrFqstsQxLt-u6qYCKGxLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food to treat yourself, comfort food with a touch of style. The tartar with bone marrow was the best. The service was kind. Most of the tables are outdoors under a canvas, it was mostly ok on a sunny day in the beggining of November, might not be 100% comfotrable in winter or on a rainy evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgTYcuEEIW8iCyGI35-hfd&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Sonia Dragulescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZcpOap5ZktrC8lDrOb6yhHMeLsBDwJRTznT2N-JxMKFLZP57UIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was very good (we had the bone marrow with steak tartare which was my personal favorite, and a bunch of other appertives) and the interior was nice looking and cozy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6n--Hs8JaGAxaF033s5j4&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Naomi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGBhktK9-en5VnbUVcnA8cDk-q6rJ_BCCPwAChvlAcv0PE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
The food at SISAPO was very good! For appetizers, we ordered the potatoes, scallops, veggie croquettes, codfish croquettes, gyoza, and artichoke. The potatoes were OK. They were covered in mayo and were nothing special. The scallops were amazing! I highly recommend them. Both croquettes were very good, but I liked the veggie ones better. The gyoza was not the best and I wouldn’t recommend it. The artichoke was also very good and I highly recommend it! We ordered the ají, octopus, and pork cheek for mains. The octopus was not very good. It was chewy and didn’t taste fresh. The pork cheek was good. It was very tender, but a very heavy dish. The ají was pretty good, but the appetizers were better. For dessert, we ordered the chocolate textures, which was like a chocolate lava cake. It was good, but it was very heavy. We swapped out the pistachio ice cream for the violet ice cream. The violet ice cream was horrible. It tasted like soap, and I really wouldn’t recommend it. Overall, the food at SISAPO was good, but I recommend ordered more appetizers because they were much better.
Service: ⭐️
I would give 0 stars for the service if I could. I have never received such horrible service for this nice of a restaurant. I think I have received better service from a McDonalds. As soon as we entered the restaurant, the bartender (not sure of his name but he had a mustache and a silver earring) had a huge attitude. When we were seated, no one explained to us that the menu was online. The menu is very confusing because there is a place to add the food to a cart but you have to tell a waiter your order. When we signaled to the waiters (as we didn’t have a specially assigned waiter), they took the drink order of one person in our group and left. They didn’t ask what the whole party wanted to drink, and we had to signal to the waiter again. They seemed annoyed to take our food orders. They never checked in on us to ask if we wanted more food (and we did!). I noticed they were much friendlier to other people who spoke Spanish. Maybe they don’t like tourists, but this service was unacceptable for this type of restaurant.
Atmosphere: ⭐️⭐️⭐️
I don’t have much to say about the atmosphere. It was a nice interior and not too loud.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIWjWFZ-h1FOnO-ULC8KkK&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"Agnieszka Kucharczyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjaVUG6LAJa5KpJPcZlw73gg6eLfjiJQWCTkZHyGwwaV1Bv3UC-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything about this place was amazing: food, ambience, our servers - we would go back there in a heartbeat, and we'll definitely visit when we're in Madrid again, hoping the scallop with yuzu is still on the menu 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0z3AxbEXxWVRLFa2W7vsK&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Hidde Hoogland","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhPBqrPnfR_NGReR9b6nrkXR3IUdptoHtbeJUMjAgncxzc-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We booked a table for two well in advance via the Michelin guide and specifically requested to sit outside. Upon arrival (2 minutes early), we were told there were no outside tables left and had to sit inside. At a restaurant of this level, you should be able to rely on your seating preference being honored — not a great start.

Once seated in the back, we ordered a bottle of wine and the tasting menu. The first course featured a scallop on seaweed, torched tableside. Unfortunately, the server also burned the seaweed, releasing a smell similae to burning hair. While the flavor was good, the aroma distracted from the dish. This happened repeatedly when other guests were served the dish.

The following courses were nicely presented and well-prepared, but the service was incredibly rushed. Plates arrived barely a minute apart, and by the fourth course, one dish was cleared and replaced mid-bite. It’s worth explicitly asking for a slower pace if you want to enjoy your evening.

After we made that request, the rest of the experience improved. Overall, the food was good, but the rushed service and seating confusion made it less enjoyable than expected. If you offer a seating option, make sure it's respected — it sets the tone for the whole night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMbCkvWL98m7CA&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-6-2"},{"Name":"Sun Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaKiCDFntJFfmszrXeMlSKliQVs9a5He_vUxNi6qmnZM7He9iPMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was pretty mid level for a bib gourmand - each dish was missing a touch of something except for the pork which was cooked to perfection and the delicious bone marrow.

The service was increased by one star bc they were able to quickly pack up the food quickly after she felt sick and wanted to leave early","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA78i4IcMKTACqr63AYJvx4&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Yagmur Yalcinkaya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlC4DL0TQakeaVUwybgzS7usZkBgoAm36hC6AIoZedK4tGZbXI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The food was better than expected, but I’ve never been in a Michelin-guide restaurant where customers are allowed to punch in the table and chant. We are next to a table of 8 holigons, and they were allowed to do anything they wanted. I mean we were in a RESTAURANT, not a bar or pub. Although we warned the waiter and he told his manager, he did not care about us (probably because we were going to pay for only two and they were going to for eight). What a wasted experience! I just feel sorry for the chefs who achieved to serve such amazing plates, as their efforts are ruined by such a poor restaurant management.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX8ujtmAE&fid=0x0:0xb6df353258680339"],"When":"2024-10-25"}]

[{"Name":"Dimitris Vg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvo4ueMVHNSDIUYy0pPeDrTqE3CVgMPn6Y6SYGEI6dj0yl2buf_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A Mediocre experience with highs and lows. The ambiance of the restaurant and environment is nice.

The highs were the really good tarama, and the sea bass which was truly exceptional 5 star. The bread was really good and the cabbage salad was really inspirational.

But here is where the good stops and becomes disappointing. Huge gap in time between delivering the starter and  the rest of meals. How much tarama and bread can someone eat?  But the worst was the potatoes and the shrimp dish with the leeks. Especially the last reminded me of the failed burned mash food that I was making when I was a student. Really disappointing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Valeriia Svirska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3HAzbObIRLFlTxqaOA4b4Fo2mM1h2YraG-TgRVqZ0Vyd8TXs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a really lovely evening at this restaurant. We tried several dishes from the menu and shared a bottle of wine. Everything tasted great, and we genuinely enjoyed the atmosphere and service.

Unfortunately, later that night both my husband and I developed severe food poisoning, which has now been ongoing for almost 18 hours. This is the first time this has happened to us in Madrid. We did not eat or drink anywhere else that evening, so unfortunately we have to associate this experience with the restaurant, most likely something among the ingredients was spoiled.

This is especially disappointing, as our initial impression was very positive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This French-Spanish fusion restaurant features a warm, rustic interior with wood and brick walls, creating a cozy farmhouse atmosphere. The space is divided into two areas: a bar section near the entrance and a dining area with a semi-open kitchen at the back. Dim lighting and candles add to the ambiance. The service is friendly, though at times the staff seemed a bit overwhelmed by the number of guests.

We ordered the Corvina salvaje, Salmón, Codorniz, and Mollejas, all of which were well-prepared. My favorites were the Salmón and Codorniz—the salmon was incredibly juicy, with a creamy yet refreshing sauce, while the quail was tender and infused with a balanced blend of curry spices, yogurt, and lemon. The Mollejas were also enjoyable, though I found the roasted radicchio overly bitter, lacking a sweet contrast to balance the flavor. For dessert, we had the Pavlova, which was decent but not as memorable as the main courses.

Overall, it was a unique dining experience, with a strong sense of style in both the decor and cuisine. The food was consistently high quality, though the pacing of service could have been better. The first two dishes arrived within minutes, but the next two took about 35 minutes, leaving us waiting for quite some time. Fortunately, the sourdough bread helped pass the time. At checkout, the waiter apologized for the delay and kindly waived the dessert charge, bringing our total to around 110 EUR, including drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAztSuSA&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Adolfo Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_k5LhvmM9gh1JAvQdw3noUZzGBTBuWzvyUKqVTejcBMdOvhM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best restaurant we ate in Madrid. The restaurant is absolutely beautiful, a very intimate and cozy vibe.
You will see me back very soon!
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3gemS0gE&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2024-11-15"},{"Name":"Eva De Hostos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPzxRd3XMfDuKKV7lxQrYzi0ZxnbR0a2nqiSpZgPfYAPXkU0-P=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pleasantly surprised by TonTon. The space is one of the most beautiful in Madrid. Great lighting. The food is seasonal and delicious, sourced from some of the best F&B suppliers in the city, and the wine list has a mix of french, spanish, autrian wines. Very yummy overall","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela Kormann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXm3OWf9I4ymriuBFV1gmVNcPmbzZTShYMiMtaXQHKMzBzne7E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have no words to describe how fantastic Tonton is!
The wonderful Chef Alice (former team member at Celler de Can Roca) will baffle you with an amazing, seasonal, top quality, flavorful menu, which is always updated to bring you only the best ingredients at the market.
Charming Bosco will usher you through this experience with an attentive and friendly service, with great natural wine recommendations.
If you go to Madrid and don’t go to Tonton…. You did something wrong! Not to be missed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv1Mq1Rw&fid=0x0:0xc1b303337f18588c"],"When":"2024-12-8"}]
