[{"Name":"Ricardo Calvo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW6fVvD5FhVTXQeponoG7MIsyawbqo9y_BLoTZ5hq2A7d42HA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Looking for an authentic Italian experience in the heart of Madrid? This is the place! The dishes are exceptional—the lasagna with duck sauce is simply spectacular, and the eggplant Parmesan is unforgettable. A must-visit for any Italian food lover!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAha-QWw&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2025-2-2"},{"Name":"Taylor Diers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJg0R9QsK39QXLMXoX1bDaDJXPAkgXWHkSqsrXRyFXJ-W1e5sAcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyed our experience.  Excellent food and wine, especially the Raviolini with trufa and the lasaña con pato. We will definitely be returning.  The only thing we weren't crazy about was our table next to the front door with cold air blowing on us each time the door opened. I recommend asking for a table away from the entrance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA16DApwE&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2025-2-12"},{"Name":"Jonathan S. Ng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-tteX65BSLPUUiq5Zw6s9JP3pG4fW1CtFfmEixSPmeyLugo4n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mozzafiato is a nice little Italian pasta restaurant in Chamberi, the highlight dishes for me were the Duck Lasagna and the traditional Beef Lasagna! For desserts, I really enjoyed the tiramisu and the Red Berries Panna Cotta!

Overall, excellent service and delicious entrees - the only minus would be the tight and cramped space of the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw1tvRPQ&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2025-3-18"},{"Name":"Josefina Martirosjan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJypWgZLiV3u_ItewKJiE7kPIsRzr9upVAlCJU0_9n5_o_vTA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the place, very well decorated. Gnocci al gorgonzola was excellent. Great service and the owner a very charming and friendly lady. Will definitely come back again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cassidy Blake","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInRUzuP0DFE3b66jvTrMiqnbOiMYTb11fT_CRlJRBBKpQGOg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best restaurants in Madrid… no exaggeration.

The service is great- employees are all very friendly and knowledgeable about their food and drink selection.

This time around we began with the burrata, focaccia plate, and eggplant as our appetizers. All were great.

For entrees, we ordered the truffle-parmesan linguine, spinach-walnut gnocchi, squid ink spaghetti with shrimp, and duck lasagna. All the entrees were unbelievable, but the stand out has to be the duck lasagna. We were skeptical at first as most of our party dislikes duck, but so glad we took the waiter’s recommendation. The duck meat was so tender, tasted like pulled pork. The sauce, which takes four days to make, was so flavorful!

For dessert, we took the panna cotta and apple pie. Both were to die for. We have had their tiramisu as well, but believe these two desserts are better!

The dishes aren’t huge, but packed with flavor. Can’t recommend this place enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx4oWEKQ&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2023-6-5"},{"Name":"Javier MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDKt874qqnDejDH2rue92lnsBzMx8DGvL9dFnKgPFvj6bU5VNT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding product quality and authenticity are the best adjectives to describe this Italian restaurant! We loved the fresh pasta we took and prices are fair enough. Though, the best of it is the waitress (a woman from Brazil who is very funny and friendly) so will go again for sure!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2k8au4gE&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2022-5-24"},{"Name":"JPL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUa0pgZtRJe45aHDgGrJf1GRPaMay4GVuMaGp_DPqYx6AtzuEDLrw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had higher for this place based on the reviews. Sadly, it did not live up to what other Google reviews had to say.  Maybe things have changed in the past 8 months to 2 years.  Odd night maybe, but this definitely wasn't the best restaurant experience as other reviews say.

Cannoli was good, but the suggested Mezza Luna was not up to the recommendation.

Wine was initially poured, but never had a visit back from the waiter to refill the glass.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHufrlgQE&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2024-9-6"},{"Name":"Audrey Wei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRmR2BdOdrAtu1jq8BAIj5kr7xVsaZ3wk_AkR1F1UHxHw9lIWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was absolutely the best restaurant experience I’ve had in a long time. The hospitality was objectively above and beyond. The owner came by to make suggestions on dishes that didn’t have dairy in them given we were lactose intolerant and was more than happy to make adjustments to accommodate. The food (beef carpaccio, duck lasagna, and shrimp spaghetti) were all delicious. Ingredients were fresh and overall super flavorful.

I’d say the best thing about our visit was the owner — she made us feel so welcomed, and it was obvious she took pride in her food (and for good reason). She didn’t rush us out even though we stayed well over closing time, and gifted us with little cookies on our way out. I almost wish there wasn’t a language barrier (since my Spanish is so bad), so I could fully express my gratitude to her. I’ll definitely be back when I visit Madrid again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1_tKZogE&fid=0x0:0xc7ef1e02d6f1297a"],"When":"2023-12-30"}]

Unfortunately they don't serve the meat from the "Meat Stick" (I don't know the correct name). The kebab sandwich was okay. The terrace was casual. Nice spot for just drinks.

I also ordered a mix salad because they were out of tabouli. The salad was not that good, I didn't finish it.

I'd only recommend coming here for casual drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDKyPuPPg&fid=0x0:0xdcaa344179db1510"],"When":"2021-4-28"},{"Name":"Paris Hayes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9O1q8UlFJ79_4twb5ME8MERckyFbJIGNGitzlRkm2NM1IqCXb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Favorite kebab/durum/pita/med vegetarian plate spot in Madrid! The tzaziki, hummus and baba ganoush are all authentic and fantastic! Meats are always well-spiced and tender. Falafel is delicious too. Super casual and affordable. Definitely satisfies my cravings every time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkmNazZw&fid=0x0:0xdcaa344179db1510"],"When":"2018-3-24"},{"Name":"Hadrien Prevost","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoHk4JTKCmMDk9DddlNvDLGhF3EXrGLbW6VwJ5mE2RU1KeuUnK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Either it was a scam, or an honest mistake. We had different prices on the bill than on the menu. But the thing is that when I told them, not only did they started to be unpleasant to me, but also all their menus suddenly would put a different price than what we had on ours. So I don’t even know if it was just one menu with the old prices that got lost, or if it was organized to put lower prices because “tourists don’t check prices”.

The thing is that the food was actually very good and the waiter was so nice before that incident. So even if you’re ready to pay more, you can still go there, it’s just has been very badly handled for us at the very least.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Everything was delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_Pky2AG5pR0WRIo7m8fVI&fid=0x0:0x29e045135629da47"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Eli Ben Gigi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdulNhOsPtNY65WhbllUQDEAtrENrIZ0UtPWAgJ6qL_Ti9ETgE5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A restaurant with a warm homely atmosphere and fine local cuisine. The dishes are wonderful and excellent, and it is clear that the many praises and recommendations justify themselves.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDd8ve0xJ2Gcp4ccANoCAjA&fid=0x0:0x29e045135629da47"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"vl Trugman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLpSzxRR9yzW03ObOcMbaNFlbmiVUTOSmS2I7NJTHWiCISC7669A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was walking around the neighborhood when this place called out to me from afar — its design and warmth caught my eye, and I hadn’t known it before. Anni was so sweet and made me feel like a regular — I felt right at home.
In short, I highly recommend it and will definitely be coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ2jpomC5-S8Hw&fid=0x0:0x29e045135629da47"],"When":"2025-5-25"},{"Name":"Brooke Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJog5opqaaxUxQ4MArRQaThGNgOQMkjAt2Xw_ve7zWfzr_TYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was amazing. The cheesecake desert and tiramisu were perfect. Very cozy vibes. Would definitely go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5_vv6Dxic96P0aIvggdtz&fid=0x0:0x29e045135629da47"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Majesta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd81gcV2JCytNzoaSA2qBizMy30IfWw1ZEQurjdPvL2uEDzKUF8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ciri served our table and he was amazing and quick. The eggs were amazing and so were the oxtail risotto. The eggplant was a bit bland but still good.
I think this place is dog friendly and has cute decor, we enjoyed the vibes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxTTK8P9dIgwarx7BjAF_p&fid=0x0:0x29e045135629da47"],"When":"2025-6-8"}]

Here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClgKypnwE&fid=0x0:0x3626680b33bcabb0"],"When":"2023-11-12"},{"Name":"Michael S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjwibIFp8jLFYDltQLLL9Bgu2nGJ6EHpbE9uYzCrFjBJx-wA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"After a long day's travelling resulting in fatigue and hunger, my partner and I made the mistake of eating here without having first checked the existing reviews.

The service is slow, and that's the least worst thing about this place. We ordered 3 dishes, one each and one two share. They all came at different times with 30 minutes between the first and third arriving. The Patatas Bravas are nothing but bad chips smothered in burger sauce, the battered pork was worse than something you'd get from a bad takeaway, and the third dish was just plain inedible. The waiter didnt even seem surprised that we asked for the bill without having really touched one of the dishes.

AVOID!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Niklas Gadd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLK9rD2Cf3jgD-E8P_0vMuPne7BznGE178uf51TMikvGHnUeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered sandwitch and got soup..  Wanted to say something about that when I got the food in front of me and waitress just left us... wonder why?

Regards,
Tourist","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Todd Sharp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9BDVrHZs-0OnCkqRZIJTDf6TV4xNkzaBUnp2bMiyAZOte3GwsQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful little restaurant in Madrid. Great drinks! I recommend the sangria and the drink with gin, tonic, lemon and cardamom! Ox tail was also delicious, as were the croquettes. Try the bread pudding for dessert!","Images":null,"When":""}]

We came for the daily menu with my colleagues and we were not disappointed at all. For 13,9 we could have a miso soup, some spring rolls and a main dish, I chose the Yakitori Don which was very tasty and well cooked.
The menu also includes a dessert and a drink.
Absolutely wonderful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrf2RMcM0GG3UF96Pa5pNN&fid=0x0:0xf28b4479bc3e651e"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Nikelle Mitchell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1aShKU8qee8MwTBF3sdaXTJjX-qwNfd7qzr-izXNwrAoQG1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hands down the best Japanese food we've had in Madrid. The takoyaki is absolutely perfect! The seaweed salad was fresh, as was all the sushi. The okonomiyaki was very rich and filling. But, our absolute favorite was the spicy ramen! It was a delicious broth with perfectly cooked noodles. You definitely have to try this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDUvLOkXA&fid=0x0:0xf28b4479bc3e651e"],"When":"2019-8-17"},{"Name":"Alejandra Corte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGaMleA3R5U9AsODLAzOFOWDztvC9ZkFHYBztQpVxYupgeEks=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best ramen in Madrid with specialty dishes from Japan! They have a nice menu with items not commonly seen on menus from other Japanese restaurantes here. For example for menú del día please try the cold ramen with tempura. It’s quite good. You can ask them for a loyalty card after you pay, and you can earn points from your visits.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICU6L_oVA&fid=0x0:0xf28b4479bc3e651e"],"When":"2019-7-16"},{"Name":"Óscar Serrano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUYjqNtnRQWoCEcET6s80zzS4gnMtdSwjXCdxALJXT4A5EHpLU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty food overall, good ramen but nothing extraordinary.
Desserts looked really good but cheesecake did not really taste like cheese, it was really bland.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID44prTOg&fid=0x0:0xf28b4479bc3e651e"],"When":"2019-3-25"},{"Name":"Yoshi PhG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhzdjEbD07KmMwvN34H2rnEGZc12rP3RTTCwPx6auLCb3OYq9k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I am half-Japanese 🏯 so my standard for Japanese food is quite high.

The Okonomiyaki looks good, the green tea is good, the sushi is not worth it.

The Yakisoba didn't look that good and the Donburi with Chicken and Eggs that I eat was good.

Service and atmosphere is great and lovely.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlie Moritz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlIL86mhBKR0t_idz_DuspxCku9Im3rB2XOZ_Mm7hdwIr2Shj0ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Their okonomiyaki is not okonomiyaki. They have no idea how to make it, completely wrong.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuERpcDsExFf5NEN8xiRhAUYYjnrkxyTF8no489ZpDHib0FEFIFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Price affordable with great food. [{"Name":"Mauro Deffendini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH1-Qxz4Kd23rXnxkA9xtwEU2cyTR4gR3fcsMmAASESGAQbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This kitchen is literally on fire, their signature touch is spice, and it runs through almost every dish. Tucked away in a corner of the Vallehermoso gastronomic market, where it feels like every stall competes to outdo the others with gourmet creations, Kitchen 154 serves up an Asian-fusion menu with its own twists on classic recipes. The place is usually packed, so best to grab a reservation if you want to be on the safe side.

With that buzz and the full house, I walked in with high expectations. Unfortunately, my experience fell a bit short. Let me start with the least exciting picks.

The Dan Dan Lamian, described as a meatball noodle with Sichuan spice, landed flat. It felt like a watered-down mashup between Italian Bolognese and noodles. Not too spicy, which I appreciated, but overall, it lacked any memorable flavor, just blaaaaa….

Next came the dumplings. On paper, they sounded intriguing, filled with butifarra, meat, and kimchi. In reality, the butifarra was almost nonexistent, and the hoisin-style sauce they were drowned in didn’t bring anything special.

I had high hopes for the ribs, expecting them to be the star of the menu. Instead, they were another near miss. Plenty of tender meat, yes, but so heavily coated in kimchi and Korean sauce that all you could taste was an overpowering, spicy BBQ note. Not bad, but not worthy of being called a house classic.

Finally, redemption arrived with the shrimp in red curry sauce. This dish was a knockout. The curry hit that perfect balance between spicy and sweet, even reminding me of a proper khao soi soup. Packed with flavor, I ended up drinking the sauce like a soup. The wok-fried vegetables, cherry tomatoes, rice, and shrimp, brought everything together into a succulent Asian delight. Honestly, I’d come back just for this dish.

Service was fast, but with the staff clearly overwhelmed by the crowd, it felt rushed and mechanical, which took away from the experience. The space was extremely tight, hard to really enjoy your meal comfortably.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAjRhT37-7ckLrOJG6IsKv7&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Kyle Merrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIe-Xskxi42nJvRzUnfYni802Zjx_rIU6FtK6TY6kOInRafA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me and my wife wanted to eat here but is was absolutely packed. No seats anywhere and the wonderful woman who worked here (I wish I knew her name) came out and literally set up a table for us all the way on the other side of the market at a bar so we could eat here. We got the Korean bbq ribs, wings and spicy squid. All of it was packed with flavor and the ribs fall off the bone tender. The people working here are so incredibly wonderful and can see why this spot is so popular.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"praddeep demudu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpSz7NfxcYyL5JXmX-JUy6BoHfP8H6ylLk4k24d7nE9cYmZwSR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved it…. Every bit of it. The pork ribs… the best. Succulent and the meat falls of the bone. Greta combination with rice, kimchi and pickled cucumbers and onions.

We also tried the chilli fried chicken which was good too and also the prawn curry too. The level of spice was just right… rich in flavour and its one was the best curries I have tried outside of asia. Very authentic.

The staff were friendly and attentive. Great ambience… buzzing and everyone is just happy to be eating. The whole place has a cool vibe.

Can’t wait to try it again when we are back in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICftoPjbw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2024-12-28"},{"Name":"Jessica Bello Salguero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjf3k_eq67JiyzvMCplcIKm_dc9S8kBYqfrvEsScxxHPWqrFPlOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It disappointed us. We expected the ribs to be soft and not chewy, the dumplings were ok but nothing amazing. I don’t  understand why this place has such a hype. The staff was ok but not extremely friendly. Maybe we did not ordered that well? Would hesitate to come back again…","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ2JKJ-wE&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Santiago Redondo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKtRj25HqdlOMODDopE-MucOOt7zq5pM0pijw-5OASkkLyAPV2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a highly recommended place if you like asian insanely-spicy food.
Everything is cooked at low temperatures for several hours so the food gets so tender and so tasty that you will repeat coming to this place over and over again.
Eating here is a bargain too. Food and beverages are very low priced you can get fully satisfied for less than 20 €.
Koran BBQ ribs, chicken wings and shrimp curry are a must.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk5q64ZQ&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2018-2-28"},{"Name":"R E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXG5sldq-vQkgQxeVxv8O_suSh3Dx1vhBRf2wglEWQerF2R3qToKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A classic visit to this already legendary restaurant in Madrid. I came 5/6 years ago, and now I went back in May 2023, I have to say that nothing changed: super friendly staff and good attention, ribs with certain vinager flavor (Korean style, this could be the most known dish), sweet chicken wings and a short menu that includes asian flavors suck as curry and will make you enjoy a nice dine. Only con: the famous double shift will wake you up from your table sooner than expected. But a safe choice in any case","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxjNi5Kw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2023-5-11"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Go!!!!!!!!!!

Ok, the dumplings are AMAZING! An explosion of tastes that tickle your taste buds.
The wings… I don’t even like wings but here Hong Kong meets Spain that meets Mexico that meets the US.

Everything in this place is incredible, the staff are the absolute sweetest.
Do yourself a favour and book in advance because: you do not want to miss this experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVz5Wifg&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2023-12-18"},{"Name":"Luis D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLDCLTNBMDYiVksV5vg8SUI3lAtrhXM2nBFJptO0w7pM4dT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my favourite places in Madrid. I love the vibe, seating while seeing the kitchen.

They got a simple menu with a couple of options, all great.

I always go for the shrimp red curry and with the Sichuan eggplants. they're just amazing.

Service isn't great or fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn4qaBUw&fid=0x0:0xfdd7e271173e7e25"],"When":"2024-9-24"}]

[{"Name":"rated by maryam • food critic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2rFU889_uyIosz_7bpffSFpmpz0-gKcaVKqZvHb7h1qD_qhXV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tasty Poké Bar was a surprisingly solid stop—quick, clean, and genuinely refreshing. I ordered the salmon poké bowl, and honestly, it hit all the right notes. The salmon was fresh, the toppings were well-balanced, and nothing felt soggy or overdressed. You get that nice mix of crunch and cool without it feeling like fast food. It’s not trying too hard, which I appreciate. Just solid ingredients, good texture, and enough flavor to keep you interested. The portion was just right—enough to feel satisfied but not stuffed. Perfect pitstop before a flat white and a croissant. Would go again for a quick snack.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHizejKsXmXJWcuvmyWqEL&fid=0x0:0x1a7d0e06aef4cbb8"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"Karim Gomaa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWl2V1fXBx7xs9osNrBW4JzvdkJ2tr69aJjpPpdqqYvPCUddkDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time experience with poke bowl and was amazing. Staff was very friendly and accommodating explaining the whole process. They were able to explain in English which was helpful to fully grasp the idea. Very nice cosy place and worth the money. Food was fresh. Definitely coming back again and very pleased that this was my first experience with poke bowl. For sure will recommend friends and family to go there","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkzY6_0AE&fid=0x0:0x1a7d0e06aef4cbb8"],"When":"2019-2-5"},{"Name":"Pilar Sanchez Labrador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGaz37AQB-VX0S3AoTrjlxNkn68ytjm9zE1p_fapTU06mPZ6tR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great pokes!! The waiter, Cleiver was fantastic and super attentive","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lotti Schmitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZSEynKdyn2jNfHoPtYZMuQo2fOoKejBX6MibkwrhUWYtQ8w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kleiver y melecio were amazing waitresses! Had a good time nd free ahora","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aida V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpZSqyvXiNzEYuXcwJeQqTAADmNiszGDg_aX3LURU1JF8XCHJd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was decent, but service was terrible. We waited half an hour to order and then half an hour to pay. A lot of things came cold and seem to be reheated, even though they market themselves as a fresh seafood place. Somehow the cold things came last at the end of the meal, like the oysters and a salad - there is no order. Also they forgot some of our order but since we were tired of trying to get attention we just gave up. White shrimp were good once they brought them hot, red shrimp were cold and seemed reheated, octopus and potatoes were really good, crab roll was a miss, salad and oysters were ok. It was incredibly loud and impossible to talk, and people constantly dropping something loud behind the bar. Would not recommend, only if going to the terrace for drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBc1uzz1g02DHR5RsyTovHe\u0026fid=0x0:0xe09a0b9272733b91"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Monica Andrade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVjs1GaZrwo9GldqXYIHWr-TW6ExvSwn-Bo1BmNJje9tkAIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place, the food is really good, reasonable price and really good service, specially Alduino, the best waiter!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Overall avoid this place go to San Sebastián for real good basque food, or try any other basque restaurant in madrid !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHxMKUaQ&fid=0x0:0x6dcf32c03b36cdc4"],"When":"2024-9-12"},{"Name":"John Ariza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFbxpZcxKu5FyGWkLKYsECl7vekqHc0-l_bIBLWZYo8R6Zteom=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh wow! user_reviews: [{"Name":"RR M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLti6qaFtgYBiizIb1kzU1nr3J1TN1gsOloDb_IpOoAQQc5GA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved this experience. We ordered the burrata - originally served with eggplant, though that wasn’t available so we were given tomatoes - guacamole, and patatas bravas. The burrata changed my life. It’s incredibly creamy, perfectly sea salted, and melts in your mouth. The tomatoes alongside of this cheese were divine. Wonderfully ripe. The guacamole was a great dish too, though nothing special in terms of the actual guacamole. What was special? The tortilla chips! These chips were served warm, crisp and salted and must have literally been freshly made and out of the oven to order. We could have eaten an entire bags worth of these chips if that was possible! Finally, the main attraction: the patatas bravas. This dish is something I seek out everywhere in Madrid. I loved this rendition! The aioli sauce is not as herb filled as other recipes, yet compliments well alongside the somewhat spicy bravas sauce. All in all, we can’t wait to return to this restaurant. The service was spectacular and we felt truly welcomed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb6IHyPg\u0026fid=0x0:0x322c1bfe0bcbf7d9"],"When":"2024-7-22"},{"Name":"Linton Nightingale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_a6sUULyCFYsWbf55N4tIEeaBZ5hP__FQhICChAXhrFCXUSI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I was disappointed with this restaurant. Its small, cramped, noisy and very hot inside. The service was slow and the food came out in an erratic fashion which some people had to wait while others were eating. The menu is limited and actually quite complicated to read. [{"Name":"Jakub M Ochab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWeOsgMckABLzCjQG-D7kanzxb_tm5gLRx84U6XGHKPXlPU4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We’ve been frequent visitors of Gracias Padre in Chamberí, drawn by our love for Mexican cuisine and the vibrant atmosphere. However, our recent visits have left us with mixed feelings — some days everything runs smoothly, and other times we find ourselves saying, “this might be the last time.”

Last night was unfortunately one of the disappointing visits. When we arrived, the restaurant was nearly empty — only two small tables were occupied — but there was no one at the door to greet us. We stood at the entrance for 5–10 minutes with no staff in sight, and eventually more guests started arriving and waiting alongside us. A waiter finally appeared and seated us, but it was clear the team was understaffed.

Understanding the situation, we decided to order right away to avoid delays. Unfortunately, the waiter seemed unfamiliar with the menu — for example, he told my partner that the tacos they ordered came only with cheese, when they actually included meat (as they always have). Thankfully, they arrived correctly, but it was a clear sign of training or communication issues.

We waited a long time for our starter — just chilaquiles verde con aguacate because apparently they didn’t have the one with pollo, which aren’t exactly complex to prepare — while other tables who arrived after us were served first. We even saw a kitchen staff member return mid-service with shopping bags, which made us wonder if the kitchen was also dealing with shortages or poor planning.

What was meant to be a quick, enjoyable dinner turned into a stressful and time-consuming stop. In the end, we decided to pay at the bar and leave.

As someone with experience in the restaurant industry, my suggestion would be: when operating with limited front-of-house staff, don’t open the entire restaurant. Focus on seating guests near the bar, where the team can manage service more effectively without running around needlessly, which only adds to delays and guest frustration.

To the managers or owners of Gracias Padre: repeat customers are hard to earn and easy to lose. With so many dining options around, consistent service is key. We’ll take a break from visiting for now, but we hope things improve — we’d love to come back and have the kind of experience that first made us regulars.

Gracias.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIXIipOc5ID1bw&fid=0x0:0x4562fb1d6cce2de2"],"When":"2025-6-5"},{"Name":"Bence Busics","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0EYVP583dhJ37Yk_s4Wn5xo5rJSVkaP7XbmL4pPlSRML9TA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited with couple of friends. The atmosphere was amazing. The food was delicious and plenty. I could hardly finish my meal as I underestimated the portions. The service was quick, precise. I totally recommend the place. I will definitely visit it next time I'm in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR8bHmjwE&fid=0x0:0x4562fb1d6cce2de2"],"When":"2023-4-4"},{"Name":"Cylou Germanos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMJkUnLQ5C8TI0GpsiJ2ZKCHTiMCEdr7s_UXzgER7SW5bFGA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice atmosphere representing the jungle with great colors.
Portions are quite generous and tasty. The nachos are really good.
Too bad they use industrial flavors for their drinks","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRp_HFEA&fid=0x0:0x4562fb1d6cce2de2"],"When":"2023-4-12"},{"Name":"Roberta Danesi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzWNHDV4esPAl3Y_YjHHo36gUNLLC7FMqQJSs670oUdVTV9rqcZg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Amazing cocktails, good food, environment a bit trash but nice atmosphere. [{"Name":"Paul Canham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr8NSiek3hDwOQd8oFfq1Hvqcn463NCILHw8VT5iXIaSNh5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely wonderful place. Fantastic food, with a twist. Perfect fusion of tapas and restaurant eating. Excellent value for money. Come here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBY3lnHoHpei-8pnPfnTBeW&fid=0x0:0x8f1acc35867fb378"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Ángel Pérez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpxTERHfgR33tfQvUHZqjpIMsEys7ZIcQ7DQkFPIUJ-gDT8QrH-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First of all, food is good.
Second, isn't cheap.

We had mix of croquets, mushroom and ox tail. I didn't like the mushrooms (barely taste mushroom, were too salty too) but the ox tail compensate it for me, they were nice.

Then some potatoes with tuna. The tuna was AMAZING! Was a same not having a tartar or similar of such a delicious fish.

Then a tartar crepe. Really original flavours and well made 👌

As main we had udon with calamari. It's was WOW. Not just tasty but the cooking was perfect, soft calamari and "Al dente" pasta.

We finished with cheese cake that didn't disappointed.

What was disappointing was the Coffee. Terrible torrefacto. Is a shame to finish a good meal with it.

Just to let you know, the portions are small, maybe too small for the price.

Don't get me wrong, taste good, but 70€ for this at lunch isn't cheap and makes the ratio quality/price leaning to the expensive side.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdmoSVDA&fid=0x0:0x8f1acc35867fb378"],"When":"2024-2-14"},{"Name":"Sophia Moinpour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKj20cyruUy8-77jewFD1jJo9tfdhQlfQf_BdTtWIKDrPTJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went to Dicharachero for the first time and had the best experience!! All the food was AMAZING!!! My favorite was definitely the red tuna tartar. The dessert was also incredible & homemade!! I loved the details of the restaurant from the lamps to the plates. The staff was so friendly and made the night a super memorable and enjoyable one. Specifically Fabi and the owners Javi and Teresa made us feel at home with their kindness and hospitality. I will 100% be returning for the overall ambiance, yummy food and incredible vibes! Thank you! [{"Name":"Jane Bramhall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLu6GLVuO4IaH7P1j4pkcbBaaDXIPmc49AwWERy9KsY6Os3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ate at the Taj Mahal restaurant last night and both myself and my partner really enjoyed our meal. We were given a popadom to share as we didn't want any starters and it was nice and served with a vibrant green mint sauce and a spicy sauce. The only thing I would say is that it was extremely vibrant green and I've tasted better mint sauce with my poppadoms. However the rest of the meal was really really tasty. We had the pilau rice with peas which was cooked to perfection and the keema nan which was as soft as a pillow I could of slept on it. It was the first time I've ever had a keema nan as I useally go for the pershwari nan but it was divine it melted in the mouth. My partner had a lamb dish and I had chicken jelfrezi both packed full of meet. We had a dessert which was like pistachio ice it was really refreshing and a bottle of red wine. We were served by Aslam who was very pleasant and offered us a little chupito afterwards. We will definitely be back the atmosphere was nice and relaxed with lovely Indian music in the background. We so enjoyed our meal

Jane and Juan","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Madilyn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdcBiEms-CI4EqRAgYhbawuwj8kuDexdCChB7HmpBJ7JDdCQE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice service. I came in at 10pm. there are several tables, and only 1 server. He could get quite busy sometimes, but he’s friendly and give me the recommendations.
The food Tastes amazing!!!!
highly recommend everything I ordered!!

🌟 Butter naan is the MVP.
Freshly baked, with a scent of the flour.
It’s a MUST try for carbohydrates-lovers.

P.S. I came here alone, and ended up packing the curry with extra naan  (i luv it too much) back home. Got another lunch ready as well ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICFzcjPZw&fid=0x0:0x974b0e122abee4ed"],"When":"2023-10-30"},{"Name":"akhlaque chaudhari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeCCOgNbATacfczJBEaphUh6_v_dOQM0bTNERm3dvEWyYg0w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came back again to enjoy by far the best Indian food joint in lacorunna.tried chicken curry tossed with boiled eggs which they did it on request from me .just enjoyed it . Will surely be back  to eat here .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA7-_o_wE&fid=0x0:0x974b0e122abee4ed"],"When":"2025-2-12"},{"Name":"Angela Cocca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8jDZnwZdUfrmCruzOni3FmvrhFeK5nhswnMqDLNVfe-HwIh86Wg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good tasting Indian food with a menú del día that leaves you feeling full.

I agree with their rating that the vindaloo is spicy. I decided to go a step down and order the madras, but that ended up being more like two steps down, quite mild. Maybe I'm goldilocks, but I wanted something in the middle 🙈

The nan seemed a bit sweet for my taste.

Service was nice. The place was very clean and the bathroom smelled great.

Overall I give it 4 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDW7uSaOw&fid=0x0:0x974b0e122abee4ed"],"When":"2022-3-24"},{"Name":"Awais Jutt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkgGuiOksQau7bmVzDhJpj_YYRcEDpwz6sYjehv0tjDJjX_Ie3-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The Food is very expensive and they The atmosphere is a little bit Dirty they fouce on Decuration not the food","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Borja Martínez Calvo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4qem07UojdOlt3RzCdU8_ZeKnHATm1DnLkCGiThgd8r0SYg5E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place!
Tasty Indian food, with a good amount of options on their menu. Loved the Vindalo lamb. I was very happy to finally find a truly spicy meal!
The staff was very friendly and helpful. We asked for recommendations and they were happy to guide us through their menu and give us suggestions of which plates to combine.
Looking forward to visiting again soon!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mari Angulo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSJIvSHz7-Q-Jj18KmZ7hcuyadOTfsLiw-mvfVMs9Wn4tpbz4t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I live close by so we’re pretty regular here. Menu deal día lunch is a great deal, you get plenty of food for a set price of around 15€. For a 5 person dinner we had the Tandoori Chicken, Tikka Masala, Bhuna, Balti, rice and Naan. More than enough food for everyone and they served us a complimentary dessert. They have plenty of regular and vegetarian options on the menu as well. We really like the staff and the ambience too, 5 stars!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shoag","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO9S3e7eLmVpYKRfoaC3wis1EQh2Fj0bm_e93Pz96qDbS9cw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Great food, especially the spicy butter chicken I had yesterday. However, the staff was rude on my visit today, which was disappointing. Overall, good food but service needs improvement.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Raimond Miralles Febrer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSn6Tv5u14gDlA5kbQCP6XBcrlGEr2Cv35f96QUBUBdghCCuxKdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic Chinese Street Food Gem!
​Miss Jianbing is a must-visit in Madrid. While the Jianbing (savory crepes) are spectacular, the menu offers much more—the handmade dumplings and Guo Bao Rou are incredible.
​Don’t miss the desserts! They have unique Asian-inspired sweets and fresh Mochi that are the perfect way to end the meal.
​Quick Tips:
​Book Ahead: The place is very small and fills up fast; reservations are a must.
​Take Away: They offer a great take-away service if you're on the go.
​Vibe: Authentic, cozy, and super friendly.
​Highly recommended for anyone craving real Chinese flavors!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adela Risnoveanu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZ0iNaJV5jSjKOJUcRyKKALqxigwXfgQLkrkBfDkp8N-0qGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Starting with the atmosphere (cozy and warm) and the impeccable service that is such a rarity nowadays, this already made us feel like we were welcomed in a family. Then there was the food. Unreal, authentic Chinese food. My friend who'd lived in China said it was the best jianbing she's ever had, and for me as well, after trying out many Chinese restaurants in Europe and having travelled to China and Taiwan before, this really hit the spot for me. The flavours had something undeniably authentic that is so hard to find around here. Thank you for this amazing experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAp7DXWaXFHpAps5GELJLak&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Nanja (NanterPanter-Wine)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTZjI1FRW5tV8Nlo6aMORQH-6G-VDDGIAmb2O1wlGWzZwV2vNK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing! How great that there is an authentic Jianbing Chinese crêpe place now in Madrid! Absolutely delicious. We ordered two different ones. The spicy green spinach crêpe with BaoCui (crunchy fried base) was my favourite. They also have some Chinese soy drinks that bring back memories of when I was living in China years ago. This streetfood place is located inside a mini foodcourt. Thank you Luqi and team! Congratulations and I will come back very soon!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx2YmwngE&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2023-5-21"},{"Name":"DM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLn4AiTZ5y6yBsiJl2H5P6Jhb20OmSMH4j-sH0jWA2Jq8vs4_4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a worthwhile culinary experience! Literally went twice in 4 days because I wanted to try more of the menu.

The food is flavorful, the portions are generous and great for sharing. I wish them much success! Will absolutely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw-rqgugE&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2025-3-18"},{"Name":"Helenlouise Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqiybiu3tqDaeVQk33jP33KyDqNbYCz4pB_LhcWmB1XvloGRI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really original flavours, great service, good value for money! A really cute little restaurant! Definitely recommend the crepes and the shredded potatoes although everything was delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVsIKidQ&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2023-12-10"},{"Name":"Kansala Wanuntho","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyBz8cIGw1Qdijs-VLE9Q4OQZeaTK5tFx_EdSG9F87NuB-H40y3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cozy place with interesting choices of Chinese crepes. So tasty! Price was reasonable. The waiters & waitress were nice and effective.

Recommend to try classic jianbing with baocui (kinda crispy pastry).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdhJOAGw&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2024-2-11"},{"Name":"Kirsa Ferreiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCcsuj-YSM1iCR_Mu0KxRpTShHAmSJLdon_fPfG1Oc1S2geA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lovely little place located inside of a food court style ground floor. It specializes on Jian Bings Chinese crepes. Had the veggie option and was super yummy and nicely hot.
The owner was so friendly and the place has a lively vibe.
Really wanted to try their take in churros but I was so full after the crepe. Will have to go back :-))))","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJtpbDgQE&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2023-6-26"},{"Name":"Vivien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW18tdE7qOscwr1lzCirr5Oiyg4hDet9BYY63QIp0JamxFJ6LTLdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the crepe was super yummy with rich flavours😍 you can dine in but also I think it’s a great option for takeaway as well. The staff was extremely sweet - I didn’t speak Spanish so they took the time to explain the menu to me🫶
I will come again to try the other crepes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC5kcePxAE&fid=0x0:0x41f1752fafb92d30"],"When":"2023-10-14"}]

[{"Name":"Gally Mayer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsybanRpX1HdTsbYVjJSn_zPsRCyYrlJZod9WNlyWTt9fPXfdotQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an amazing restaurant. The food exceptional and the service of the highest quality. From the moment we walked in, Roberto took great care of us. We celebrated a birthday and had an amazing time. We intend to come back very soon","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDKt874qqnDejDH2rue92lnsBzMx8DGvL9dFnKgPFvj6bU5VNT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing!
Couldn’t expect the great level of tapas we had, all dishes were delicious, and the staff was so nice with us paying attention to every single detail, so the experience was great overall and for sure we will come back again","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXrMTsfA&fid=0x0:0x4d00ceb82b9575d4"],"When":"2024-10-13"},{"Name":"Adriana Prieto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBY0ZMb-5AYAm4xoWWvloMa67ubkg0YMDnIokGn44LiqXecA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place, one of my favorites in Madrid . This place is perfect to try small dishes and enjoy a good visit or meal with someone. The place is so cute and calm. My favorite plates are  the eggplants with cane sauce, I personally dont ever eat egplants, but these ones, I can est all night.
The crunchy tuna tartar is one of the best in town, and the artichoke hearts were perfect.
This time I tried something new that I hadn’t tried before, the solomillo sandwich, and it was great meat, soft and good taste, although I wouldn’t personally order it again, or maybe oder it if you just want a small bite for lunch and thats it.
In the past, I have also eaten the duck gyozas, which are very good as well, and the mini burgers, which are the perfect size to try both flavors, chili and truffle, both excellents.
The octopus is one of my favorite as well.
Now for dessert, the apple one is wonderful but ny favorite is all Madrid is their Torrija. It is truly the best none in town.
You will kot be disappointed in this place and you will definitely enjoy visiting with friends with no time limit. Must try!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3tYDnOQ&fid=0x0:0x4d00ceb82b9575d4"],"When":"2024-11-17"},{"Name":"Yuval Gelles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8bm4WVJaDiVEY6BN2RhaFWHXq81Ij_f1xMFzsfRNlZnXY5i8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a family lunch in which we shared many dishes offered in the menu, and all were very very tasty.
With the perfect service we got from Roberto - the meal was a great success.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Moira Moynihan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVObpBml0oEtWyNV_Es8r8pUwIswnnpgYFCAlvl8Cd3UILPX4zJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an incredible dinner here. I accidentally stumbled upon this place and was very grateful to have done so.

I only ordered two tapas: tomates y langostinos. Both were increíble. Wine pairing suggested by waiter was also lovely","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp27ffGw&fid=0x0:0x4d00ceb82b9575d4"],"When":"2023-8-29"},{"Name":"Olga Losynska (Sophie Sanchez)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBx8OZai52NcftfHjSYDUzhImlIVIr9v344mnQc8hhTLbpHWXV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place, good stuff, food good, some dishes I would add more spices (or at least salt) bot the other were really good","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniela Sergi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_NxQtkI__o_aBExxqfVxNcQXBj6HTIAbzlE7NoQMRBcqWlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As always, perfect service.

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place has nice atmosphere with japanese style, but there don't have too many tables. The stuff was really friendly and helpful. I ordered Takoyakis, Caballa binchotan, Angus naizō and Ramen, the dishes were great. Although personally I think it is a bit uncomfortable to eat Caballa binchotan, cause there has many little bones inside the fish, so you need to be really careful to eat them. For Angus naizō is really great beef, but the sauce was a bit over sweet for my taste. Then Ramen is great to have quite big piece of fried chicken steak on top, but the sauce on cover on it made the ramen soup saltier(it was already quite salty), so for me I would suggest to put the fried chicken steak in other small dishes to serve. In this case the customer will see how big piece of fried chicken steak and it will be crispier than getting wet with soup. This is a great place I would like to come back again, maybe other dishes are better, also they might be improving overtime.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChm9nedg\u0026fid=0x0:0x2550bd0c59d7b9aa"],"When":"2023-2-22"},{"Name":"Max Rosenberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlrmF0z1UiNeS3nF7u7I1sdJWsBp5cDcZ1Fua3UO3ObT86GVZ7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stumbled upon this spot on an evening walk. What an incredible experience. Each plate delivered. Made with care and brilliant flavor. Great value too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDB6oGq4AE\u0026fid=0x0:0x2550bd0c59d7b9aa"],"When":"2023-1-17"},{"Name":"Sverre Magnus Hagen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhXABL_C04QMvLn2Yg95yi5jiQ274gS7qTXz6HdCRv_cEYlMMG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service, so attentive, and excellent culinary experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sinead M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyBdpZrRUGn27BFmTtAa5MYX1IaN9Pn8YdmLwFt6EozOrtAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a really delicious meal here. The takoyaki especially was delicious. Our waiter was really great and very attentive. One of us has a shellfish allergy so he was very careful to check the dishes were ok to eat. He also recommended the mochi which was a highlight of the meal!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MAYRA TOMINO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf56WIc--zuNDZhmGxBT72ttD7U7h-gngK9y1dclfxK6ZBJ4ZJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty, well prepared food and charming atmosphere. [{"Name":"Alfonso A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK91A2pfZ9Q0vL9qD1ucBccJ9-Hmqhu_jMF-BtSUl64eqb6-F4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located inside Mercado Vallehermoso . Not afraid to say it’s my favorite Japanese restaurant in Madrid. Good service, pretty easy to just walk in and grab a seat at the bar. And excellent value for money.

We always order Karaage, Gyozas , some assortment of makis and nigiris  and what for me it’s the flagship dish. The tartar (tuna or salmon) plates.

Perfect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChxqDvoAE&fid=0x0:0xff56b466b4c2820e"],"When":"2023-2-11"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Looking for a quick sushi fix? This will absolutely meet your needs!
Great service, super fast, clean and very kind staff.
We had the vegan maki rolls which were quite a mix and very nice, and the mixed sushi (6 pieces), also very good.
I wouldn’t say the sushi here is extraordinary (and the mercado is extremely noisy, not the restaurants fault, but still) but it’s good, affordable and with great service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC9zp_-0gE&fid=0x0:0xff56b466b4c2820e"],"When":"2024-3-5"},{"Name":"Brandon Paris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWStE00QeqvbqvZ2fVCZQuI0GbWyRZwUGJ1mmsd80ZqxBueS_F5FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Cut and dry traditional Japanese restaurant found within a Market, offering a variety of sushi, sashimi, appetizers, and box meals.

Service was quick and friendly.
Ordered a Philadelphia roll and a Traditional Futomaki roll.
Food quality is great at the price point
Be sure to check out the desert and drink list as well!
The green tea mochi is pretty good as well","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICezLjB7QE&fid=0x0:0xff56b466b4c2820e"],"When":"2022-9-7"},{"Name":"hsin-yi shieh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyhRfDNe8tUg1O4G9ASl7jGv66Mc_d98VudT7luG8G2uWRiazi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place!  The food is always fresh and very well prepared……SO tasty!  The menu de día is a great price for two starters, one main course and a beverage. Separately, I also like to order my favorite Nigiri with salmon eggs. The service is very good , attentive and friendly. [{"Name":"George Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlf1PDgtAuS2chaX05BwT--tsWgRJATDPG7umvzqIZUyxacUwf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The place looked promising but it did fail a little. Service was average. The scallops are 10/10 a perfect 100% dish. The croquet where just ok, creamy but just average. The tuna tartar was tasteless it just did not taste like anything at all. The octopus was way too hard and chewy. I really wanted to like the place but will not return sadly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfjZfoPw&fid=0x0:0x725b0ec0c2b44ee2"],"When":"2024-12-31"},{"Name":"Hanna Zui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUvy_l-p6z_5YLYRY_8Fv0s2irWle0oihKrg3ed2oJT0XhGfM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We booked this restaurant for group of people and I can definitely recommend it! First of all for their service, we were 6 and asked to bring plates with 6 pieces and not 4 as written in menu and they did it without any problem (sometimes restaurantes refuse to do so).
Everything was tasty, especially tartar of shrimps","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID9loyMlAE&fid=0x0:0x725b0ec0c2b44ee2"],"When":"2024-3-16"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This Spanish cuisine restaurant offers both outdoor terrace and indoor sofa seating. The waitstaff is exceptionally friendly and provides detailed explanations of the dishes in English. The pacing of the food delivery is just right-not too fast nor too slow.

I tried their Menú Degustación con Maridaje, priced at 60 EUR per person. It featured six courses, including two desserts, and was paired with five alcoholic beverages. While all the dishes were above average, I especially enjoyed the Baby Squids, Dry Aged Steak Tartare, and Grilled Iberian Pork. However, I found the alcoholic beverages to be somewhat ordinary, especially the initial glass of paired red wine, which didn't quite meet expectations.

Overall, the service and food quality meet a certain standard, and the restaurant's location and pricing are appropriate. While the flavors may lean towards the heavier side, the portion sizes strike a good balance. I look forward to returning to try a different selection in the future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjp-_zRQ&fid=0x0:0x725b0ec0c2b44ee2"],"When":"2024-5-8"},{"Name":"Ebru Gurlek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuEc8l0aFVKj2lzsCOgB7F-IaMLDo8AlELAOufw9MeztAAcVN37Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My son and I found this restaurant on Google. We were starving and few time to search and eat in the neighbourhood. We booked a place immediately online & few minutes after we entered. We were attended immediately. The stuff was welcoming & the food was delicious & good portion of it was offered. We happily left.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDd3ezebA&fid=0x0:0x725b0ec0c2b44ee2"],"When":"2024-2-26"},{"Name":"Julia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK57gq-A3UraJSR2ONuOVj8B2usObmnZu-QJSY5n6-wxWTrlcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In live with this place! So grateful to find a place on my birthday with my friends that came from Italy/ Swiss and all of them happy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICVr6zFOA&fid=0x0:0x725b0ec0c2b44ee2"],"When":"2023-12-9"},{"Name":"C W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbZMs8m0UWcPKMI45NFNgcbraOxYWbCFQr1YVzUDfdfkfudmWz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The appetizers were phenomenal. Confit artichokes and tuna tartar with shiso leaves were both wonderful. Unfortunately, my husband ordered the grilled beef tenderloin medium but it came out rare. Since no one came to ask how our food was I had to go find someone who was not our server to address the issue and his plate came back with the steak cooked this time well done instead of medium and the rest of the dish (fries and peppers) now cold. You can’t undercook a steak then return it overcooked without replacing the fries at least. Fries just are not going to be good cold like that and for a restaurant at this price point should know how to cook a steak and that if this happens you need to drop some more fries.

I had the broth rice with red prawns and while the flavor was really excellent I do think the rice was slightly under cooked but I did not say anything about it because again the flavor was really something wonderful. I will say our waitress was friendly and we don’t speak Spanish so of course language barriers and all.

The restaurant has a very nice atmosphere and decor.

I would return but I don’t think my husband would.

I still give it 4 stars because again those appetizers really are amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexander Devrient","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXANIBA7pnzsBMxLN40rfZLvxIjTrvwunOxQnLeru1cXqDj2ktc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"That was the great surprise of the weekend!

We needed a restaurant after a theatre show and we didn’t have high hopes of finding anything. But Karanday allowed us to book with them and it was delicious!
Highlight were the artichokes and gambas.

+ Lucia, our waitress, was probably the best waitress we’ve ever had. So nice and she remembers everything by memory. Highlight recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louis Kwan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW41I8r0yEkiTaWCDbOix3tkPtAp-y_j9x7fXZwPh6B1liFmewqvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really good service and the food is great. We will be back.","Images":null,"When":""}]

PS : the Limoncello is great !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgrO2x_QE&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2025-2-14"},{"Name":"Javier MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDKt874qqnDejDH2rue92lnsBzMx8DGvL9dFnKgPFvj6bU5VNT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing Italian restaurant! The food quality is simply great, the pasta is really fresh and traditionally cooked. The staff is very friendly, attentive and proffesional, then prices are also ok, so we will come back again for sure!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZvoGsbA&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2023-10-1"},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"October 2024; Back again for Sunday lunch after a film at the Verdi and as usual it was packed. Luckily this time we had booked. We shared a provolone al forno as a starter and then had a main course each: a Carbonara prepared at the table and mafaldine cacio pepe. The shared gelato Calabrese dessert came rock hard and had to be microwaved! With 3 glasses of Italian rosso the bill for 2 came to a reasonable 63.50€

May 2024: We came here on Sunday after a VO film at the Verdi cinema across the road: a great combination. We just wanted a light lunch and ordered a pasta dish each: 'delizie limone' which indeed were delicious with their strong lemon flavour and a carbonara which was prepared individually for us at the table with two egg yokes. Also assembled at the table were the excellent Sicilian mini 'cannoli' for dessert!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjzsjiNA&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2024-4-21"},{"Name":"María Emilia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7l4rZyTIc2N-He2N_SlfuIuwGzB_7jNQw35K1jiNqY8uJEli=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice decoration and great food, definitely try the rigatoni genovese.

They have a very nice Italian wine that I recommend as well, Pinocchio. So soft and silky.

I really like that they receive you with a complimentary entree, with mortadella, Gorgonzola and grissini.

The cannoli were excellent as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhtu2JSA&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2023-3-8"},{"Name":"Antoinette Serame","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO9DxgExr3mHzVX53CaQjxZrfAWOu-eRoNDPjkUWvGqgQk0H8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The place is very well decorated which drew us in and the staff was very lovely. We ordered the carbonara and the rigatoni de rabo de toro. For the carbonara, they had the detail of table side cooking where the waiter completed the carbonara sauce in front of us. The show is nice however it unfortunately impacted the quality of the carbonara resulting in a very “meh” sauce (basically egg yolk). Rigatoni was far better however the plates did not justify the price in my opinion.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhhtju-wE&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2023-3-7"},{"Name":"Tyler Nieman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsdSiHAzeqCVyS1xDh9hVMxNja6AuzJud2UblO-BnVqVMTSyKBXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"my dish was a mirror after i was done with it.

get the conchiglioni. and the focaccia.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRq6OR6XMweQfQKFf6WyB2&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZUYqB0thrOalXospRKjGM-RmdFeKYTALM5SdedZCBPoo3Gvk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently visited this Italian restaurant and had a great time. The cozy atmosphere and friendly staff made me feel right at home. I started with the Provolone el Forno, which was a delicious and well-prepared appetizer. The cheese was perfectly melted and complemented by the tangy tomato sauce. Next, I tried the Regina Margarita pizza, which was a classic and satisfying choice. The crust was crispy and the toppings were fresh and flavorful. Finally, I sampled the Gnocchi Noci e Gorgonzola, which was rich and creamy with the perfect balance of nutty and tangy flavors. While it was a bit too heavy for my taste, I appreciated the quality of the dish. Overall, I recommend this restaurant for its inviting ambiance, attentive service, and tasty Italian cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJhqqbcg&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Iliana De la Torre García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7eDJlgCe7_7y_Kym6PoBP7GFRTCXL4Q05aIkgyZqvVxv1YX0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"At the beginning the experience was really good, looks like authenticity Italian and the smell it’s charming. Although the food was good and the restaurant it’s so attractive, the service was extremely pressuring, all the time interrupted and rushing for us to finish and take the plates in the very minute you are over. Didn’t like the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdp_jgNA&fid=0x0:0x7e7e8237b76cafc0"],"When":"2024-2-18"}]

[{"Name":"Farhan Jaffer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTSSsomuTxTJjNuYvSpbY96jl-r0ACpUlypkPyeNLRiu2kcdR9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Difficult to compare this to other restaurants that serve a tasting menu because this is based in a Mercado which I was already aware of before attending. Price for value is well worth it. This is strictly fusion. So if you are expecting clean and simple flavours it is not the place for you. The food is of high quality - my favourite was the tuna cerviche and carrillera. I would definitely recommend giving it a go. Creative and attractive dishes and staff are knowledgeable and friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsa21ar4tvdhCDAyAv0SqF&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Tanner Andrew","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHDdm_ZI81IYgd9f4VhP22MFChY6hrSmF_6Jg4zPpXcUZwHDcy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tripea was an amazing experience in a quiet Spanish market. From beginning to end the food was delicious and beautiful, creating a memorable experience. Food was superb. The quaint atmosphere of being in a market was really cool, and the service was really exceptional. The only negative I have is that it could be quite hot inside but nevertheless the food, service , and experience in this Peruvian/Asian fusion greatly outweighs any negatives I could come up with. Can’t wait to return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3R1X5rAJIIJyg9rqWeYnO&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2025-8-20"},{"Name":"Isabella Rigamonti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-XBeH13yWkYk7-DPCyWx1M5rtUucDpPYqQOMt0Ra-KwCOjXP1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible restaurant just as I thought!
I have been wanting to come to this place and try the set menu and luckily I found a last minute stop.
The food was so great and we ended up full but not overly done, it was tasty, great portions and amazing price.
The wine was also so interesting! We tried a bubbly Albariño which was the first of its genre I’d ever tried and it paired super well with the food.
I am celiac and they were called me prior to double check cross-contamination was ok and to find a replacement for the dish I couldn’t eat.
The staff was very nice and attentive and they would explain every dish with lots of details.
10/10 both me and my friends all said we would be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8G5qa8L_UM_iea2unCjzL&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"Duncan OJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUsMjWmmn1XGbSsIf4aonyYqbYwENjMHaDqh04Y05GaVss2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant in the Vallehermoso Market in Madrid is a gem!  A fusion of Peruvian and Asian influences the food is great!  It’s understandably popular so reservations need to be made one month in advance.
The service was efficient and friendly.
Every dish of the fixed tasting menu was not only delicious but also beautifully presented.
The market is a full of character but is a touch rough and tumble, but in my opinion, the location adds to the overall experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXzYSw2wE&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2024-10-19"},{"Name":"Po Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLAJkph8Qhm6iaNyd_pM6tJH0Pbgs6kvd-3CNQf0oXHuVnr5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Phenomenal dining experience located in a humble Mercado in the outskirts of Madrid. The tasting menu consists of 6 dishes and each one demonstrates the fusion of Peruvian, Asian and Spanish cuisine. Staff was so kind to accommodate us with the wrong reservation (we made reservation for the following day by accident but were fortunately accommodated on arrival due to others’ cancellation).
This is one of those restaurants you have to try once in your life time just for the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhu6eRHA&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2023-3-18"},{"Name":"Tom Burko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmwo3gnlgEICVJUmHDY55_qV-9qKNGOWJ2s7mdKPLXG_pT_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOW! What a delicious meal!!
I went there with a friend for the lunch service. We're both foodies and the experience at Tripea is one of the best ones we've had at Madrid!
The restaurant is situated inside a market, where you'll find a long table all the guests sit around. The concept is a service of 8 Peruvian-Asian dishes, including a dessert. The courses are being served for everyone at the same time.
Every single course was carefully made, beautifully presented, and packed full of lovely flavours! My personal favorite was the BAO bun that comes up somewhere in the middle of the meal.
Our server was kind and attentive, and explained about each course.
Highly recommend!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZk7mYdg&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2023-9-17"},{"Name":"Alisa Chopard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnITwjRZKEdvtkIUdE6Otzn0trHdYZIA15Yz9WJhUDuGaS7-Vh1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was pleasantly surprised by the combination of flavours the Chef put together. Being Asian, I appreciated how different his take was on the Asian flavours of my childhood. Most of the dishes had a tart / tangy flavour profile, which I loved. I felt there was one miss: the iberico siew mai, which was one dimensional in flavour — much too sweet. The star of the show was the tuna belly tartare with coconut cream and chives — the balance of flavours and textures was truly spectacular. It wasn't included in the tasting menu, though, and came at an additional cost. Service was excellent, pacing of the dishes was good, and overall, it was fantastic quality and quantity for the price. Very happy I managed to score a last minute reservation, and will definitely be back if I am ever in Spain again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1gNK3fA&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2024-1-4"},{"Name":"Alfonso A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK91A2pfZ9Q0vL9qD1ucBccJ9-Hmqhu_jMF-BtSUl64eqb6-F4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Located in Mercado Vallehermoso , Tripea offers a Peruvian - fusion tasting menu if you are lucky enough to get a reservation.

They usually open the bookings on the first of each month. At 12pm. And it’s very competitive, we set an alarm and went to get a table, and the first available option was on the 15th.

As mentioned, they offer a tasting menu of 6 courses with a price of 40€. Drinks not included. First and foremost everything was perfectly executed. We started with a roasted leek with a peanut romesco, chive béarnaise that was one of the stars of the night with its charred and creamy flavor. After it we had the tuna “tiradito” with a passion fruit reduction and kefir. Which was good, my girlfriend loved the fruity flavor, but I’m more of a purist with raw fish. I think it’s great on its own. Next, another star. The Peruvian bao with chicken filling, olive aioli and fried quail egg. It was my bite of the night, for how unexpected, tasty and filling it was. It was followed by a mussel ceviche. With happened to be a warm noodle dish. The idea was there, but the execution was a bit salty. Last but not least the roasted quail with massaman curry, coconut cream and seared bok choi. Delicious , perfect conjunction of flavors between the quail and the curry sauce. Sweet and savory. Delicious.

We finished with a brownie with some fruity sauce and petazetas. We also ordered pisco sours that were really good.

Only two things we didn’t like.

1. Add ons dishes . In my opinion there’s no need for them when what you offer it’s a tasting menu. Have an option A with 6 courses and a option B with 8 , with some premium products like oysters if you want, but don’t have the staff table by table suggesting that the signature dishes are outside of the tasting menu. And they need to be ordered before the start of the meal. When you don’t know about portion sizes . Also suggesting that one shouldn’t worry about quantity, it’s chill to add them, as it’s not much food. This is oversell and this is wrong. There’s enough food on the menu to leave the place really full. The couples on both our sides ordered two extra dishes on top, on the premise that it wouldn’t be too much food, and were really struggling by the end of the night.
2. Music. Very loud and Electronic upbeat. I don’t know if the staff put a playlist to prepare everything , but we seemed to be in the so called “Ruta del Bakalao” for a great portion of our meal. Not the best for dinner in my opinion. Then they changed to what I think it was something more Peruvian and it was great.

All in all, the experience was amazing, impeccable dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDezb_2jgE&fid=0x0:0x8212ce97799dd90"],"When":"2022-10-16"}]
