user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Marina MK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOi3FPngf0LIxHwsDbHqECSiQISMI6c0Imu7a3ws1wgtinJZ57=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The meal was delicious! The dishes were generous and tasty.
The concept of choosing each element of your dish adds something enjoyable to the experience.

The atmosphere in the restaurant is pleasant and it's a nice setting.

The service was excellent. The waiters are friendly, welcoming, and give good recommendations.

I recommend it 100%. I'll definitely go back if I'm ever in Madrid again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC__IKfQQ2v3G1uIcvDsiOg&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Emanuella Ampofowaah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKn1cU3P7RDbgyAtWRgrFDrWayXUr0UNM0QXdmFJhrVBwIw6UM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried My Pasta My Place in Madrid and it was honestly such a great experience! The food was 10/10 — fresh, flavourful, and exactly what you want when you’re craving proper pasta outside of Italy.

A huge shoutout to our server Vittoria, who was amazing from start to finish. She gave excellent service, was super friendly, and made the whole experience even better.

The atmosphere is also a big win — really chill and relaxed, perfect if you want to actually have a conversation without having to scream over loud music. Definitely a spot I’d recommend if you’re in Madrid and love good pasta!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSWoqpYNssmfzX0FjSJWEI&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"215fabian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsSUanT1lBtn6aKSXAvl42EWGX6DW04Ely2be-9WgtWG1ygbRsDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very very nice food, we had the Carbonara and Setas combined with different ingredients and the price-quality-quantity was excellent. Tiramisu super creamy and the perfect dessert. While the service was awesome, I don’t like that we were “forced” to tip by telling us in a very clear intentional way that we can also tip when paying with card and rushing with the bill. I get that weekends are busy and you want to free up tables for people waiting, but it should not feel rushed for guests that are already there. I also think the service deserved tips (and we gave some), but it should come voluntarily and just took our overall experience down. Hence 4/5 stars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6j1vc3_VVJMFF2DrUIZZZ&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"mcrhkgirlie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtYRlAdQYWZnWfJz_JUe_DlApTswIPjFOnI4EjIVk9EsHDJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I chose this restaurant because of the great reviews from hundreds of people and it was an  absolute pleasure for all three of us.

The atmosphere is amazing with the decorations, the subtle soft music in the background, the warm welcome from staff. Also the artwork on the wall enhances the entire experience. We then chatted with one of the staff members and he mentioned that the work and poems were done by the owner. That’s when I understand the name of the restaurant.

The food was GREAT. Love the fact that we can have our own combination of the pasta and we ordered the Oro rojo, 5 Formaggi, and Oh my funghi. The texture is perfect and the flavour was sooo rich. Loved every layer of tastes that melted in my mouth. The cappuccino was very nice as well. Not to mention the staff is also very friendly too. I would definitely recommend. Undoubtedly 5*/5!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfbzXfb3qP6g3U6Cg3lw-1&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Jovan Ribitsch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8kTK86OGwO2h2WroM3kHbx8QCayhcgJLEUQYF4p-rzEvpZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our Dinner at My Pasta, My Art was just incredible! We got a table real fast, ordered the Buffalo Stracciatella with bread as starter & for pasta we chose the Carbonara Original and the Oh My Funghi, which were just too good! For dessert we chose the Tiramisu, but accidentally got the Cremoso mascarpone, which was otherworldly, so I’ll gladly take the happy accident. Also, special thanks goes to our waitress for the evening, Lauren, she always looked after us and made sure everything was to our satisfaction! I can only recommend My Pasta, My Art and I am looking forward to being there again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8lhQgVO3yBx7psqW4wE9q&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Angela W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQU0wEofHM726fSSPsjscTjAY2s6xmLVeuDbK-uplyfr62QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Well worth the wait if there's a line. Food is fresh and incredibly tasty. A bonus is the amazing servers. They are attentive, make accurate suggestions, and are fun guys. I will definitely come back on my next trip to Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuCwXy_4ZldNU_fReYQ0Bo&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Yian Guo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqa_INOltSTnYicdkTqsJObMIy3kHYhKlp5I-Sp53F906zDleQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The provolone was very flavorful but also a little too salty to my taste.

My Oh my funghi didn’t deliver the flavor that was expected as it’s so popular and recommended by the waitress. I added broccoli for 1.9 € and received 2.5 florets 😂. The Parmesan was generous though.

To be fair, my partner loved his carbonara with cuttle fish combo and it tasted better than mine.

I was asked to leave a review to which I happily said yes. But the waitress tried to scan a card against my phone (probably auto 5 star on google), which felt a little intrusive. I thought they wanted an honest review? For some reason my phone didn’t work with the card mechanism, so I’m leaving my honest opinion.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFSzcne6tO5DQ-XUUU5o1W&fid=0x0:0x18ddd8f9bf75ad42"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Donovan Lynch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8f_Z6J45AnNKlK1EXgMU7QLDk8ClxBUzJ_YMGRp55LXPtXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a great time & the food was delicious! Delicious food and healthy cashiers are so nice. Only downside a little bit expensive for what they offer","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wend Robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKk2ZXtQ50iLbU7DYCrzsMF8AgvjAySuRUfehuvGSSLCr1uqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited this place during a trip to Madrid, it was a Sunday evening and I was feeling the effects of the many Spanish Vinos that is consumed throughout the weekend.
Spanish food doesn't seem to be very plant based and so I was really pleased to find this place which had plenty of choice. I ordered the vegan poke bowl which was just what I needed. Plenty of rice, avocado, a mango salsa and some plant based protein.
We ate in and the atmosphere was a bit weird, but that's probably because most people grab their food and go. Anyway I will definitely visit here again next time I am in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Romain PERRIER","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmcWuprWaExDgGWjV9tlufTaY08HjxoOCSEOlEHu__PacRzTRTIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great surprise! Super good food and very nice service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rodrigo Molinare","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTOx-zNF0XuwLhFABHKYAh9XdmMFq1i7gOIaZqq3IteawZ4ngImA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great small place with nice food and service","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTsZr6HJIQPNZmCIoUOCSLssdSjB_gKLyLriabfg9JZxjHqb9n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En Sidrería El Asturiano puedes desayunar, comer y cenar en buena zona y buen restaurante.
Hemos estado desayunando en este bar-sidrería y tanto el café como la tortilla de patatas y las barritas de tomate y ajo es el mejor desayuno que puedes hacer, aunque disponen de otras opciones igual de buenas.
Sobre el restaurante hicieron reserva previa para 20 comensales, y ocupamos todo el comedor interior.
Sirvieron los entrantes, croquetas de cabrales, boletas, jamón ibérico… Luego pusieron merluza rebozada con patatas y chorizo a la sidra.Rodos los entrantes bien preparados y buenos de sabor. Posteriormente sirvieron el principal, los entrecots al punto y punto menos y los cachopos. Tanto la carne como los cachopos muy bien preparados. El sabor del cachopo era el auténtico que me recuerda a la Asturias de siempre.
El postre, la tarta de queso… Increíble, aunque me costó empezarla porque el cachopo llena muy mucho, tiene buenos ingredientes y muy bien preparados.
Lo único que no me gustó es que no tienes cobertura en el salón interior, pero, cuando me vio el camarero me ofreció la WiFi del local, otro punto a favor del servicio al cliente.
Volveremos a la “Sidrería el Asturiano” en la zona de Chamberí porque es un buen sitio para comer y me quedó probar la fabada asturiana.
Restaurante recomendado ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3h6CAC1ZigaBLaJIaZFKQ&fid=0x0:0xb4b42a80265334a6"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Luisfer Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1g68BSJehIMiGEHUvNOZDDJuq9UGC4lWgJmAoblEHWeP8UF05=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Como buen asturiano, su carta cumple con todos los mandamientos de la tierra: fabada, verdinas, cachopo,… todo casero.
Yo me incliné por la fabada y una carne estofada. Por supuesto, con sidra.
No tomé, pero vi pasar una merluza a la sidra y unas albóndigas con una excelente pinta.
De los sitios de la vieja escuela donde las legumbres te las traen en el perolo para que te eches lo que quieras. Y al lado un plato con su compango asturiano.
Fabada rica, aunque las he probado mejores. Pero la carne estofada demuestra la buena mano de la cocina. Imposible resistirse a mojar pan.

Ojo: las raciones son abundantes. Aconsejaría pensar en compartir la mayoría.

En las mesas altas de la terraza de calle y el bar, o en el pequeño comedor del interior se puede también comer de raciones sin que falten los clásicos de cualquier barra española: bravas, patatas Ali-Oli,…

Aviso: guardad hueco para el arroz con leche de postre.
Fue imperdonable que no probé sus especialidad, que es paleta de cerdo asada","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIqOuE7AE&fid=0x0:0xb4b42a80265334a6"],"When":"2025-4-6"},{"Name":"GLORIA BELLISCO","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXT56J73oIuug_8Jfb_RX_VEA5azhUilzjq85dHdvLqowdih5gX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Os lo recomiendo.
Las croquetas de jamón o queso cabrales y membrillo, una sidra dulce y canapés de anchoa.
Un sitio donde el servicio es amable y profesional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7XacAoBsCBYddc6FIzT39&fid=0x0:0xb4b42a80265334a6"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Fernando Celaya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLndU8fLNyb_W7HTvffhNuCkF-jiIC-BiLH9n_mexpY08XOkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos estado cenando y el trato ha sido espectacular. Hemos estado como en casa, pero mejor porque el cachopo no conozco nadie que lo haga igual. Volveremos","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juanma Gp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4ceQpJjFoSgB42kXeajfjW-IjWtOgyik54vGZs3Dkq7WGvg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reservamos para tres personas el domingo para probarlo por las reseñas. Cuando llegamos estábamos solos, no había nadie más en el salón, y con bastante olor a humedad. Pedimos de comanda fabada y pote y segundos albóndigas y cachopo y hubo más que suficiente para los tres, incluso sobró casi la mitad. Sabor de la comida normal, nada destacable. Eso sí, y lo más importante, los tres hemos estado con diarrea y dolores de estómago. Cuidado con eso. Algo parece que no estaba muy bien.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cristian Fernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaXfhdIkeF7NVaj3i5oovRldlyR3JbJPwqIIU8HqZOQ1AZtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Restaurante asturiano de los de toda la vida. Se come increíble y las raciones son generosas. El cachopo estaba de lujo. Trato, servicio y atención de diez. Volveremos seguro","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENv1lq7t_e2buwE&fid=0x0:0xb4b42a80265334a6"],"When":"2025-5-11"}]

[{"Name":"S. Ozturk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRWgtAC18PzAJWgPogI2r_iWarBcop8MJs4WU-pcqJJ5_TWRnc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Overall very nice place!

We had tasting menu with pairing wine. No worries you will be full when you have it all ☺️

There are 8 dishes and I only took pic of 7. I forgot one 🙈 Taste was super good but not suprisingly. I feel like it is what it should be except desert.. Icecream flavor was very good with cookie crumbs.

Only advice I can give: if you plan to have tasting menu with pairing wine, eat very slowly.. Otherwise its guaranteed you will be drunk because service is quite fast!

Athmosphere is cute but in my opinion it is a bit too bright. It could have been a perfect date place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvnIR_uftfdS3KOHWsR8WB&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Carolina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK420puWbuo5YZhyIvsU4nBPftsaHTwIQ07BSKnMlXHou6gY1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 tasting menu, there was not one dish we did not enjoy!!! Very creative, mostly sashimi but like you’ve never tasted it before! Will come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0YhxJNOg3OK7V-F6rhHjW&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Shamim Nadery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhk8TfUXXpf9I1c2jt1Tob9umaWSCj0SEhm8w2_sV7XVAbnF0a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was delicious, but the ambiance could be improved. The service was good, and we were very satisfied with our choice of the long tasting menu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB664XqWsRU9JoB1Dzsntup&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Kellan Mair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJYF10TSgrctpypYSgqENq310N39DEGDRiRWDTglxqtXBA87g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was okay. Nothing extraordinary. Definitely not worth the price. Would not go again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoqxVNlWC021EHYz2WjDhV&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2025-7-5"},{"Name":"Ryan Mascheri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKVie1dDzgajAJYiiS48pOYrs0z4E7Sllu7lFEZ_b4jFDAbAgV1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great fusion concept with amazing food and cocktails. We tried a variety: tuna tartar, salmon Nigri, meatballs (which are shredded on the inside and soooooo good), and shrimp Rossetto, a perfect amount for 2.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJmubkEA&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Claudia Serafim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBBMfzpAkTi93_YVaJ04dOmW3vIOo3gbBtQ6aT6Saadf7YIrs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very recommendable place if you are into fusion.
After trying several dishes, we couldn’t agree on a favorite since they all had a surprising combo of flavors.
Service was very helpful, explaining how the food was prepared and giving guidance on how to taste it, respecting our time having each course and barely no waiting time in-between courses.
A restaurant to return to, definitely.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDM8uT1swE&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2019-12-24"},{"Name":"sonia castillo juanhuix","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcNlAu_a3TWyZ-wS6QXGiVc8hyE6x73t4_6-KjhXXmrtDiqStn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Peruvian-Japanese-Spanish fusion dishes, couldn't make up our mind deciding on the best one! Very smart flavour combinations, really worth our stay. Will return!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsnKzN0QE&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2020-1-25"},{"Name":"Begoña Almería","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdxeyZTER0YhVcicow4hFBhHzi66ybATxlVHK2b5DzwC0AEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely worth it! Bacira has a great cuisine at a very affordable price. You should try the carabineros and the meatballs- delicious! As well as some of their desserts. Perfect for a romantic dinner or just a hang out with friends, the place is small so try to make a reservation beforehand","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDc-_aePA&fid=0x0:0x8d22a4ec789fe0bc"],"When":"2019-5-6"}]

[{"Name":"Simorenes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe1stBqMhgDhiA5SKo6QVhd1J5_QrzkxFsGB95hSveRKC4_O8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice lovely little terrace, very cozy atmosphere. Would be great for a date.
Food is good too, though the choice in the menu is not that big.
Can confirm that they have authentic cannoli with ricotta, which is uneasy to find in Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCI3O9S2fRD0HFUnQ2z3bq7&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Ranhita Bora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzsRZKDA_pTE1JYqjn97eyM5ul4b9XmHg22yPjqtd2DXdXLOSr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite restaurants in Madrid. The rooftop ambiance is unmatched, pinsas are phenomenal, and the pastas are great. Service is always kind and welcoming. Also everything is very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAYKT6h2-edwXacMQjIJdL6&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Camila","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPPnqDk5rZ8RpIgFvLHEsnJG07IeET03Yrng-GGt5MZnLxGzDd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, very pretty rooftop atmosphere. We ordered a shared charcuterie board and a pizza. Prices were really good! Would go again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIbCtuCPjYnDaw&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2025-5-29"},{"Name":"zayn alam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzqH-tqvdE1EaA4-wFeOKH2MNcD1xz8vxt52iGfcGIWNQvuV0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful location and it was a great to dine on the rooftop. It was warm and cozy; it felt completely alien to the outside cold of November.
Mikel, Javi and Gemaila offered exceptional service. The pinza was to die for, and the truffle pasta was increíble. Would definitely recommend and WILL RETURN.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3od-2Lg&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2024-11-15"},{"Name":"Murad Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZKfB4suC6QmXGDEtifXydgUII7eht2plF_i2LcRNpUx0taBsJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Friendly English speaking service.
Fast and efficient.
Fantastic choice of authentic Italian dishes.
We only tried the cold platter this time. But was very good quality.
Only strange thing no Italian beer. German.  Odd.
Restaurant had a nice cosy charm and well cooled during hot summer.
Busy place. Good atmosphere.
Also they had Prosecco. Which is hard to find in Madrid.
Lasagne and fondue both great. Lasagne small bit very rich.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpkKjxfQ&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2023-7-26"},{"Name":"Jorge Rivero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpkZ12jHhGOq-z9LIdgDb5OrGCbnRup1KcK6NPyfi8Yd4sEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect place for this time of the year. Great atmosphere, great food and great service. The food portions were perfect and the flavor of the pesto gnocchi was excellent. We will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBsPPVtAE&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2023-1-9"},{"Name":"Alberto Camporesi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1miE0mneFowB-woczcFMLxJRIXvdG3U1Df5pgo1ONQBvdoIpK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I don’t understand the high reviews, maybe for the atmosphere that I admit is nice, rooftop vibe. But the food quality left us a bit speechless:
1) The Pinza was definitely from a Frozen dough. Tasteless, also vegetables tasted a bit frozen.
2) Mortadella should not be cooked! It should be put on pizza when it’s out of the hoven and ready. I’m surprised if an Italian chef did this.
3) What ruined our experience was also a loud couple in the table next to us. They were smoking all the time. Very rude. The owners should avoid this to happen.

Vitello tonnato and service were very good. I will recommend this place only for aperitivo or a drink, there are better places for pinzas also less overpriced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZvrDXvQE&fid=0x0:0xc35b4100798ba9ea"],"When":"2023-10-1"}]

En cuanto a la comida, estaba todo delicioso, con una mención especial para el pulpo, que fue espectacular.

WOW","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruslan Zhurakhov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhDEwKZPKfk72UuXXXVHwzQec_eD6mqnvLq4R5GyggI2AL2Fiv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best place to have a coffee, maybe missing only ceramical cups and some food 👀","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPooaIeA\u0026fid=0x0:0x9be33cc55f360e0b"],"When":"2024-11-30"},{"Name":"Raimonds Gruntins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzZzQZkCO3YuTd1VK1NcpfmfL3fz_WgmmScsy9_OeGMSu8WCZr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent choice for a temporary workspace in central Madrid. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aimee Condon Nelligan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiR4-FtYsAvHthz0nmE3oZug8uj86oZiCHQ5O4PFcqBuQRx65m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just wow. No words to explain how good the pistachio latte was, I got it with almond milk and will be thinking about it forever more.

The owner is such a gentleman, and you can tell that he really loves what he does, so much effort and love goes into each cup. The pistachio Madeline was perfect too. He even gave us a complimentary lemon pie latte to try and that was also amazing.

Best coffee we had in all of Madrid, we even got beans to bring home! Cannot recommend enough 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC76CxxUjeNC1FqAb_zYi-n&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"DILANA KOCAK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJMUTZCAZRvsKaYc3BfI0PNhxmEhnXRG8RtdKhSlBFeDel7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naji and Claudia are amazing! One of the best coffee spots I’ve been to — you can really taste the care and precision that goes into every cup. The baristas take their time to craft the coffee properly, never rushing, and it shows in the flavor and consistency. The atmosphere is calm, minimalist, and perfect for slowing down and actually enjoying your drink. You can tell they’re passionate about quality over quantity here — every espresso, pour-over, or latte feels thoughtfully made. Definitely worth the visit if you appreciate real specialty coffee.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbwd49pCoqogqRZBb8jTRs&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"John de Souza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYUUPdXaxEVxOuRnuJyQZjc52PmG9ire4RF3bQ-6Ky8ZlC2fq3Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a wonderful cafe. The staff is super friendly and kind. The coffee is really well made and at the perfect temperature. The atmosphere is really nice as well and several tables. Really worth visiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARv0eihpZFU3EUJjZquBe6&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Raquel Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-7K5jFlR7mCiOuhtyCk6UDOUwkME5h4UUFwkd5ZCfJ81m1zDk0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great specialty coffee. I had a cappuccino and it's was delicious. But apparently they are famous for the pistachio drink. I will for sure they it next time.

Update:
We went back and my husband had the pistachio latte. It was also delicious!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZyDz4sgwqazhsbr5cftyK&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Niyati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7Wk0qOUH1spkZvEtNKiVBu_IC-wc6A0yszJP88kvXzN6V7Diy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The pistachio latte is definitely worth the hype. My brother also ordered the vienna latte which had berry and chocolate hints as he was allergic to nuts. Even though it’s a smaller space the vibes are so lovely, staff are so helpful and friendly not to mention incredibly skilled!!! I have also heard coffee in Madrid isn’t fantastic but this place for sure doesn’t fall into that remit. Will have to visit again when I return to Madrid 😇","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDastC6dBg0039oUIjbxhMS&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Brandon Sims","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRKNsxCVhYb7vmegNulsjK-59VJEBfEuyJ4VRBhdB9GRooi9BD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Naji the owner boasts a great storefront and experience. Crafting the coffee, and flavor combinations is a true skill here. Even the small pastries served are quite good.

My first time having an Army latte, half matcha and half espresso. It works well. The pistachio latte is very robust and all the best qualities of the nut itself.

Hope to see your NYC storefront soon. Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDB5WF4y4W2hxa8j-kXK2mr&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Yesenia P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM7VjO6FFWS5TUCOXZvd1W-Os_-oWR_lK9Kenn8-jKQoOEfK-IRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for the coffee, stayed for the matcha. I love to try as many different spots as I can fit into a trip in a new city, but this place was so great we ended up coming back three days in a row!! The flat white and lemon pie latte were both exceptional but what truly stood out for me was the quality and flavor of the matcha. I would recommend this place to any matcha hater and bet they'd change their mind after. It wasn't overly grassy or bitter, it was well balanced and smooth
The owner was very welcoming and explained the different flavors to me despite being very busy at the time. We threw in the toast as a impulse buy and were so glad we did. I've never had anything like it before but it was the perfect balance for breakfast with our coffee and matcha.
Wish we had more days in Madrid just to keep coming back here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKN7LpBRKcA6T-UA3WzBKS&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Savannah W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUyr8WTLMHJ5qYXt0W-LBxU5GOjbdaUwuOOgErfJ4Exw1OxQ4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"an absolute gem!
🍵known for their Pistachio Latte, but, out of all my visits and tastes, the Vienna is my favorite
💚Naji, the namesake & owner, is kind, welcoming, and makes every latte by hand and
⌨️laptop friendly (if there’s space)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtHXwHzXTmx7vpNHZX2OZ3&fid=0x0:0x84432a8f9d44d886"],"When":"2026-2-12"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Chris Kris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqoILO3vrzFpuTdhdrKzNZzvwqLheYqNSto7Gm8joeyXL6qV4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hemos comido de maravilla, desde los platos principales hasta el postre. Todo estaba excelente. Recomendable al 100 %. Además, el interior tiene una decoración con muchísimo estilo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwwqquWcutbbUqM-k5rUZ_\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Pedro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrF3NP8BRXTy27cVAi9wZf30ACek3SsON-Q13Sdla1bXNGyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me ha llamado la atención este nuevo restaurante y acabo de comer. Precioso local, encantador, con techos amplios y mucho espacio entre mesas, también con algunas mesas en un sitio más reservado. Está totalmente reformado. La atención me ha gustado mucho, bastante personal y conocían el producto bien. Los platos bien preparados, muy rico. De aperitivo nos pusieron unos huevos especiales y humus de remolacha, pedimos un ceviche al medio y luego diferentes platos, entre ellos lubina. Todo viene acompañado de guarniciones preparadas al detalle. De postre compartimos una tarta de pistacho, un canel roll con queso y un brownie, espectaculares. También he preguntado y durante la semana sirven menús bastante elaborados y a buen precio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbAtpuqYAbLc1o4o3W_EeP\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"José Antonio Alcalá","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX64i5ps_opprY_OPAA3LnX1Qa6_eHC3n_R3W-2ycWmFUlSuiKgiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"¡Una joya! Todo estuvo excelente: la comida, el ambiente y el trato. Cada plato se nota hecho con cariño y buen gusto. Ideal tanto para una comida especial como para disfrutar de un buen café.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5LJdLLe_oyCZDZFUIH72I\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Chechu Carrillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmp5lNVSmybGAF7o5WUMPdNcXcdAyXmpKVtV5IDaG9xAElB7De=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos para desayunar y nos acabamos quedando 3 horas allí, la atención al detalle y el mimo con el que preparan todo no pasan desapercibidos. Sandra nos fue recomendando en todo momento que cositas probar y la verdad es que no pudimos elegir mejor sitio para nuestra mañana de viernes. El lugar es bastante amplio y el servicio rápido y preciso, no lo podría recomendar mas!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOVcuCmpDN669kC-rc8QG2\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Irini B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0-wMHn2tbCK_2smLfuv07AZanzvQMWKiUe5y6xjifRGaxP6fa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"和朋友一起去的，从开胃菜到甜品都让人惊艳，食材新鲜，调味克制又到位，吃得舒服又健康。听说主厨旅居过很多国家，菜品里真的能感受到融合各地风味的巧思。环境很好很适合聊天，服务员也超级nice。原来就很爱旁边的little big cafe，这家更是直接放进一定会再回访的清单里。","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOj5Q_U4fo4u8AXs2xgYjn\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"RENATA Moreira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJIx6_UDaVwAH7mH23PIa03kKTpQu0P7y54UZ9wiD-TdAMnLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Si te gusta The Little Big Cafe, Bistró by Little Big Cafe te va a encantar: misma calidad, mismo cariño y sabores increíbles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBezfnFF-ki4NkkHsRnkS1m\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Cherine El Khatiri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOssJsPZNi5CoUCRE4fuEonXAiOgSyavwQ6ODE3_B1LmeA5A_v=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Comida de calidad y atención inmejorable. Llevo años yendo a The little big café y estoy encantada con ellas! En Bistró me pedí el salmón al miso con verduritas y puré de boniato: estaba espectacular. Tenéis que probar este sitio 🧡","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBd7i1wwXmteZDy8vpIWHlF\u0026fid=0x0:0x606a8318c17df8c7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Raquel Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB6n-227d4b3vzVYnSTfCJuicHHx0RhlAjsPPGLVJEUSj9Ju8J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fuimos a comer y estaba todo riquísimo. Rapidez en el servicio, platos de calidad con un toque especial diferenciador, opciones de carta para todos los gustos y momentos del día… y merece mención expresa el excelente trato por parte de todo el personal. ¡Volveremos seguro!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Swaminathan Iyer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURUEIlFpt5SrtMMnQk0JH_Gizudcj8eT3a-kpcYdP7V_7YXEdIRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee place for awesome choice of pies . I discovered walking. The service is good and great atmosphere for someone with little knowledge of Spanish they made me feel at home .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBi3_wZ4s_BAf2PA3Oz5it5&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Elizabeth S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjZWs0tvj11Fn-k7tyv7Fkfm__qPKtbWum2PWV6wqkLAotJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am an event organizer living in Madrid and I have now hosted group events for my company at 9 Lives twice. The 9 Lives team is warm, friendly, and responsive, making my life so easy. I'm also extremely pleased with their menu and can't recommend their pastries enough, especially the pies. Also, don't miss their arnold palmer (ice tea & lemonade). As an American, I can confirm that it's the real deal. Thank you Ric & team. We'll be back again soon. Photo credit: Nacho del Río.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASPnbJ6khyORpvsnXMutZa&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Deborah Laks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3grBV_SHuXFTJao3Rutge7Qtph1-vhD5tPBYjbJL4SV7esFjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quaint coffee shop in the center of Madrid. Delicious tarts and great service. Plus, they offer brunch on the weekends 100% recommend. Thanks guys!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQuBFOatDYGMEMQKQWbpbd&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Dylan Marshall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW24WlFHMScxFE3ncG_0XSePFzNZCXJ4L18xNsDomILjK_m9Dk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"- chia pudding  is very good and has homemade almond butter
- Apple pie is great, filling is really good, and not too sweet
- The pie had a little bit too much cinnamon though","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9a1tWuqKq0nSIkRejaQuT&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Fedi Khayati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8Eb50jGPrcJ9Nbdhe5i5oxns1lTFKBPelN31pIY08FEyru2RL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Their American pies are incredible, and it's great that they're pet friendly!.
The atmosphere is cozy, and the staff is friendly. The space is large and perfect for working or relaxing.

Some tables are blackboards where you can draw with chalk, adding a fun touch. They also have booth-style seating and a big central table ideal for laptops.

The lime pie was the best I've ever had, and the chocolate pie was excellent too. The coffee is also good. Two pie slices and two coffees cost us just 15€.

I 100% recommend this place to any pie lovers. I'm definitely coming back to try new pie flavors and to practice my drawing skills!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDT0ca4KQ&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2024-5-25"},{"Name":"Igor Xavier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCm9QZJtvDlu_gJ0_1aVcl9vV6mBd9L5JMw17yi5af1MRkFIHtIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this have to be one of my favorite spots in madrid so far. spent the whole afternoon there working, and i couldn’t recommend 9 lives enough!

the place is quite big, with some large tables (with power outlets if you need to connect your laptop), booths and smaller tables for little groups/couples.

the staff was VEEERY friendly, and the service was perfect, literally nothing to complain about. i had the chance to try two pies — a lemon one with chocolate ganache and a coffee one. both were spectacular. can’t wait to come back and taste more flavors.

job well done, guys. i will def recommend the place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgn_mORg&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-2-28"},{"Name":"Daniel Rast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIerDiqDQs7HOmH0nJ80zHD0GY6mF4WkgofTr5JbTL4A7lQFG0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The space is cool, we’re coming here from time to time to have this different (comparing to all Madrid places) vibe and experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5ze8AW_8V1BlGwo65yLaS&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"DM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLn4AiTZ5y6yBsiJl2H5P6Jhb20OmSMH4j-sH0jWA2Jq8vs4_4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There’s something for everyone here. Love how open and spacious it is. That’s appreciated! Keep it up, team!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7i6DDRrxcnL_zbVHAcMHs&fid=0x0:0xb920c5a6108aa8d6"],"When":"2025-6-28"}]

Our waitress was so friendly and helpful since she knew we didn't speak a lot of Spanish. Food was excellent and the cappuccino was the bomb. Awesome place. Highly recommended if you're around the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICsw4a-Ww\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2020-2-12"},{"Name":"Dhoha Rashed Alshalawi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqbCCHkjwDY0mO9c-CJ71GOepIxIiJbdf-qibk0HHux69zRH8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the most beautiful places that I like to visit for breakfast, as they have a special menu every time, pastries and sweets change according to the season.  Try the croissants stuffed with cheese, tomatoes and turkey meat. I noticed as well that the croissants covered with butter and honey.  It is very delicious.  After breakfast, they offer you a tray of sweets, and you choose among them. If you don't like any of them, they return with another tray with a different assortment of delicious sweets.  I love this branch, quiet and elegant, away from the crowded center, and the waitresses serve from the heart and their manners are beautiful. Thank you for your kindness 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB7Y_bsAE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2023-1-1"},{"Name":"All Things Spain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNWBdUd-QKOqlHRq6tOv_P5FR-tafflR__jzjzTVgD5WN9JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I found a rare treat at this place: Kouign-amann, a French-Breton butter cake, which is fiendishly difficult to make and which might be the worlds best pastry. For this reason alone I would come back to this place. Service was good, toilets were spotlessly clean and prices were fair for the quality that you get. I paid 7.75 € for the pastry, a small milk coffee and a large freshly squeezed orange juice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDaovig3wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2021-8-17"},{"Name":"Nicky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDZ1lDxVrZRAqjY_ER8b8nOKL8F0IrjRKaec87SW_YPREwJ2I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First visit but coming back for sure! Beautiful selection of pastries and excellent coffee. Truly loved the service and ambiance. Thanks to Yvanamely!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjyMPvogE\u0026fid=0x0:0x1297983a0e049681"],"When":"2024-4-17"},{"Name":"Young Joe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUckGyj1ucBAvjUpUCyYvK0Q5cvhsgDAq-EeIl_wzsZVWt0V5L=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We visited there this morning for pastries. [{"Name":"Mary Shelow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3NTzzo9rWw7u6ziWYqsDgwlzPexQtBmUDkEOsCsanFC58MShIPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing and healthy food options to eat here or take on the go! Fresh pressed juices and ginger shots, yummy protein shakes and coffee to order. My new favorite spot to stop for a coffee or a quick snack. The best part, it is attached to a Lagree studio. Perfect to grab a protein shake after working out. Love AMA!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlLYSmyrxdNvm2G0xnUPkb&fid=0x0:0x3de2577a84804a6d"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Maira Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7hYtLnX-r9uXKzyVOkOlqyyRTIjsWOjF7kHA9kHDw_RV7uJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely the BEST Lagree studio in Madrid!  I’ve tried several places, and nothing compares to the energy, professionalism, and attention to aesthetic Pinterest clean girl era detail here. The instructors are not only incredibly knowledgeable but also super motivating—they push you to your limits in the best way possible. Every class is a full-body workout that leaves you shaking, sweating, and stronger every time.

The studio is spotless, the machines are top-notch, and the vibe is always positive and empowering. Whether you’re a beginner or a Lagree veteran, they make you feel welcome and supported. After just a few sessions, I already noticed a difference in my core strength, posture, and endurance.

If you’re serious about fitness and want fast results in a fun and challenging environment, this is the place to be in Madrid. Highly recommend.

The best about it is the cafe with high quality matcha and the best bowls in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoQ2Rj3V_1D3v83K-1rmjv&fid=0x0:0x3de2577a84804a6d"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Josi Tucker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7L79lbua68RLxI4hY77ZnLyno_krEy8jvtki_5p-9zUZp1kP0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I took a class here and got coffee after. [{"Name":"Menasseh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE6vt07huq865Wo0eXEem8QK-UUIlIx8SePpsi1SkKrt-3T3o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a good experience at OSOM on Calle del Castillo in Madrid! The atmosphere is vibrant and modern, with a cozy yet trendy vibe. The menu is thoughtfully curated.

I particularly enjoyed their innovative twists on classic dishes, paired with their tasty coffee. The staff were friendly, attentive, and clearly passionate about providing top-notch service. It's a great spot for a casual meal. I’ll definitely be coming back to enjoy more of their fantastic offerings! Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP2-igAQ&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-12-5"},{"Name":"Bartek Sposób","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0pW-eazk0_t2mCQlubU46uIVV7JGR0QvkTiQTbU12MPkDAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately, the matcha was a big disappointment. It tasted just like plain milk with barely any matcha flavor at all. It was clearly poorly prepared, which you can also see in the photo – the texture and color were completely off. Really surprising coming from a specialty place where you’d expect much higher standards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwKNI4xVYL9YbU0XqMnHlz&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2025-8-1"},{"Name":"이채림","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzcy2zyPnvMeVw4Le68ddrbGX0Xtc9J7qC3N7fOknpoAqsqcYD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It used to be 15€ minimum order to work with the computer. Today you have to pay 20€, and you can use only 15€ for your order. It is not enough that you have to pay extra 5€, they even designed the menu so you will not be able to reach 15€ excatly - either 14.8€ or 16€.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caio Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN1DmrCrAiD-jEQeKZQLErmw4RUZ7V4XZ73Yx7OYb1T4i5gz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great vibe and awesome coworking space. However, very poor service for the standards of comparable coffee shops in Madrid. There were 4 employees, one of them did 90% of the work and the others totally lost. There were 2 people in front on us in the line and took us 17 min to get a capuccino. Should this issue of staffing and operations be solved, this has the potential to be the best coffee shop in Chamberi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzm_HWqAE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"Hortensia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGn_ewtnpi8hlaVMaLW0-u1SUj7ymYZeRT8G0UGF50hvHdR7qm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An ideal space - cowork and leisure
The ambience and design is very soothing and at the same time inspiring.
Food is a-m-a-z-i-n-g - so happy that apart from being delicious, it is very healthy and natural (so many options for any kind of dietary restriction like gluten or lactose intolerance)
Must try, the spirulina bowl and the avocado-egg-hummus toast!
They offer grade A, quality and specialty coffee. I tried various kinds from Colombia, Africa and Asia. I tried an 'orea' filtered coffee with orange slices and it was something special!

Their staff and service is really incredible - (Tito, Nash, Bauti and Juan put all their love into every thing they do!)
Must try this place out! Love what they are doing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZwL_59wE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2023-9-1"},{"Name":"Mary Shelow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3NTzzo9rWw7u6ziWYqsDgwlzPexQtBmUDkEOsCsanFC58MShIPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this is my go to coffee shop in Chamberi. All the employees are so nice and take the time to get to know you. The food is amazing, from different toasts to yogurt bowls. They also have a large variety of baked goods. They have a coworking space in the back with wifi and large tables for laptop use. Oh and I can’t forget, the coffee is amazing!! Love love love this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID53KXlnwE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2023-10-20"},{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKTrV-s_bM_FeIxVx4ToNjZIgTWqy_R0TqNBLZ5LwAu81tZLTPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Osom Coffee House—the atmosphere was cozy, the service friendly, and the food delicious. Can highly recommend the tostossom 🍳🤍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3p6iL0wE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Bryan Segers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlaosq8cqJCdptU8x3mIgzrhrxmL_6bsrBeAD7BNBGPcuF4s6h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff are extremely friendly; amazing coworking space. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ahmed Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzqMEcYgxi8Sk2FQ7sC016oKAIhG6suleRmzk5iHGL6ZJdhLoS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by MPWR in Madrid for brunch and loved it. Had a flat white and the Turkish eggs, both excellent. The eggs were super flavorful and honestly felt very protein-packed, which was a nice change from the usual brunch options. Great quality, great coffee, and a solid spot if you want something delicious but still fueling. Would definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvpiz5ML6PdUTnkRPF6Y8A&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"maria bg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFFmV_3e52w62Gmqq_RIhix1pZ5khx8O7uihMvuYAs4-W9Eg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s taken me way too long to write this because MPWR honestly deserves all the love. The place is amazing, the atmosphere, the people, and the quality of the ingredients are just next level. I’ve tried almost everything on the menu, and it’s always spot on.

You can build your own bowl depending on your mood, so there’s always something that hits just right. It’s perfect after a workout, in the morning, or as an afternoon pick-me-up. Honestly, there’s never a wrong time for MPWR.

And the name says it all. You leave feeling uplifted, happy, and empowered. Always fresh, always delicious, always MPWR. Five stars aren’t enough!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEykn_lnLF_jw-g-nd4d6L&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Giacomo Garibaldi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRY5oeflIPHmikl4K594e8icDSxWICAPZjneCVGeJlBPO0-Ojm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best healthy snack bar in Madrid! They have the best yogurt bowls, the best toppings, amazing coffee and overall the best vibe possible. The minimalistic and modern decoration of the place just makes it better, and the always willing to help attitude of the staff makes you feel great. Special mention to their playlist. Will definitely return for more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJ2Ckvfanp7f640_wHlPT9&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Abdelaziz Lakhdari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCllTPErKmRK6YBCuwvOotE8HpKQUu296Bld6UEAFwydN9sw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved my experience at MPWR Café! The vibe and atmosphere are spot on minimalistic, clean, and full of positive energy. The service was genuinely warm and attentive, which made the whole visit even more enjoyable. every single product feels carefully selected. The Ethiopian coffee was rich and full of character, easily one of the best I’ve had in Madrid. The Greek yogurt bowls? Just wow creamy, fresh, and topped with high quality ingredients that perfectly complement each other. You can really taste the attention to detail in everything they serve.

If you’re into healthy, delicious food and great coffee in an inspiring space, MPWR is a must. Can’t wait to be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlCOiO4837Xhl4YRboUudo&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXK44rJ4dMqrcbA0Pw4P9757OS6H52FihiePE4VgtmygfpqfU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Besttt smoothies in madrid! Also obsessed w the yogurt bowls, so filing and delicious","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWIQ327uxuneYpxTz4Xh6h&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Julia Cortés","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBKXWYAxc4kpccfacQO3j6-9_NWBQ_uzTwqyxpBU6MbAfjBT1G=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best coffee i have tried in Madrid. Its a must to visit if you are in the city. It has that authentic vibe of not only a specialty coffee but a whole experience and also the quality of the products. It was very difficult to find a place that combines both : the arquitectura space and the product quality. Added to this: the service is spectacular. How you are received from the beginning to end and how much caring on each gesture. It’s a truly luxurious breakfast quality experience .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tuli Laví","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdGF21WFg_Wl9zxhq_bDp2TQHR2K206qxSqoMKlvegIM4Xfb8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolute 6 star experience! Super honest/healthy yogurt bowls with amazingly tasty toppings and combos. The service is so kind and the atmosphere of the place is very special and cool. Fell in love with this place, I go everyday now! I hope to see MPWR grow internationally because there’s nothing like it. Thank you Seeham!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Menasseh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE6vt07huq865Wo0eXEem8QK-UUIlIx8SePpsi1SkKrt-3T3o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited MPWR Madrid. From the moment you step in, you're greeted with a vibrant atmosphere and a team that genuinely cares about your well-being. The staff is professional, knowledgeable, and attentive, ensuring that every need is met with a smile.

The facilities are modern, clean, and well-equipped, making it easy to feel comfortable. Whether you're looking to boost your fitness journey, recharge mentally, or simply enjoy a moment of relaxation.

I highly recommend MPWR Madrid to anyone looking for a top-tier wellness and fitness experience in the city. I'll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP3p_ZGg&fid=0x0:0xe80f68e1b7397f84"],"When":"2024-12-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"William Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKhOuOn_iucrQVf8lq38vHwQAOeGH79fjyXKWWTB3uwr9cxSmKEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yet another fantastic burger place in Madrid, this one near Quevedo.

On an extremely hot summer day in Madrid in August, while other places were closed for vacation or simply not a good option because of the high heat, Burnout Burger called my name. This burger place has a dining room below ground that stays cool on excessively hot days, and I was pleased to take advantage of that space.

The service was attentive and friendly from the beginning. And it was speedy too. The basement dining area is charming, although small.

Of course, the main attraction are the burgers. I ordered an IT burger, and “it” was fantastic. A double-smash-burger-patty burger, the flavors were bursting from this burger due to the combination of high-quality beef, house-made caramelized onion jam, and plenty of American cheese. And the bun! The bun was exquisite. The fries are a thinner style than some other places, which I prefer. Great burger experience.

It’s not quite good enough to displace what I believe to be the very best burger place in Madrid, but man, it comes close. Burnout Burger for the win!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCt7l5m9toe1vIcZL0i7yXe&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Gustavo Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWB4TUmwxiKUD1owiGBAY5xaQUS8pOpQnjnM6B0qH7hRMLVO17U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a wing lover and they have great wings!
It is challenging to find spicy food in Madrid, their buffalo sauce was really good. Mild compare to US standards, but it did the job.
The burgers looked amazing, I will be back to try more of their dishes. Their terrace is nice, must have dinner in order to sit and they have a lot of reservations, best to make yours ahead of showing up.
Wings were on the smaller side, but the full order of ten plus some french fries with their burn out sauce was a lot of food for one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZkeaMoQE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2023-9-12"},{"Name":"Manuel O.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK82KFgem6c10f3_FHdqWiTlPj0d_RwBZ8QFRrCuwUg6r4hJzS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Small burger restaurant near the Gran Vía in Madrid. Good location and service. Decent size of the patty, but the brioche bun is too small and it makes difficult eating the burger comfortably. Also, the put butter in the brioche (not mentioned in the menu), and I personally don’t like butter!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aykan Canbaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjRkw6SJP9G6pstZg0YBcj3TDdLCRfzAICE45RDvdZoJsCCoXi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried IT burger (served with little salad). Cloudy bun together with Galician beef meat. One of the best burgers in my life.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELOkz8TcqpHvywE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Stevan Jacovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiz2BljBMUAiscKNbehS0yTsGu26JQb4kVPULJY_te2_MXGWYOAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nicely cooked burgers, attentive staff. Got the temperature down correctly. Went for the doble of the bacon (woven)  cheeseburger. Nice beers to choose from and well priced..

Fries could be crispier. Kind of weird to walk in and see a bin of precooked bacon getting topped/plated. Feels like some flavor gets lost also it's not hot when I comes out of course.

Nice butter ratio on the buffalo wings (not overkill like other places) but could be spicier. Understandable for Madrid

Nice atmosphere downstairs","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKjbG0-QE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2021-4-14"},{"Name":"Gabriel Moreno Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJb7EMUFxG8C2tNU7l97VMWO3XPcjPO0990M3e2bFf3BfdeuzI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great burgers, many options and non stop beers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVFRGFaokRvRTK07-zLNMU&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"vassil stoimenov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAWEz8x_LmgwDYC5AnQSfga-uDOqPTPWzRfeue-rz0cYhBnws=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has the best burgers in all of Madrid. There are a ton of fancy burger joints in this town but this unpretentious “hole in the wall” type spot absolutely towers over them. Service didn’t disappoint either, as our waiter Rolando kicked butt!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ainho aK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnWhK_6CAohc29rmyiGs7zXxQy0ttlnSkoAAGRMHqddCkqj47MoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burger wasn’t exceptional but really tasty! What was remarkable, was the service!super friendly and helpful.
Of course, the paintings and deco makes it  bit more fun if you like comic books 🤓🤪
Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICG2LupvwE&fid=0x0:0xda49b615e6f16c31"],"When":"2021-10-19"}]

[{"Name":"Ricardo Llovet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1qhfGlFt52Xs9zD8---4ImaWNotONI88KoRxtYdJ4PF1eTu6S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I discovered this shop by chance while walking on my old Chamberi neighborhood.  They had a sign saying "pan de verdad" (true bread).  I ordered a "pan de verdad" like the ones shown in the picture.  At lunch time I could confirm that it trully was true bread.  The best I have eaten in some time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAnNvHzgE&fid=0x0:0xe432df0371ee2fe0"],"When":"2025-2-7"},{"Name":"Fermin Andujar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1OrPKmCDnm8fvFv9h5wr8wyH6XKbDEdVB2rLcLSgk1eRRvrGUgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Alfredo, the owner, is a super carismático and intelligent guy. This place is a gem with affordable prices for what the quality these guys are dishing out. I got the carrot cake and sour dough bread and am in heaven. Def give it a shot if you're around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx3_CDAg&fid=0x0:0xe432df0371ee2fe0"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"Carlos Euro De Frutos Torres","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG5cmrcMeaMJ-e1ZeSa50f5kJT-lSyELXT2D7-_dvt64L8N8A1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The quality of the products is amazing.
The kind of the lady attending to the public is awful.
She is not rude. However, to be facing the public, you have to have "don de gentes" and unfortunately, she has really no clue how to take care of people. She should be more humble and nicer to the customers.
At the end, no customers have no business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTQ4vcliYMHeZeUkFTJ8rRRArDLAGnQ1uiV632ldtgcjcSj0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bread heaven! This bakery proves that all breads are not created equal! We tried all of the bakeries in our neighborhood and Vanille is our favorite by far. Even beats the fancy bakeries in Almagro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC6s-mvEw&fid=0x0:0xe432df0371ee2fe0"],"When":"2021-9-12"},{"Name":"EC Processors","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZY80Kxb5ts2RkbSb3jXZ-APUrL5jP5tV_j2ZMX2n0sX5i6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Same review as their other store ! Althought this one was a take out spot.

Here is where we got their bread and untables !

They got some BOMB pastries !!

We tried the croissant with baileys (18+) contains alcohol, they pack a punch !!

The brownies and the cookies were amazing as well !

Great place to take out, can't really go wrong with this spot !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leo B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZKkJQJSC_nkugO9nWntObbkF_EGpjoro2wuluEGzoylHCuqLnmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's by far the best bakery in the neighborhood and maybe in Madrid! It's a bit far from our place but we keep coming because the quality is just so good. As a French I can tell you it's top quality 👌 so happy to find such place in Madrid. We love the pan con semillas, the brioche and the pastries, croissant, pain au chocolat, kouign amann... Go give a try !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adam Dubin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRvvxtE8kqOgAmuNGvtYSuqENA-UQXDdV3VV31zSPvt1XNjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There´s no better place to buy bread in Madrid. They should turn it into a coffee shop.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"B C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZFx4RpGwe5zKPlsJnHuuNsFvbxMC-2LcFIhRG-4MpwWu7cZ0-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"High quality bakery and pastries! [{"Name":"Dilruba Erkan Ozdemir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc0eq3wtBEbYqxwyzyr-YsGNLrI_tfTFQisX-LIQRc6Gow4ljq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time I saw a place selling monkey bread and my husband really liked his pistachio pain au chocolat. However, the most important thing is that the filter coffee was super delicious, not the smell or taste of burnt. We will definitely go back to try the other goods.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgpQMzhNzzD5L-NZacaMxD&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Nati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXenLgIdMJD6V8rf3H99PdOVRZKi7ChH-17vj_R9uQstGKIpxc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just moved to Madrid and went to go buy bread for the first time in the city and the lady working there kindly explained every bread option they had after I was a little overwhelmed. She recommended the campaña bread, which I bought and I’m really happy with. I saw their pastries and was so impressed, that I came back 5 hours later to try the pain au pistachio which was truly amazing. It didn’t have like a runny creme, but more like a pistachio butter. The quality is top tier and I think the prices are totally reasonable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8fq9QS_Cz7o9ez4vDYzL0&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Chris Zhu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0lJsIExk_cqe015X5oYkXbbi8ru6wWAGifzzEP8p9q2tJFEhr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The bread there are fantastic and super tasty. I just don’t understand why you need to buy two portions to get the middle part of the monkey bread. Although personally I do like the edge, because it’s more crunchy.
Recommendation will be their big bread, monkey bread and Kouign Amann (very tasty even on the next day).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwh6zpBA&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Sonia T.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbQdlkXS_R_Yi5JrUXHnru1YKJ5ozMOJlyswx4zcApaxz0NX-bGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dog friendly bakery with many bread and baked good options, and a few savoury ones too. It doubles as a tiny shop for some other essentials like milks.
The staff is so nice and the service is always on point.
I'm French and I thoroughly enjoyed all the breakfasts I bought during my stay in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLw87DkQE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-6-30"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This takeaway bakery and café specializes in handmade baked goods and quality coffee beans. The interior is bright and welcoming, though there’s no seating available. The staff are friendly and attentive.

We ordered two iced lattes, a whole Monkey Bread, and a Danesa Dulce, spending around 23 EUR in total. The coffee was well-priced and enjoyable, and the pastries were also very affordable.

If you're in the area, it's worth stopping by for a coffee and to pick up some of their delicious pastries and breads.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7g4zvCg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-8-27"},{"Name":"Anna Quinlan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp_VD4zINntiOM_wcOv3kJbpyCOwei1CdqT_uhJn-UvW7G3Nhd7g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Divine bakery - easily one of the best I’ve been to in Madrid. Try their pistachio pain au chocolat or monkey bread!

They have a little counter outside you can stand and eat at, but I would recommend doing take out and sitting in a nearby park","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnqMCvpAE&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-9-22"},{"Name":"Olivier Abella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkVxYvEn6DQVrsCX_jGHYdPiSrqbPhwzjz3DNmWW6TUe_cKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Although they churn out exceptional bread and puff pastry, the business feels a bit soulless lately","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5eG6WalZNEJdWJek7rOcW&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Nina Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9hmUHjjBS1nrNNkzP024qy_M5YiDBJIbKFV4VaqoNOes6O0Fo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely bakery which offers coffee as well.
Everything looks wonderful 🤤🤤🤤
I bought 1/2 sesame bread (the sesame smell and taste from the bread is awesome), monkey bread (first time seeing a bakery selling monkey bread ❤️)and a chocolate pistachio croissant (this combination and will never go wrong 🤭)- all of them are great 👍
The staff was very nice as well.
Will love to come back and try different pastry with coffee one morning ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTkI3rQg&fid=0x0:0x7271ef3fdb9188be"],"When":"2024-5-21"}]

[{"Name":"Celia Falcón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEORkTErlav_F5zdcOy1y-WJMqpxQQeo4mzfsumGk2aD9s3Sg0Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cozy coffee place with a good selection of drinks and sweet treats.
We tried the matcha and a regular coffee, and both were good. The service was friendly, a bit slow but that fits the relaxed atmosphere.
The place is comfortable, not particularly original, but pleasant to spend time in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3HCB5v2PSkccUMgODyk0Z&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Semija Fejzullau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBVL7IFu3lvg0KOAQUh_GMdzbiencwTpLaKtfshurLP2yt_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee and excellent service. The girl serving was very polite, friendly, and professional. She really made the visit pleasant. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhTnvFg4m1MDWVbFO7BjCq&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"go","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLCjzvnLcbqr3oGk3HXRY_AdIuUu0wwuHuNliii7CxDMlpjeL1zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's not easy to find a cafe like this in Madrid. I can feel in detail what kind of thoughts the owner here has about the experience of drinking coffee at the cafe. I'm serious about experiencing a good cafe, which gives me a rare high level of satisfaction in Madrid. How nice it would be if a place like this was near my house. It's like a place that only I want to know.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCowYPPDA&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"steve cox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLfsxtUzyPXJBk8vz3w1yN9xld-of15A5BJ0IFHAg6e9NZVEs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent experience here, the owners are lovely and so generous with their time. And for aussies abroad, the flat whites here are phenomenal","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEN2WCyzA2pjzK7PeUqVgO&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKTrV-s_bM_FeIxVx4ToNjZIgTWqy_R0TqNBLZ5LwAu81tZLTPow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely fell in love with this café! The decor is stunning, the staff were super friendly and attentive, and the soft serves totally stole the show. Both the matcha and berry flavors were delicious—refreshing, rich, and perfect for this hot weather. Definitely a 10/10 treat! 🍦✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2vBM7duTOTpx_gbIUAEod&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"Piotr Dębski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUo_Oq8hTdxaUe8JzwAv18voiUW-yf0xizq4zPIeI3j70XLAZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great cafe with quiet, relaxed vibe and the kindest staff.
The v60 pourover was absolutely delicious (even in a paper to-go cup)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mariah carpenter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgXR8zeVVnHXLIvnBhlsESP0uo1LDPuHjROAEZJ3i2I7_gM8-O0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really cute Roman art vibe / themed café near Chamberi Madrid. As this bar is a little more upscale, I think they look at the coffee shop really fits. I had a nice strong double espresso.  The barista was kind and inviting as well. Hopefully they will have some gluten-free products to offer soon but overall good experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTpt6JQg&fid=0x0:0x125eb5d338c3fd5"],"When":"2024-5-24"},{"Name":"ハート","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmpr0qUVI-itxv1Emqt1zpyoYi-Y7FEDNfcRp1iB1CYTrx_HqP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top notch specialty coffee.
