[{"Name":"Pablo Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdIQPd3QhoBz98fPmQdWL9FJkAcFRIZPEyMBzD80GO84wITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We stopped by here to buy a baguette on the way home. They have several whole grain options, but when we asked the attendant if they were 100% whole grain, she told us there is no such thing as 100% whole grain because flour can’t be purchased whole grain...very funny, you may be able to trick someone else about this topic, but not me...we did end up purchasing this supposedly whole grain bread, but it tasted like cheap supermarket white bread, I know 1.15 euros isn’t a lot of money, but the grocery store will sell you a baguette of similar quality for 40 cents...or better yet find a levaduramadre and pay 2  euros for real 100% whole grain bread.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fábio Filipe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmk4VTeX4lLE0ZvE5HElNkA65WxoznCIRzeYo0YtsT3EJGcTLI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible! For two times I went there and the worker does not look at me. I wait 1 metter in front of her and she is on her phone acting like she does not see me. Will never try again! Stupid people and probably racists!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marlen M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX60vhHQMiv7MIOsgxJsUPAG-xqYjETdmrSEUU9azfn-M1ZfIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Compré un roscón de Reyes relleno de crema por 27 €. El roscón estaba correcto, sin más.
Lo más decepcionante fue la figurita que venía dentro. Sinceramente, parece un Minion-pan, una piedra mal pintada, hecha sin ningún cuidado. No entiendo qué es exactamente, pero es bastante fea y desentona totalmente con un producto tradicional como el roscón.
Por el precio, esperaba un poco más de calidad y detalle, al menos en algo tan típico.

No es solo la figura en sí, es la sensación de poco mimo en algo que es tan tradicional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7v76T2C3Fd_fjMjxQ2osu&fid=0x0:0xdf4ec92e280eabe4"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Laura Chamorro Madrid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQmLIzCDH3gKjVGclUdt63Wws5YFowEWDH6ecs8kDmug2LkdGE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Compré hoy un roscón de Reyes, precio desorbitado, cuatro tamaños q no hay mucha diferencia de unos a otros, pero en el precio si que lo hay y mucha, el azúcar es de trozos, en la caja no viene los ingredientes y debería ponerlo, y bastante seco, del día no era, eso seguro, y a parte para rematar simpatía inexistente por parte de la q me atendió. Para el PAN y otro dulce estará bien, pero desde luego el roscón de Reyes no vuelvo a comprar ahí, no lo recomiendo para nada.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen GM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzXgi4iWgHRvYED1SY1Uo13G3y-GHdpX0PjNUrcm0x5rLn1EezlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La mejor tarta de nata con fresas que hemos comido nunca! Que delicia y que bonita,, ha sido el éxito de la comida. Con una suave mousse de fresas por dentro y una nata casera, el bizcocho suave y super esponjoso, de verdad como las tartas tradicionales de antes. Merece la pena el precio 100%. Maravillosaaaaa!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco G.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeEO-Bl1HAugVpblnTWQd97bwhopbDUYwb2rOUBeSJ2uJELlJ_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un local que lleva toda la vida prácticamente en el Centro Comercial La Vaguada Madrid 2. Tienen todo hecho por ellos. Nada precocinado o congelado. Pastelería, dulces, pan, salados, baguettes/bocadillos, ensaimadas originales, tartas, cafés, bebidas, etc y destacaría especialmente su croissant almendrados on crema, una delicia. Tienen una escasa barra para tomar de pié o sentado con sillas altas. No hay mesas con sillas como en otras cafeterías, y es una pena. La decoración es antigua pero lo suplen con un muy buen producto y esmerada atención al público. Muy recomendable. Si me das tu me gusta te lo agradecería y si quieres seguirme para más reseñas o saber más cosas, genial!!. Saludos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx-4e3Rw&fid=0x0:0xdf4ec92e280eabe4"],"When":"2023-6-15"},{"Name":"Aliciaizu Izu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIT2--vrP5R_ASzgXUmzBkTgvkidUhzNTDX3pJTtJqZTt_Fhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"La repostería tiene buena pinta y hace tiempo que no la compro, cuando lo he hecho estaba buena pero la desilusión ha llegado por parte del pan. Compré una barra por la mañana y en la noche ya estaba dura (como si hubiese pasado un día entero). Si no vas a consumir la barra entera en el momento, no recomiendo comprar el pan en este sitio. Las dependientas amables, aunque un poco a sus cosas","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia Allue Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj00fYhgqxzXQEUi1KwxvH2i-c-PlW3gLDHfXQmhus0BCUZw5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Llegamos con los niños hambrientos y el trato que recibimos por parte de María José fue excelente, rápido, amable y cariñoso. I will miss them when I leave the neighborhood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDe88r1sAE&fid=0x0:0x8c3041a19de8490e"],"When":"2022-10-19"},{"Name":"Sergio Martín","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqLWBKMnOcoQuoZj6KG52XQoZS_zB569Fc-qmP0BoflK5puQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es la panadería de mi confianza donde puedes encontrar un pan que se disfruta al comer y además es nutritivo y aprecia cada bocado que das, con sabor a cereal.

La lástima es que van a cerrar por eso les doy todas las gracias por haberme hecho feliz a la hora de comer el pan que tanto he buscado y había encontrado todos estos años con ellos.
Gracias de corazón por haber aportado esa felicidad de comer un buen pan.
Que os vaya muy bien en lo que realicéis en el futuro.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Idir Boundaoui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWv7S5OKSE9pJc9kJPxfM4a0YNj8MmlwoZ4ZyiR0U7Z9O2pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Grandes variedades de panes y de bollería artesanos y de muy buena calidad, a un precio muy asequible.
El pan es una maravilla, tiene una textura esponjosa, una corteza bastante blanda, y un sabor que recuerda a lácteo y a frutos secos. Me encantaron todos los panes que he probado hasta ahora.
Sin olvidarme también la atención que es un 10!
Además, nos han dicho que te pueden servir el pan a casa comprándolo a través de su página web.
¡Enhorabuena!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDivtTAIg&fid=0x0:0x8c3041a19de8490e"],"When":"2020-12-3"},{"Name":"Adolfo Ortiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwdJ_PNXW7mEXzjE69lZB9TPat-Sm1Yx4LKONWcqT57e0PXeOy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La panadería del barrio ha cerrado. Hoy he ido a por mi hogaza integral semanal, y me he encontrado el cierre echado, la web con un mensaje de despedida y Google que lo marca como cerrado temporalmente. Alguien sabe que ha pasado o si se han ido a otro sitio?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tess De Gregorio Herraiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUANBCsmqr7gB4Ce7yE6q7zF0oXaNcajV8TAVBE-2XL5rqpJU_1JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El pan está buenísimo, y la atención es siempre excelente. El sabor está bueno pero es imposible de comer porque es como arenoso. He probado varios sabores pero son todos iguales de consistencia…Igual es porque los congelan? No lo sé! Desde el momento en que entras, se percibe un ambiente acogedor y limpio, con un aroma irresistible a pan recién horneado y dulces frescos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rubén","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9Lyg5Q1Sq56J4_lFt9rmKP9YB1if4JYGKjwKZKg-SAWVsiJnz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La verdad es que no entiendo las críticas negativas que estoy viendo. Sobre el pan, hay mucha variedad y es mucho mejor del que te puedes comprar en otras panaderías \"industriales\". Los bollos y pastelillos, hay variedad y están muy ricos. El personal siempre amable y atento pero no olvidemos que son profesionales y están haciendo su trabajo. Es decir, para los que se quejan del mal trato, no te pueden ni tienen que hacerte una reverencia al entrar. Y la época de reyes, los roscones están muy buenos. Sólo como muestra, en la época de reyes, se forman colas de gente para comprar el roscón. Si esta pastelería fuera tan mala, ¿iría tanta gente? Y, lo siento, para los que quejan del precio, la calidad se paga y el coste de la vida ha subido. Siempre se pueden conformar con pan pocho  manoseado por las personas de la tercera edad, tartas que te pueden llevar al hospital, bollería industrial y roscones rancios de Alcampo que lo tienen bien cerquita.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rosa Trescinco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJktV50XDca2GWYFCSRnkRpfoJl1BH6zIutnVbxlp1Mvy12hA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El roscón de reyes relleno de nata y trufa muy bueno, de los mejores que he comido","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raquel González Martínez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW--zxBGYOVfvotiiISnPwN1z0ePmchcFuByEXdGiSV81nv3Qdz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Para mí es la mejor pastelería de Madrid. Si quieres comer rico y no te importa pagar por calidad, esta es tu pastelería.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Nieva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZheJLdJKb_nuf0hS9PQfpHf78pGR3zvf5k2BLcQqzA5y_fH4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tartas, pastas , pasteles, postres y empanadas de calidad. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Claudio us","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdoKD6w4-lQ6wpeGIvgI3zhiao_iuL5L5bXq3qcCZ-U90sSDum=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Panadería Jireh, ubicada dentro del Mercado de Maravillas, es uno de esos tesoros que te hacen amar aún más los mercados locales. Es pequeña, sí, pero enorme en sabor, variedad, dedicación y amor por el oficio. Desde que entras, el aroma a pan recién hecho te envuelve por completo y ya sabes que vas a salir de ahí con algo rico… y con el corazón feliz.

Tienen infinidades de panes: pan normal, pan de Dios, pan de leche, pan de quesadilla, pan de jamón, milhojas, enrollados, cachitos, y un larguísimo etcétera que te invita a probar uno hoy y regresar mañana a por otro. También encuentras bebidas como malta, Coca Cola, y un montón de opciones que hacen que siempre haya algo perfecto para acompañar.

Quiero destacar especialmente el pan de jamón, que por la temporada es un éxito absoluto. ¡Tanto así que tienes que encargarlo con tiempo porque se agota! Se hacen colas en este pequeño y gran lugar, lo cual para mí es el mejor indicativo de que allí se trabaja con calidad, cariño y tradición.

Algo que valoro muchísimo es que esta panadería está sostenida por emprendedores reales, personas que se levantan desde las 5 de la mañana para prepararte un pan fresco, artesanal, hecho con las manos y con el corazón. Y eso, hoy en día, vale oro. Porque no estás comprando solo pan: estás apoyando sueños, familias, historias y un oficio que requiere constancia, sacrificio y pasión.

Da gusto ver negocios así: valientes, humildes, llenos de sabor y completamente entregados a lo que hacen. Yo, sin duda, seguiré yendo, recomendando y apoyando este tipo de emprendimientos que mantienen vivas nuestras tradiciones y nuestra cultura gastronómica.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmd8FZGLd04ebvgBHlpaf1&fid=0x0:0x395cdf359a8ffc82"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Daniela Aldana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL98glickYCwQi4TRNjXjva2G0t-EhgBBrSYCujSAbxilo6OQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una belleza de Panes!!!!! Los mejores en mi opinión.
Les cuento mi experiencia: siempre he comprado sus panes y postres, en Navidad no podía faltar el pan de Jamón en nuestra mesa. Para el 24 No alcancé a tomarle foto pero fue una maravilla y para este fin de año he encargado uno más. Aquí les muestro las fotos como me han sido entregados, la chica solo me dio caja para uno pues le indiqué que lo quería para un regalo, ella sin dudarlo me la obsequió, la verdad yo solo busco en ellos buena atención que por cierto siempre la consigo, disposición, y buen producto, tal cual lo entregan. Siempre en la cola escucho comentarios que son supuestamente constructivos pero en el tono de que lo indican deja mucho que deseas (personas peleando y gritando, por Dios, donde queda la educación???) solo sé que el grupo siempre está dispuesto a ofrecer para sus clientes una excelente experiencia, me cuenta la chica, que es súper atenta, que el panadero llega desde muy temprano en la madrugada para siempre tener pan fresco y no industrializado como en muchos lugares, eso debe valer mucho más que una simple caja, por la que muchos también hablaban en la cola, de verdad, un poco más de tacto, de solidaridad, que esta gente lo está haciendo bien para que podamos disfrutar de un poquito de nuestra tierra a miles de kilómetros de distancia. Ante todo somos Humanos!
Yo seguiré apostando por ustedes porque hasta ahora he visto mejor mejor y mejor en sus servicios, gracias de verdad a todo el equipo y que este 2026 sea un año de éxitos y Bendiciones para todos ustedes; sin duda estas fechas tomé la mejor decisión al encargar el MEJOR PAN DE JAMÓN CON USTEDES!!!! Las fotos hablan por sí solas.
Dios los Bendiga.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBPJawzb2gWO8cDvSIGnjwp&fid=0x0:0x395cdf359a8ffc82"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Amilcar Ruiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-EUzQIPb3kS_ihyP5xyJBGw2vjDrD3aZk1H-PmA32ydfrrXgn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El pan y la masa con ese sabor andino que encanta, la chica muy atenta. Pero la verdad pichirriaron con el relleno pero plan mal. Cuando uno compraba en una panadería andina le daba un  mordisco y se salía el relleno. Yo tenía la ilusión pero puff... Da tristeza ese relleno y eso que las fotos ya están por la mitad el pan, imagínense 3/4 no había nada...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArarvt9UTmZkHnawVhkb_0&fid=0x0:0x395cdf359a8ffc82"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"G. Bilan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_-X5WDb01SGDtlAR21mum2WbMoDJLiIVO9VzTavI8GHC3mw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"La Panadería Jireh, ubicada dentro del Mercado de Maravillas es un verdadero descubrimiento. Su pan relleno de guayaba y queso es simplemente espectacular, una auténtica delicia difícil de igualar. El cachito de jamón tiene todo el sabor y la esencia de Venezuela, ¡un espectáculo en cada bocado! El pan de coco es esponjoso, fresco y con un sabor increíble, y su milhojas, coronado con nata y dulce de leche, es sencillamente irresistible.
Quizás el único punto débil fue el golfeado: el queso blanco que utilizan no acompaña bien, ya que tiene un sabor poco natural.
Aun así, esta panadería tiene un potencial enorme y, en mi opinión, hacen el mejor pan relleno de Madrid. Además, el encargado y panadero venezolano es una persona extremadamente amable, lo que sin duda marca la diferencia en la experiencia. ¡Volveré sin dudarlo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDond6zuQE&fid=0x0:0x395cdf359a8ffc82"],"When":"2025-4-27"},{"Name":"A F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZ8NQ9Yq6mq4Vw3McOFfkpr1_gK4QZSB4gFoAGz5VA5IZtOnJK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"No suelo pasar por ese pasillo y fue por casualidad, vaya descubrimiento. Local muy limpio y acogedor. Sus pasteles están riquísimos y sus tartas se ven impresionantes. El local consta de una buena iluminación  y su temperatura es muy agradable. El lugar está bastante limpio y la atención del personal es muy buena.  Muy recomendable para hacer un alto en la tarde y hacer una buena merienda","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDfiYW4eQ\u0026fid=0x0:0xf1b87aa30fc5a3f4"],"When":"2025-1-7"},{"Name":"Marta LC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVAHvQeRPYe6NG3KXnWogPLYVKw5AZX2fyP7p7gWIJ4ElgDOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Es una cafetería, pastelería y panadería increíble. Primero hay que destacar el fabuloso trato de todas las personas que trabajan alli, que te tratan como si fueras de la familia. Siempre están pendientes de que todo esté bien y de que te guste. Son increíblemente maravillosas. Como si hubieras entrado en el cielo, después de un mal día, y te atendieran ángeles. Mi marido y yo hemos probado, sobre todo la pastelería, y tiene un sabor que te quita las penas. Os recomiendo, de entre todos los manjares, los milhojas de crema y nata, y el de frambuesa. La tarta es yema está para no parar de comerla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClib201gE\u0026fid=0x0:0xf1b87aa30fc5a3f4"],"When":"2023-11-21"},{"Name":"EF_81__","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE23XLQ9jbtBoYGViVucWMQ9NsYWE-ylyyg2wYUoym63iEmSw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Buena experiencia en la sucursal de Urquijo. Los productos tienen calidad, especialmente los full es y sándwiches de miga que estaban muy frescos. El café acompaña bien y el ambiente es tranquilo. Atención buena. Recomendable para merendar.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Dennis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuYSfJ6IOiw-PsAC8GJmv0XvYJoooHajO0NkvM7Ts0YVdgSekH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's a nice cafe. We stopped by to check their pastry. And it was very delicious. We really liked everything that we ordered. The donuts were especially yummy.

There's no table service - you have to order at the counter. But you can sit down at the table. Otherwise, nice place to eat your sugary breakfast.

PS. It cost around 12 Euros for what you can see on the picture.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ88arwwE&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2023-7-22"},{"Name":"Dylan Dellett-Wion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIzNzJ9i4bg6TVfRZr60cIEqWJEtFirdAGnpj87DxOgHGzV-U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My AirBnB was super close by to Panica, so I went there nearly every day of my weeklong trip to Madrid. The service was consistently great as they were patient with my very poor Spanish speaking. The food & drinks were consistently tasty, especially at the low prices they offer. I spent hours there snacking, drinking coffee, and reading my book. I am back home in the States now and hanging out at this cafe is perhaps the thing I miss most from my stay in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjicbIEw&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2024-5-4"},{"Name":"Mouna Essakouti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2uVg3mF8Fm1WsT7UQb527Vtt2GcEgq0TL_GYu-Fr7T5S0CA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The place smells! Wouldn’t recommend to anyone","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBs8VAtSvKwc5sV8_IqSYl7&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Matchamochi C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQzT_3pTh4idOLTsv_9mjX5oc6hmfOe7zMXn6RIbmkm7o2vA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great variety of pastries and sandwiches, near bus and metro stop","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDN17yGLg&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2024-1-27"},{"Name":"michele zusi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJEipikm2L-JgssZZ1CC2XPR6pnOPYHMujpuUjpTqykn0ftu6U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food and good price. El lugar se ve limpio y ordenado.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQM0et8JwdTbFOiQH7_JOV&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Niemi Pizarro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8Hd10UxUeqvuepPpEg9cfrCcX3qHXGPaExML9li3QDbA6pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mala experiencia
Fui con mi esposo a esta Cafetería y ordenamos 2 Matcha Latte con bizcocho. Aparte de lo caro que me pareció comparados a otros lugares el servicio malísimo. La persona que me atendió poco simpática y estaba poniendo todo para llevar sin preguntar antes. Le pedí leche de soja no sé si me lo preparo con ello porque me sentí mal luego de tomarlo. La experiencia no la recomiendo hay otros lugares mejores en Moncloa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAIzg5HU8us1Vnzz5s8XQ_&fid=0x0:0xf421fcc93739954e"],"When":"2025-11-8"}]

Nice that they open at 7 so you can go before sights open. Their brunch menu includes breakfast entrees that come with a coffee, orange juice, and yogurt bowl with granola and fruit. All delicious. They also have great pastries and coffee.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Triniti B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAJg5ERJEyUjhiai99FsJht1fB2gtAeXVnMwBGJPw2DIk9SDhn5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect locations for some coffee and lunch. They were even kind enough to help me practice my Spanish with them. Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAepkB5CPWHUKaPP-6uA2yu&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Fabio Bortolussi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxix36qZL0LDoBZRIecf3AQHZDjobkylL91YsJPDIzIeK_sk9K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the few places open since early morning, and a really cozy one","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwEEl_iZE4-oI8TQiEoxer&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Adrien C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIziyW9t210UZF_3EAFphS5gY7GhKzP2F0Zaaw3D6FVY81mSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Average breakfast, the service was absolutely terrible.
Asked for two brunches, both orders
I order a flautín (thin baguette with smashed tomatoes and jamón), it came without tomato. I asked them to bring me some as it was missing, the waitress insisted there is no tomato in the sandwich I ordered. I had to get her to read the menu to prove her wrong! Yet, she didn't apologize and left in a very arrogant way. My girlfriend ordered one with basil, for it to come without any. When asking for some the waitress replied they didn't have any. We told her they should have told us when we ordered, for her only to blame her colleague who took the order. Still no excuse. Absolutely unacceptable and unprofessional.
I will not be back and will definitely NOT recommend this place to anyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2vfyXfg&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2022-5-22"},{"Name":"George Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlf1PDgtAuS2chaX05BwT--tsWgRJATDPG7umvzqIZUyxacUwf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice downtown spot for a quick afternoon cafe and some pastries
Well located good ambience and they have wifi so you can work
Good service and quiet","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC5_fWqtwE&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2023-10-16"},{"Name":"Christopher Rusted","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeRsym9NmyaS0PBV665iTt1NEs6hkN_3_ANoMSEfvRDug89Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very cozy, small cafe with an efficient layout that encouraged staff to be welcoming towards customers.
After leaving, I realised I had left  a small bag hanging on a chair. The bag contained three valuable camera lenses. My wife walked back and the staff had found the bag and put it in a drawer behind their service counter.
Their honesty and professionalism shows why they have such a well run business.
Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"athina gunnarsson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVjQZIkIWwyLXkIgRIVweeiiOT2kkN10kxDyL-K8cLi-031PIo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious!!!
Great brunch with coffee, homemade orange juice, an avocado and salmon toast, and a yogurt with fruits, all for 8 euros!
I truly recommend this cute place 😍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmrL-m3AE&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2022-1-21"},{"Name":"Alex AZ (Alex)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAVnx7eK6bWqZtIAu8evCDGFwTyJKYspKtj6Qsb-I-1EF-2dN4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very delicious coffee and pan. Gracias.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwhPW3pQE&fid=0x0:0xfb571266dcefed10"],"When":"2025-3-23"}]

Sin lugar a dudas! 🥐🥐

Llevamos ya viniendo años y sin duda es nuestra panadería/cafetería del barrio! Es un negocio familiar con un trato inmejorable!

Además todos los panes riquísimos, las dulces también, y obviamente lo que más nos gusta son los croissants!

Ambiente 10/10🌟
Comida 10/10🌟
Personal 10/10🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcpdGuaiFESplJBAesRk9l&fid=0x0:0x98eb1de5d9ff22b"],"When":"2025-6-18"},{"Name":"Pablo Nava González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxNqlCMeuZYRDDytiSzNP5MIr4rr4oDJsok3aiIAt_3kogznwV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mi cafetería favorita del barrio para desayunar.

Llevo viniendo 3 años y no puedo otra cosa que recomendar esta panadería/cafetería tradicional que lleva toda la vida en el barrio del Pilar.

Un local tranquilo, limpio y de calidad. Yo siempre suelo pedir un café con leche, una barrita con tomate y el croissant de jamón y queso, todo ello buenísimo 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgjfT8Lw&fid=0x0:0x98eb1de5d9ff22b"],"When":"2025-2-26"},{"Name":"Silvia Medina Blanco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI3bAzXsQy3_M2rnxLPWHrS3SKkLzTTL2m8lILiyE-yRQh6vrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Desayunos y productos artesanales muy ricos. Completamente casero y llevado por paisanos asturianos de siempre.
Las fabas, el pote y el cachopo extraordinarios. Es un local pequeño pero se come fantástico. La atención y el servicio muy bueno, los dueños súper amables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMjsE1Yl6_7KOOKLVOq-xO&fid=0x0:0x2682c2d7cd47ef08"],"When":"2026-2-2"},{"Name":"Beatriz de Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-ytWb2j0yzAjQTk7aWFUB4JgtyCDhnf00JbnrWYuiOQnULY5p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fuimos a comer y no nos desagradó pero tampoco nos encantó.
Al llegar tenían una mesa reservada que modificaron a otra para que nos pudiéramos sentar a comer y con la cerveza nos dieron una tapa de jamón.
Las raciones son bastante grandes pero a excepción del chuletón que estaba muy tierno, el cachopo aunque grande solo sabía a orégano y el pulpo a la gallega estaba duro y en una sopa de aceite y pimentón.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuV2jB9u7eWyv2Rxog6HSE&fid=0x0:0x2682c2d7cd47ef08"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"El Justiciero de Google","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwHwsuDb1UJSrCsVBsJnfI8pVqwt0SewnyfnfR2Ogna5DCUW4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Buen lugar, las tapas son generosas cuando pides cerveza. El cachopo abundante y calidad precio está bien. Las croquetas sin embargo son congeladas y no son caseras. Bien ubicado, la terraza que tiene mola mucho y hay buen ambiente. Recomendable llamar a reservar. Además tienen cerveza sin gluten.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICmu9G6fQ&fid=0x0:0x2682c2d7cd47ef08"],"When":"2022-1-10"}]

[{"Name":"Alanah Gargan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLPuldFCTPB7Cw5tP9_6gny8akXoaG2EeulJP3ofyugzhvvTg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a lovely cocktail bar to go to. The cocktails were amazing - especially the strawberry daiquiri. The service was the best part - the owner was so attentive and continued to give us different snacks all throughout the night. We also got a caramel shot when we left. The atmosphere was great - it was very relaxed and the music was really good. Would definitely go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6yMD5OQ&fid=0x0:0x77364de783ce7d40"],"When":"2021-9-19"},{"Name":"Gimii","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxqiuDJBlhd1CI7VKvBT2eP0KQbGe9hOU5u63uTMrcn7rWhxtEqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing cocktails and great vibes! The owner Carlos is a super fun guy who treats you very well. It’s located conveniently and got busy super fast.
He let me try all his chili salsas and hahahah we had a blast. It was such a fun night. He gave us some very delicious chupitos!
The service was fantastic and couldn’t have asked for a better evening. They have a great range of cocktails and we tried a few, all very delicious!!My favorite was the Pina Colada. So good!!
Can’t wait to visit you when we are in Madrid again. Gracias Carlos!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6_eSVSQ&fid=0x0:0x77364de783ce7d40"],"When":"2021-10-8"},{"Name":"A A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQ-s4JCIQspNpdUrPTlkvb9wvBDCSQ2zUKrFkmHaNHl_ep40U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The wine was undrinkable. It’s better to make a reservation because you may have to line up if you don’t have one (although the queue moves quite fast). 😊

Food we ordered:
- Ensaladilla Rusa (best seller)
- Shrimp tempura
- Torreznos
- Cremosos de chocolate y mango 💯","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2CgrMJ3YcIm_qE9i7DjOe&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Laura Amores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXP6uO7RzAPh2b7F9Bfhf_0B3rmBtBDBaWHAatQJYS3IVUJvI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing experience at Bar Trafalgar! The service was outstanding, the staff were attentive and friendly the whole time. The atmosphere is perfect, whether you just want a drink or a full dinner. We came without a reservation and had to wait, but they were completely honest about the waiting time and made sure we were well looked after. Totally worth it, we’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCi3edlOX3LBYGd3EiF72Ny&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Megan Hastings (iammrh)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhpsVIZ15i2WGjrN8JNZwLjzIl602sRbd58evSt0jMIunEyJY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved it here. Had lots of different dishes on the menu to try and staff were great to fit us in with no reservation for lunch","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgh7e8Tofj5YMBJ3uuKxPv&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Edward Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgmbrV28mh_yGhtO4ol0PRXh39CpOQNztkVI9Vs8A7R5AfWRqfoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was solid and the cocktails wonderful, but management should work on the seating arrangement. We were seated at a book shelf of records and players. We were in front of wine coolers that wait staff needed access to and had only a few inches clearance for our plates and drinks.

I'm open to friends with positive experiences encouraging to bring me back. As of now I would not recommend and I have no plans to go out of my way for this spot again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbTewCTagSVn16T_TVT_cx&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Valentin Paul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoyPxEjuxgC7RiaI25vO99-b6Cr70vMmraO2rcYTb1U3DATRKWjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Well, it's definitely tasty and good. Nothing to complain here. The croquettes and the steak in particular were delicious. Also the chocolate mousse was very tasty, the cheesecake could be improved.
Service was top notch. Very friendly.
But it's just too expensive for what it is. Price value doesn't fit the expectations then.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKWBhaOwh4_oNQ&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Riccardo Dg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3Q4rAuhA-1MqOzMEuKHnJ8W8uwEBTAhQLBeLaM2Yo13Vrgzna=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Not your average tapas bar, it’s closer a chic cocktail bar with a unique atmosphere. Had the best croquet as ever in Madrid! Cocktail also are perfect. Of course quality comes with it’s price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYuoHPpQE&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-5-3"},{"Name":"Nicole Ubi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLUGfnUc3TUMIDMZ08TLTwAjpdkNsXPkw51z_LoCsy6bG43yeV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite bars in Madrid – stepping inside feels like being transported to a stylish spot in NYC.
The cocktails are top-notch, especially the Mediterranean Negroni – a must-try.
Perfect for small bites (with gluten-free options available), and the quality is excellent for the price. Great vibe, great drinks, great value!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZqJuTM9qdjwnamAY127t8&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Thomas John McMaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXUKuvlppjU1x5weu8bfexJBzxKm_bzHLEj1MxfA7wXP0lBYmN6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Mimicking a classic bar with its diner-style bar, comfy booths and lots of spaces with stools, Trafalgar is a trendy and sociable spot on the side streets around Olavide / Cardenal Cisneros. Super discreet from the outside, and although it's big, it can be easy to miss!
To start, the food menu is a range of interesting takes on some simple classics. Generally good quality, and some predictable items, but the menu is well designed in that you can have snacks or a full-blown meal if you feel like. Portions are reasonable and most items are easy to share.
This was my second visit, and the staples seem to be the anchovies on toast, the "coca" with sardines, tomato and idiazabal cheese, the bravas, the pluma and the langostines. The quality is good, everything is fresh and very tasty. We also tried the leeks, the fresh mushrooms, and the calamari sandwich - the latter two probably being the weaker dishes we tried off the menu.
They have a good wine menu and offer a decent selection at good prices. This is the sort of place that merits some bubbles and I'm glad to say they have a strong cava and champagne offering.
On the downside, the service was just ok - some confusion and general slowness with ordering and paying created a few delays, but otherwise correct and generally efficient in getting food out of the kitchen.
Overall, Trafalgar has a good vibe - comfortable but buzzing. Definitely worth a (return) visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_wbGFhAE&fid=0x0:0xf698d03270b1d553"],"When":"2025-1-24"}]

En definitiva LAS MEJORES BRAVAS DE MADRID Y LAS MEJORES GILDAS.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDu0GGH9JvxDbFS1J-avCH_\u0026fid=0x0:0xb8303434d8a44b3a"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Sergio Tsl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGK27nYME5ASW7zrZLTuLOcNeCHSGMcVfcUU-CZak-HdJz1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un ambiente magnífico, local precioso e impoluto, una terraza gigante en pleno Chamberí, y lo mejor de todo, una comida fantástica: gildas, tartar, tostas y todo acompañado de una excelente atención y una cerveza bien tirada","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbSHDiC4bxCPHKMpoh76eU\u0026fid=0x0:0xb8303434d8a44b3a"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Manrique Alvar Simón Collado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnU-NACyWcKcw2kTLgv6hwshwYNu5gojwAAdhMiB-40nMVQFYX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Con la trayectoria que avala a esta familia no me ha sorprendido en absoluto qur todo haya sido perfecto. Las patatas bravas ya decía yo que eran las mejores de Madrid mucho antes de que las premiasen recientemente. La ensaladilla distinta, de la abuela... con más de veinte referencias de quesos de aquí y allá. Servidos con menbrillo y nueces, además de una explicación para su consumo dignas de un 'mettre du fromage'. Y sobre todo y más importante que nada, un equipo humano de trabajadores que sonríen y hacen de un aperitivo espontáneo un rato inolvidable. Chamberí gana otra vez con El Acuerdo!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBf7BFENf52n7t4mTOrHoun\u0026fid=0x0:0xb8303434d8a44b3a"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Andrea Jiménez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3-v3QXKnojqvb0lWUFvzaPoNzeMjocha8az6npsp-9sQup7w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Las mejores patatas con alioli que he probado. Cremositas por dentro, alioli nada repetitivo ni pesado. 8.50€ nos costó la ración y nos llenó bien. El personal super atento y amable, tanto el dueño como los 3 camareros que nos atendieron. Mi novio y yo teníamos la tradición de ir probando patatas bravas k alioli por Madrid y finalmente hemos encontrado nuestro spot fijo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHBoZDdE4yUcQrxRyG9WjS\u0026fid=0x0:0xb8303434d8a44b3a"],"When":"2026-1-3"}]

The chairs are not comfortable and the space is very tight. But compensates with the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZa6y5t8OukTVi5o9C7omV&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Vickii Dass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQ4RGtBjtd3XlDyhNKJdE1CfPUr4EQQN9ObUH5uYXyrIanvuaK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience in a local spot. We had the oysters and a few tapas. For drinks they have a good wine list, we had the Verdejo & Txakoli. Waiters are friendly and service is fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvrKPwQQ&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2024-12-8"},{"Name":"G. Elias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBTbsAd3LN18Kl5jv0TLqx4E9xhHkhFSRwzWDu9ZqEtWrxGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I love this place. Ostras Pedrín Chamberí manages to feel both casual and local, yet sophisticated thanks to the quality of the food. It’s the kind of spot where you can drop in without fuss, but end up enjoying dishes that rival some of the best in Madrid.

The seafood is outstanding—fresh, clean, and beautifully presented. I especially recommend trying their selection of fish and the cured fish roe, which are absolute highlights. And of course, the oysters are a must; they’re among the best I’ve had in the city.

Overall, it’s a gem in Chamberí: unpretentious atmosphere paired with top-level food. Perfect for anyone who enjoys authentic flavors with a refined touch.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlf1PDgtAuS2chaX05BwT--tsWgRJATDPG7umvzqIZUyxacUwf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing spot for Tapas and even a good lunch.
I have to admit I have discovered a new awesome destination.
Raw bar has more than ten types of oysters the cans are TOP the ventresca and mussels are just Amazing.
They had fresh sea urchin and just amazing
The txacoli wine is a true winner decent wine selection.
Well located almost impossible to park your car and you are advised to make a reservation because it gets busy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIClg-3ceA&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2023-11-25"},{"Name":"Thomas John McMaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXUKuvlppjU1x5weu8bfexJBzxKm_bzHLEj1MxfA7wXP0lBYmN6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A personal favourite for some bubbles and seafood nibbles. Of course their speciality is oysters and they have an abundance of local options and French varieties to choose from (I prefer the cold water Galician or Asturian), but other seafood delights like the mojama, "cañaillas" sea snails, and the Spanish caviar go super well with the drinks offerings. This is a special place with lovely staff and a nice clientele that you will likely end up sparking a conversation with. Aim to spend a bit of time here in petit comité, chill out with a glass in your hand and easy bites...it won't disappoint. Reasonable prices for what they serve, and not too difficult to grab a spot at the bar, even when busy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL3v-OgAE&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2024-6-28"},{"Name":"Montserrat N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiP0UWw1iOS8oCWgekdXFGmsMFtGmYjrIH1OEbIQ5bQz0-WO6p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"good oysters, clean place, pleasant and not loud. recommend the escabeche oyster.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdBLtXNpdY4b8fCzE-tpYW&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Aykan Canbaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjRkw6SJP9G6pstZg0YBcj3TDdLCRfzAICE45RDvdZoJsCCoXi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They serve you with olives instantly. I ordered mix oysters (1 from each available), loved valenciana and asturiana the most. House vermouth was also great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEO2v5bb0vNb4ngE&fid=0x0:0x2ec0d4cfa95cbc44"],"When":"2025-5-10"},{"Name":"Mariana Mariani Andrade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUIVaOKoAaD4L8uul8y79xLa1R817o6SzBUXv8CZNgDTGMhSiW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best oysters we had in our lifes. They have terrace, the place inside is not specially spacious, but at the same time it makes it unique","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-rYSdQg\u0026fid=0x0:0xc68a107e14eb83de"],"When":"2022-12-6"},{"Name":"Amanda Zacarkim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNkSmSQpmZWaZZeM44VNxRHZXD95j1yBEtDfdDdE03A1yIDMUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We are just out of the restaurant after a bittersweet experience. As an alternate, we were offered twenty more minutes at the bad (which made it harder for finishing feeding the baby or finishing our dishes), and again the bill was in front of us without much consideration. Needless to say, we didn’t feel encouraged to continuing our dinner there nor feel tempted to come back next time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oriana Serra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZWSBosszSpMkxrIZsp22imqhC5-hGaBhgHyVCTyWEnUjfbpqW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A casual place, steeped in Madrid vibes, ideal for socializing over raciones, tapas and drinks. But we had a great time filled with food and drinks.

Very happy to find a safe gluten free spot, only 3 dishes non-GF and are marked by a different colour on menu.

Forgot to take photos before we started!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGeeaS_oKgQJY-ngTbiqDR&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"James Dooms","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlg6JNNAn_kPtU2LjE0GTPNXOxgtYYMBBuIAUDUHq6FuYtjPnk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Your average no fuss bar with a good selection of classic tapas. We came here based on a recommendation and luckily managed to get a table. Ended up sitting inside because outside was full on a typical summer evening. The tapas options were good and the service was ok. The waitress forgot a dish but quickly processed it when we reminded her. Seems to a be family run place. If you want o experience the local spanish bars with local food, this is a spot to come to. Prices are ok. Maybe a bit higher than what you would expect to pay, but would come back..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrvsnDYA&fid=0x0:0x6b6738e22a64512d"],"When":"2024-7-7"},{"Name":"Barbara Kozłowska-Jakóbik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-yFeVcwQwOI1wmI_PcVW164UInvCZhMA7Lmwp_DPqGfCkk0xD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious tapas in typical Spanish tapas bar. [{"Name":"Aurore FG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJQXu7fQFbRfQFLG-8vVMSTJYQAl5s6-XcOhBlt4pVAgFbtoew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for drinks and music","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb35K-2wE&fid=0x0:0x71632e579b75e99"],"When":"2024-7-31"},{"Name":"Isabela González","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2o8c0qSglL12dydx2aI9rul5KnwePH1MESqjaXYECm7Lxq1Dcvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fui recomendada por una amiga, y verdaderamente tenía razón. El ambiente es fantástico y los cócteles también. Recomiendo el betty mule, sobre todo si les gusta el jengibre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdw6nvyWuB7dICLVaL_WoH&fid=0x0:0x71632e579b75e99"],"When":"2026-2-5"},{"Name":"Carolo Favorites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1gK7aWo-03gU376pgfHHS7lSvSkWWgdef0qnaevj0oJsWtCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Macera Trafalgar: Una experiencia agridulce

Me sorprendió gratamente encontrar el mítico Macera de Justicia ahora en Trafalgar. El local conserva la identidad y la esencia del original, creando un ambiente acogedor y familiar. Un DJ ameniza la tarde con buena música, complementando perfectamente el disfrute de un Gin & Tonic.

Sin embargo, debo admitir que me sentí un poco decepcionado al descubrir que todo el proceso, incluyendo los cócteles, ahora está mecanizado. Esta automatización me hizo sentir que el bar ha perdido parte de la esencia del macerado que promete su nombre. La experiencia se asemeja más a consumir una bebida alcohólica con sabor comprada en el supermercado que a disfrutar de un cóctel artesanal.

A pesar de este cambio, el local sigue siendo muy atractivo. El ambiente es divertido y animado, lo que lo convierte en un excelente lugar para tomar una copa y comenzar la noche. Aunque ya no ofrece la experiencia artesanal que uno podría esperar, sigue siendo una opción interesante para quienes buscan un lugar con buen ambiente para disfrutar de una bebida.

En resumen, Macera Trafalgar es un sitio con luces y sombras. Si bien ha perdido parte de su encanto original en la preparación de bebidas, compensa con su atmósfera vibrante y su ubicación privilegiada.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID39cmAuAE&fid=0x0:0x71632e579b75e99"],"When":"2024-11-17"},{"Name":"Isabel Lacalle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6SX2MTU1-gSvhyElDC2wjvz8Feq7MK1Ji5CMl43nd0tasOHkN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es la versión pequeña del bar de Alonso. Hacen sus propios alcoholes, y están buenos. No sabe fuerte así que se bebe bien. Le falta un poco de ambiente, y cuando yo fui hacía bastante frío, pero supongo que es cuestión de tiempo que se llene. si estás por Olavide me parece muy buena opción para tomar una copa a un precio razonable, nueve euros.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICno-m3Sg&fid=0x0:0x71632e579b75e99"],"When":"2024-9-29"},{"Name":"Leire H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7OEcgKS4y0ly9I6yNkt8NNW3lL2HICxeMH3J-fSL0QDe1Uk4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Macera siempre genial, y este local tiene mejor ambiente que el otro actualmente, al menos en mi opinión.
Suele estar bastante lleno y hay que buscar un lugar donde dejar el abrigo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alfonso Acosta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWs8am9ujWwayEumadCd0om_hfD8Ay0DfbiSYjQksbxvOXw1jQ4tg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"La camarera majísima, y el ambiente está muy bien.

Sin embargo los cócteles son premezclados, a precio similar al de un cóctel hecho al momento.

Probé el Moscow mule, que está premezclado con ginebra (no vodka) y sabe azucaradisimo, sin rastro de sabor cítrico. Sabe mucho más parecido a los sucedáneos de cóctel que puedes comprar en un supermercado que a uno hecho al momento con lima recién exprimida.

El margen con respecto al coste de producto debe ser brutal.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"florencia bollati","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDWQXhRSpbYgiMgXXjc4hC3UPXrrWwewV8n0xNQrYsK-1E3dxN5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lugar ambientado para tomar copas con amigos y bebidas muy buenas realizadas por ellos","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTy0T735xrHG9q4PyPilTZ&fid=0x0:0x71632e579b75e99"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Adri L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIFKX4tOm41jgNqyJhMc2nKING8zWMVDoxWRAD8T9NNOrYWxo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Además de unos cocktails espectaculares, puedo asegurar como vecino del local (vivo justo en el mismo edificio), que es uno de los pocos locales de ocio nocturno de la zona que respeta a rajatabla el descanso de los vecinos/as. La mayoría de los locales de la zona son una auténtica pesadilla para los que vivimos en Trafalgar, pero su personal de seguridad y propietarios han cuidado muchísimo este aspecto.

Estoy encantado de tenerles como vecinos y espero que sea por muchos años. La gente que hace las cosas bien lo merece y vosotros/as sois un claro ejemplo de trabajo bien hecho.","Images":null,"When":""}]

They man came to us with attitude asking if everything was alright just because we asked the couple if they understood what the man said.
We didn't like this place - none should come here if they actually want to have a good time with their friends/family.

The square is great! But just pick literally anywhere else other than this bar. You will die trying to go to the bathroom.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hello Boa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKB--cxv-gB0rfSuIP3jUMhKDgIof1l1TrH_ZBtmj4tc-P3ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Btw: I never write reviews but this was just such a bad experience I had to.

Alright, to start off there was only one table left. Which is ok because it’s the center of madrid I understand. But there was a stack of chairs right next to the table and the waiter who was big young and strong DIDNT get the chairs we had to!! Then we had to wait another 25-30 minutes to even order. Then when ordering I ordered wings, while my family and I were waiting I went to the restrooom to go and wash my hands to get ready to eat the wings, I passed by the kitchen and the same woman you was giving out drinks and touching the bill and money was grabbing the pollo crispy chicken with her bare hands putting it in the fryer. Then while I was waiting the rest of my family got their pollo cripsys and I still didn’t get my wings, fast forward to 23:50 around that time the waiter went ahead and told me that they didn’t have anymore wings, no problem we’ll order something else, but then the waiter said the kitchen is closed and we could order anything else. He said over and over he understands that we orders the wings 35 Minutes ago! but “the kitchen close at 12”, we asked if there was anything we can order and he said no sorry the kitchen is closed, mind you he said all this with an attitude. End of story I left without eating any dinner until we got back to the Airbnb. Horrible service, if you’re a tourist DO NOT come here. Very disappointing, if you’re a tourist don’t come here. They probably treat the locals better, I’m not sure but I have the sneaky suspicion, but I can’t judge since I don’t really know.

TLDR: Had to grab our own chairs even though the waiter could’ve helped. Staff took a long time to take out orders. Saw staff handling food and money with bare hands. Ordered wings, waited 35 minutes while family got their food, then was told they ran out and kitchen was closed, so I left without eating. Waiter was rude. Overall terrible service tourists, avoid this place!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lennard Illig","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoKbDDXcVDUt_CzWjg1t8XM9aobpLMjsvmO1kjjijpS8BMfA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst place ever, never been treated worse in a bar before. Extraordinarily expensive and extraordinarily limited menu - they have embutidos, croquetas and tortillas, except when we went they were out of tortilla. Once you’ve found a table in the Plaza de Olavide on a busy Saturday night, it’s hard to get up. So we ordered what we could without paying enough attention to the prices, paid €80, and left hungry.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRiuWf3wE\u0026fid=0x0:0xd97ff20ffaa9c3e6"],"When":"2023-3-29"},{"Name":"Michael Röschter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXwod3wttEzHAkAaz6YXP4ZeH3L7l-azPPd1nG8cqggFqMcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food and wines. Not cheap though. Ordered wild boar Ham, dried tuna and an aged cheese. Even the olives looked as though they had seen better days.  Avoid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Guy Wuytack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJu5mOkwXXHnzAa-Bl3EsIEuml2cr0ui3DO0_Dz1THjPlUclg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a great unusual straw coloured white wine which was made on the premises.. friendly waiter.. interested in joining the wine making course ...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jairo Bermúdez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOUDi_f1tR0F2aMMAv1zfHc6yMIqjP-L_ah6MbAMK4Db8zZDE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Por los precios, tienes que mirar a tu alrededor para ver si te has equivocado y estás en el Ritz de París. 4€ un botellín, esto del mercado se regula sólo como que ya no cuela... Luego vienen vacas flacas como en la pandemia y hay que ayudarles a los dueños de hostelería porque pobrecitos....","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Omar Morean Corothie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVM9-rND6BO2FX0bqDPrht9Y-6tOVjPgmttfvu1BLyZ48RpezyS4g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Este sitio es una curiosidad. Venden solamente su vino tinto y el blanco, porque tienen viñedos propios en Cuenca y hacen el vino en el sótano de su centro de catas y escuela de sumiller, todo un descubrimiento. Pedimos una tortilla de patatas que hicieron al momento y estaba jugosa y deliciosa. Buen ambiente y atención de primera. Volveremos!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICkhczfFg\u0026fid=0x0:0xd97ff20ffaa9c3e6"],"When":"2018-10-28"},{"Name":"Paladar Santanderino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK_gG2J10YZQzPgeOV1afM8Q9fcFdtse5UQCNtg4RfMVleHRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"7€ un Calimotxo y 4€ una Coca Cola. Primera y última vez. De vergüenza. A ver si cierra.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"N R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8SLXeuQhVqLfbD-JOHumwKMhcebp1mbCubi5mpSjI7aJ6yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Un auténtico timo y la tortilla malísima.\n4.2 eur un tinto de verano, 3.2 una Coca-Cola light, como tapa aceitunas de Campo Real. Las mesas reservadas para cenar, comprensible por ser las 21h. La carta solo incluye unas raciones de embutidos bastante caras, dos ensaladas y las tortillas. Nos indican que son la especialidad, hechas al momento; optamos por la clásica, con un precio de 15 euros, buen tamaño y acompañada de un pan muy rico. Estaba malísima porque estaba muy salada y la textura era bastante \"mazacote\". Sospechamos al ver que era la única mesa libre en toda la plaza Olavide y pronto descubrimos la razón. Como nota positiva destacar la amabilidad del camarero que nos atendió.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID8zayseg\u0026fid=0x0:0xd97ff20ffaa9c3e6"],"When":"2020-7-24"}]

After waiting 30 min, I realized my coffee wasn’t coming (they have no milk substitutions, by the way). Finally able to reorder with a new server, I placed an order for coffee, then waited another 10 minutes to get a menu. Ordered avocado toast with anchovies. Pretty typical here, but it wasn’t anything to write home about. (Though I’ll share with you here!)

Three stars for outdoor seating, pleasant service though slow, and my company. // ES // visited 17/2/19 // metro: Inglesia","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nazrin Bakhshaliyeva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJNt8MJhysi1yxPdbHuQltMSqc3T0Mc5U91rC2Ds2wmS5DYfM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I got intoxicated from a courgette tortilla covered in mold. However, the food intoxication is there and I feel obligated to write about it since serving food in such a state could prove dangerous for guests. I hope it never happens again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"PAULA CARBAJO ARIZA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9-sDpTcwn5Y94-MJN2QjXIQZgcWSpVAhBpceRHTm07jDKJOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This spot in Olavide square is magical. It was packed when we arrived but we managed to get the best table.
We had a decent pincho for 3€ - not a big portion though and the only reason why I don’t give it 5 stars - and two nice and tasty tostas (trigueros con jamón and brie con frambuesa y nueces).
Service was ok, there was a guy way nicer than the other one.

Overall, it’s the perfect place for a ‘tomar algo’ evening.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Aisha Coppack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbDEVi8qcUy3gNJwpZHKr-h3w4NbKBLwic-FLJXidybmd5NJkk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Admittedly, Whisky Bars are not my specialty, but this was stunning. We visited as soon as they opened, so it was very quiet (too early for most of Madrid!), but they had a whisky tasting even going on in function room and we got brilliant service from a very friendly bartender! The cocktails were delicious, but for me the Spanish whisky stole the show! We were even served a few small squares of dark chocolate and it was the perfect pairing. A lovely experience I'd happily repeat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfEjd-P_TUhpbEJL0f9Mdk&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"James Darrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6JZPVXX4qLh5y3Yl4QubU_prFqZjdBkufPDYDv_f19YMyV-c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place.
The decor is fantastic and perfect for contemplative Whisky/Whiskey drinking.
The staff are incredibly nonweldable and their recommendations based on your previous selections, are truly worth the visit.
The food is also superb, hearty, tasty and great for lining your stomach in preparation for some drinks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8H_oArCYLJuvcSlwY8Mgt&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Adrián Gallego Sánchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8oPNIrIC25ie4d7ZRC_pyzbRn7_J49H-W3TTXLNe_oHOCQEgn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"By far, the best Whiskey tasting experience I've been so far. Cristian and Eduardo were really close, explained every detail and they were really open to any questions.
It felt as if we were expending the evening with some really knowledgeable colleagues!

We will definitely come again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo-fGGLQ&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The absolute best old fashioned in town! The only thing I didn’t love are the glasses (very plain, no grip), but the drinks were very good and the celeriac bravas a super idea!
A great thing about this place is that it has spaces that are a bit more secluded so it doesn’t get as crowded or noisy, which I appreciate a lot.
The staff were marvellous!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX9tv3Zw&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2024-10-27"},{"Name":"Valeria Paredes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoAUbv_J-7395Oydt3EUtilHLbzoKxQ5DBbGuwp6Vk6mOgOXNr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this bar!!! The server is very very nice and they have this one cocktail that’s the right amount of sweet with red wine foam on top. I recommend it! it’s called “Frank Stop Yelling”.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJaL6uGNncrWDA&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Dray","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwfzkXtil4HpgD7wFTM_8fgxl9454DE32odXW9Rrfw-ImlG_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Holy Drop is one of the coziest bars I’ve ever been to, with an interior design that’s genuinely beautiful. The owner and the waiters are incredibly friendly and make you feel at home right away. The drinks are honestly some of the best I’ve ever had—highly recommended","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristen Zephyrus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVswfjbmAdCbderY1UcDRv3gk6yFStevqk8ubuWJeu-WgUVdVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have spent some incredibly awesome evenings here while visiting Madrid. We’ve tried several of the flights and have gotten to learn a ton about whiskey from Ezekiel and Miguel. The cocktails are equally impressive and well balanced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHzOrx6wE&fid=0x0:0x1c5528795e6d783b"],"When":"2024-9-13"},{"Name":"James Keiller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFmSI1K6cz0bJZ6h-hbpYWTtrF6_5TX7BNATCcahtSzcU6yQf-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hi and slainte mhath!

What a bar !
No , not a bar … an experience !
A typical warm , welcoming and friendly place of hospitality and a true reflection of Scotland with a Madrileño twist . And that’s without sampling the truly amazing extensive range of whiskies !!
And the cocktails are a work of art !

An amazing venue for all .. be you  local or from afar .

Cheers and best wishes.","Images":null,"When":""}]

An alternative touch.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Palazon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYmkJA21Pkejx39AoVmy0m9rRJEytdObwVjQGHZIpIsFtW3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Si buscas un sitio auténtico este es el lugar. Es como si fuera el mítico bar casero de una familia asiática. Rosa es majísima y te atiende de una forma muy cercana. Las zamburiñas están buenísimas y los sushis de salmón son de lo mejor que he probado. Es muy pequeño, así que o reservas o buscas una hora inusual para conseguir mesa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4l7toSS5ooW7WoHXzpm2h\u0026fid=0x0:0xae578dc1b86e98e6"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Javier Gayoso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXduMjD_ThuWOpZDs5dG6VsIgoFfu_90PqBR6x03TvlirXzft-G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"A diferencia de otras reseñas, a mí la dueña me trató muy bien pero la calidad, cantidad y precio de la comida me pareció fatal. Los que dicen que es un restaurante japonés no tienen ni idea. Es un chino de barrio. Ahora que Chamberi está en ebullición gastronómica, hay mejores opciones.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVxbHSOqZyq2eNGapl5A1X\u0026fid=0x0:0xae578dc1b86e98e6"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Noelia Gonzalez Miguelañez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4Xe01eZ2sxZtJi0ovSyc1ddM_ddWmd87d9oqcX0tXTZdCoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"nunca hago reseñas negativas pero me siento muy ofendida y triste. fui a tomarme una cocacola a la terraza al sol. se la pido muy amablemente a la dueña, la destapa, y me pregunta si es en la terraza y le digo que sí. acto seguido la vuelve a tapar y me dice que no. le pregunto por qué no y me ignora continuando haciendo sus cosas. le vuelvo a preguntar por qué no y me vuelve a ignorar. nunca había venido ni siquiera vivo por la zona. soy una chica joven y jamas he causado ningún inconveniente en este local porque ni siquiera lo conocía. me he ido llorando. solo quería disfrutar una cocacola en una terraza porque después de 3 meses ha salido el sol en madrid. estaba contenta y esta señora me ha arruinado el día. me gustaría saber el criterio de admisión del establecimiento para consumir una cocacola en una terraza a las 14 de la tarde. esto es denunciable y si tuviera tiempo hubiera llamado a la policía","Images":null,"When":""}]
